To address these issues, we combine the elastic net loss with a robust loss framework to construct a sparse $\varepsilon$-insensitive bounded asymmetric elastic net loss, and integrate it with SVM to build $\varepsilon$ Insensitive Zone Bounded Asymmetric Elastic Net Loss-based SVM($\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM). $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM is both sparse and robust. Sparsity is proven by showing that samples inside the $\varepsilon$-insensitive band are not support vectors. Robustness is theoretically guaranteed because the influence function is bounded. To solve the non-convex optimization problem, we design a half-quadratic algorithm based on clipping dual coordinate descent. It transforms the problem into a series of weighted subproblems, improving computational efficiency via the $\varepsilon$ parameter. Experiments on simulated and real datasets show that $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM outperforms traditional and existing robust SVMs. It balances sparsity and robustness well in noisy environments. Statistical tests confirm its superiority. Under the Gaussian kernel, it achieves better accuracy and noise insensitivity, validating its effectiveness and practical value.

</details>


### [368] [The Condition-Number Principle for Prototype Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07744)
*Romano Li,Jianfei Cao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个几何框架，将原型聚类的目标精度与结构恢复联系起来，定义了聚类条件数来量化聚类问题的内在几何难度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立算法无关的几何框架，将聚类算法的目标函数精度与恢复真实聚类结构的能力联系起来，分离算法精度与问题内在几何难度的影响。

Method: 开发几何框架，定义聚类条件数（比较簇内尺度与跨越簇边界所需的最小损失增加），分析可容许损失函数类，建立确定性非渐近保证。

Result: 当聚类条件数较小时，任何具有小次优性间隙的解也必须具有相对于基准划分的小误分类误差；揭示了鲁棒性与对簇不平衡敏感性的基本权衡；误差集中在簇边界附近，足够深的簇核心在加强的局部边界下能精确恢复。

Conclusion: 该框架为将低目标函数值解释为有意义聚类结构的可靠证据提供了几何原理，分离了算法精度与实例内在几何难度的作用。

Abstract: We develop a geometric framework that links objective accuracy to structural recovery in prototype-based clustering. The analysis is algorithm-agnostic and applies to a broad class of admissible loss functions. We define a clustering condition number that compares within-cluster scale to the minimum loss increase required to move a point across a cluster boundary. When this quantity is small, any solution with a small suboptimality gap must also have a small misclassification error relative to a benchmark partition. The framework also clarifies a fundamental trade-off between robustness and sensitivity to cluster imbalance, leading to sharp phase transitions for exact recovery under different objectives. The guarantees are deterministic and non-asymptotic, and they separate the role of algorithmic accuracy from the intrinsic geometric difficulty of the instance. We further show that errors concentrate near cluster boundaries and that sufficiently deep cluster cores are recovered exactly under strengthened local margins. Together, these results provide a geometric principle for interpreting low objective values as reliable evidence of meaningful clustering structure.

</details>


### [369] [Variational Approximated Restricted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Spatial Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07635)
*Debjoy Thakur*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出VREML框架，使用高斯变分分布近似难处理的边际似然，通过ELBO推导坐标上升算法，用于空间数据的可扩展推断


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统REML方法需要反复逆和分解大型稀疏精度矩阵，计算成本高，需要更高效的空间数据推断方法

Method: 提出变分限制最大似然(VREML)框架，使用高斯变分分布近似边际似然，构建ELBO，推导坐标上升算法联合估计空间随机效应和方差分量

Result: 理论上证明ELBO单调收敛，变分族在高斯ICAR设置下精确，消除后验层面的近似误差；实证显示VREML优于MLE和INLA

Conclusion: VREML为空间数据提供计算高效的可扩展推断框架，在保持理论精确性的同时显著提升计算效率

Abstract: This research considers a scalable inference for spatial data modeled through Gaussian intrinsic conditional autoregressive (ICAR) structures. The classical estimation method, restricted maximum likelihood (REML), requires repeated inversion and factorization of large, sparse precision matrices, which makes this computation costly. To sort this problem out, we propose a variational restricted maximum likelihood (VREML) framework that approximates the intractable marginal likelihood using a Gaussian variational distribution. By constructing an evidence lower bound (ELBO) on the restricted likelihood, we derive a computationally efficient coordinate-ascent algorithm for jointly estimating the spatial random effects and variance components. In this article, we theoretically establish the monotone convergence of ELBO and mathematically exhibit that the variational family is exact under Gaussian ICAR settings, which is an indication of nullifying approximation error at the posterior level. We empirically establish the supremacy of our VREML over MLE and INLA.

</details>


### [370] [Gaussian Approximation for Asynchronous Q-learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07323)
*Artemy Rubtsov,Sergey Samsonov,Vladimir Ulyanov,Alexey Naumov*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文推导了异步Q学习算法中Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代在高维中心极限定理下的收敛速率，使用多项式步长k^{-ω}，ω∈(1/2,1]，在均匀几何遍历马尔可夫链假设下，获得了超矩形类上高达n^{-1/6}log⁴(nSA)的收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究异步Q学习算法中Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代的统计特性，特别是高维中心极限定理的收敛速率。Q学习作为强化学习中的核心算法，其理论性质分析对于理解算法收敛性和统计效率至关重要。

Method: 采用多项式步长k^{-ω}，ω∈(1/2,1]的异步Q学习算法，假设状态-动作-下一状态三元组序列形成均匀几何遍历马尔可夫链。通过证明一个高维中心极限定理来处理鞅差和的收敛性，并分析Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代的统计性质。

Result: 在超矩形类上获得了高达n^{-1/6}log⁴(nSA)的收敛速率，其中n为样本数，S和A分别为状态和动作的数量。同时证明了高维中心极限定理并给出了算法最后迭代的高阶矩界。

Conclusion: 本文为异步Q学习算法的Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代提供了高维中心极限定理的理论保证，获得了具体的收敛速率，并建立了相关的鞅差和中心极限定理及高阶矩界，为强化学习算法的统计理论分析提供了重要工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we derive rates of convergence in the high-dimensional central limit theorem for Polyak-Ruppert averaged iterates generated by the asynchronous Q-learning algorithm with a polynomial stepsize $k^{-ω},\, ω\in (1/2, 1]$. Assuming that the sequence of state-action-next-state triples $(s_k, a_k, s_{k+1})_{k \geq 0}$ forms a uniformly geometrically ergodic Markov chain, we establish a rate of order up to $n^{-1/6} \log^{4} (nS A)$ over the class of hyper-rectangles, where $n$ is the number of samples used by the algorithm and $S$ and $A$ denote the numbers of states and actions, respectively. To obtain this result, we prove a high-dimensional central limit theorem for sums of martingale differences, which may be of independent interest. Finally, we present bounds for high-order moments for the algorithm's last iterate.

</details>


### [371] [The Theory and Practice of Highly Scalable Gaussian Process Regression with Nearest Neighbours](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07267)
*Robert Allison,Tomasz Maciazek,Anthony Stephenson*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文为最近邻高斯过程（NNGP/GPnn）回归建立了完整的理论框架，证明了其在大样本下的统计性质，包括点预测极限、一致性、最优收敛速率以及超参数鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯过程回归在训练规模上具有立方复杂度，限制了其在大规模数据集上的应用。最近邻高斯过程（NNGP/GPnn）通过仅使用每个测试点的最近邻进行预测，在实践中表现出色，但其大样本理论尚不完整，需要建立严格的理论基础。

Method: 建立NNGP/GPnn回归的理论框架，在温和的正则性假设下，推导三个关键预测指标（均方误差MSE、校准系数CAL、负对数似然NLL）的几乎必然点极限。研究L2风险，证明普遍一致性，并展示风险达到Stone极小极大速率。同时证明MSE在紧致超参数集上的一致收敛性及其对超参数导数的渐近消失性。

Result: 1. 推导了MSE、CAL、NLL的几乎必然点极限；2. 证明了NNGP/GPnn的普遍一致性；3. 展示了风险达到最优收敛速率n^{-2α/(2p+d)}；4. 证明了MSE在超参数集上的一致收敛性；5. 展示了MSE对长度尺度、核尺度、噪声方差导数的渐近消失性，解释了GPnn对超参数调优的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该研究为NNGP/GPnn作为高度可扩展且原理性的高斯过程模型替代方案提供了严格的统计基础，解释了其在实际应用中的优异表现和超参数鲁棒性。

Abstract: Gaussian process ($GP$) regression is a widely used non-parametric modeling tool, but its cubic complexity in the training size limits its use on massive data sets. A practical remedy is to predict using only the nearest neighbours of each test point, as in Nearest Neighbour Gaussian Process ($NNGP$) regression for geospatial problems and the related scalable $GPnn$ method for more general machine-learning applications. Despite their strong empirical performance, the large-$n$ theory of $NNGP/GPnn$ remains incomplete. We develop a theoretical framework for $NNGP$ and $GPnn$ regression. Under mild regularity assumptions, we derive almost sure pointwise limits for three key predictive criteria: mean squared error ($MSE$), calibration coefficient ($CAL$), and negative log-likelihood ($NLL$). We then study the $L_2$-risk, prove universal consistency, and show that the risk attains Stone's minimax rate $n^{-2α/(2p+d)}$, where $α$ and $p$ capture regularity of the regression problem. We also prove uniform convergence of $MSE$ over compact hyper-parameter sets and show that its derivatives with respect to lengthscale, kernel scale, and noise variance vanish asymptotically, with explicit rates. This explains the observed robustness of $GPnn$ to hyper-parameter tuning. These results provide a rigorous statistical foundation for $NNGP/GPnn$ as a highly scalable and principled alternative to full $GP$ models.

</details>


### [372] [Amortized Filtering and Smoothing with Conditional Normalizing Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07169)
*Tiangang Cui,Xiaodong Feng,Chenlong Pei,Xiaoliang Wan,Tao Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: AFSF：基于条件归一化流的统一摊销框架，用于高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑是科学和工程中的基础但具有挑战性的问题，需要开发能够处理复杂系统的高效算法

Method: 提出AFSF框架，使用循环编码器将观测历史映射到固定维度的摘要统计量，基于该共享表示学习用于滤波分布的前向流和用于后向转移核的后向流，通过标准后向递归恢复整个轨迹的平滑分布

Result: AFSF能够准确近似滤波分布和平滑路径，支持超出训练范围的预测，通过共享摘要统计量实现隐式正则化，并开发了基于流的粒子滤波变体用于替代滤波和诊断

Conclusion: AFSF为高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑提供了一个统一、高效的摊销框架，通过条件归一化流和共享表示实现了准确的状态估计和轨迹平滑

Abstract: Bayesian filtering and smoothing for high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems are fundamental yet challenging problems in many areas of science and engineering. In this work, we propose AFSF, a unified amortized framework for filtering and smoothing with conditional normalizing flows. The core idea is to encode each observation history into a fixed-dimensional summary statistic and use this shared representation to learn both a forward flow for the filtering distribution and a backward flow for the backward transition kernel. Specifically, a recurrent encoder maps each observation history to a fixed-dimensional summary statistic whose dimension does not depend on the length of the time series. Conditioned on this shared summary statistic, the forward flow approximates the filtering distribution, while the backward flow approximates the backward transition kernel. The smoothing distribution over an entire trajectory is then recovered by combining the terminal filtering distribution with the learned backward flow through the standard backward recursion. By learning the underlying temporal evolution structure, AFSF also supports extrapolation beyond the training horizon. Moreover, by coupling the two flows through shared summary statistics, AFSF induces an implicit regularization across latent state trajectories and improves trajectory-level smoothing. In addition, we develop a flow-based particle filtering variant that provides an alternative filtering procedure and enables ESS-based diagnostics when explicit model factors are available. Numerical experiments demonstrate that AFSF provides accurate approximations of both filtering distributions and smoothing paths.

</details>


### [373] [A Data-Informed Variational Clustering Framework for Noisy High-Dimensional Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06864)
*Wan Ping Chen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: DIVI是一个数据驱动的变分聚类框架，针对高维噪声数据，结合全局特征门控和基于分裂的自适应结构增长，实现稳定聚类、特征相关学习与模型复杂度自适应调整。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高维噪声设置下进行聚类具有挑战性，特别是当只有少量维度具有信息性且聚类数量未知时。传统基于似然的方法可能不稳定或对噪声维度过于敏感，需要同时解决分区恢复、特征相关性学习和结构适应这三个紧密耦合的问题。

Method: DIVI框架结合全局特征门控与基于分裂的自适应结构增长。采用信息先验初始化稳定优化，通过可微分方式学习特征相关性，仅当局部诊断显示欠拟合时才扩展模型复杂度。框架还分析了运行时可扩展性和参数敏感性。

Result: DIVI在严重特征噪声下表现竞争力强，计算可行，产生可解释的特征门控行为，同时展示保守增长和在挑战性设置中的可识别失败机制。框架在聚类性能、计算效率和可解释性方面取得平衡。

Conclusion: DIVI更适合被视为针对噪声高维数据的实用变分聚类框架，而非完全贝叶斯生成解决方案。它在处理高维噪声数据时提供了稳定性、适应性和可解释性的平衡。

Abstract: Clustering in high-dimensional settings with severe feature noise remains challenging, especially when only a small subset of dimensions is informative and the final number of clusters is not specified in advance. In such regimes, partition recovery, feature relevance learning, and structural adaptation are tightly coupled, and standard likelihood-based methods can become unstable or overly sensitive to noisy dimensions. We propose DIVI, a data-informed variational clustering framework that combines global feature gating with split-based adaptive structure growth. DIVI uses informative prior initialization to stabilize optimization, learns feature relevance in a differentiable manner, and expands model complexity only when local diagnostics indicate underfit. Beyond clustering performance, we also examine runtime scalability and parameter sensitivity in order to clarify the computational and practical behavior of the framework. Empirically, we find that DIVI performs competitively under severe feature noise, remains computationally feasible, and yields interpretable feature-gating behavior, while also exhibiting conservative growth and identifiable failure regimes in challenging settings. Overall, DIVI is best viewed as a practical variational clustering framework for noisy high-dimensional data rather than as a fully Bayesian generative solution.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [374] [What a Comfortable World: Ergonomic Principles Guided Apartment Layout Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08411)
*Piotr Nieciecki,Aleksander Plocharski,Przemyslaw Musialski*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出一种集成建筑学原理的Transformer布局生成方法，通过可微损失函数优化房间邻接与邻近关系，显著提升布局的宜居性指标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数据驱动的平面图生成方法往往复制了真实世界训练数据中存在的工效学低效问题，需要将建筑设计原则直接集成到生成过程中

Method: 基于文献中已建立的建筑标准，制定可微损失函数来优化房间邻接和邻近关系，在训练过程中用这些工效学先验指导Transformer模型

Result: 该方法生成的布局在宜居性指标上显著改善，比较评估显示在保持高结构有效性的同时，在工效学合规性方面优于基线方法

Conclusion: 通过将建筑学原理直接集成到基于Transformer的生成过程中，能够产生具有更好工效学特性的平面布局，解决了现有数据驱动方法复制训练数据低效模式的问题

Abstract: Current data-driven floor plan generation methods often reproduce the ergonomic inefficiencies found in real-world training datasets. To address this, we propose a novel approach that integrates architectural design principles directly into a transformer-based generative process. We formulate differentiable loss functions based on established architectural standards from literature to optimize room adjacency and proximity. By guiding the model with these ergonomic priors during training, our method produces layouts with significantly improved livability metrics. Comparative evaluations show that our approach outperforms baselines in ergonomic compliance while maintaining high structural validity.

</details>


### [375] [Splats under Pressure: Exploring Performance-Energy Trade-offs in Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting under Constrained GPU Budgets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07177)
*Muhammad Fahim Tajwar,Arthur Wuhrlin,Bhojan Anand*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 研究通过GPU降频和功耗限制模拟不同性能等级，分析3D高斯泼溅在边缘设备上的实时渲染性能与能耗关系


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在边缘客户端实时渲染的可行性，特别是在不同高斯泼溅数量和GPU计算预算下的性能表现，评估其在能源受限环境（如独立头显和瘦客户端）中的部署潜力

Method: 采用基于仿真的方法，通过系统性地降低GPU核心频率和施加功耗限制，在单个高端GPU上模拟不同GPU能力等级；在不同性能点上测量帧率、运行时行为和功耗，分析功率-性能关系如FPS-功率曲线、每帧能耗和性能每瓦

Result: 该方法能够近似模拟从嵌入式、移动级设备到高端消费级系统的多样化GPU性能范围，提供了3DGS边缘部署的性能-能耗权衡的早期见解

Conclusion: 通过分析功率-性能关系，探索了客户端3DGS渲染的实际性能下限，为边缘部署3DGS系统的可行性提供了评估框架

Abstract: We investigate the feasibility of real-time 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) rasterisation on edge clients with varying Gaussian splat counts and GPU computational budgets. Instead of evaluating multiple physical devices, we adopt an emulation-based approach that approximates different GPU capability tiers on a single high-end GPU. By systematically under-clocking the GPU core frequency and applying power caps, we emulate a controlled range of floating-point performance levels that approximate different GPU capability tiers. At each point in this range, we measure frame rate, runtime behaviour, and power consumption across scenes of varying complexity, pipelines, and optimisations, enabling analysis of power-performance relationships such as FPS-power curves, energy per frame, and performance per watt. This method allows us to approximate the performance envelope of a diverse class of GPUs, from embedded and mobile-class devices to high-end consumer-grade systems.
  Our objective is to explore the practical lower bounds of client-side 3DGS rasterisation and assess its potential for deployment in energy-constrained environments, including standalone headsets and thin clients. Through this analysis, we provide early insights into the performance-energy trade-offs that govern the viability of edge-deployed 3DGS systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [376] [Logical Robots: Declarative Multi-Agent Programming in Logica](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06629)
*Evgeny Skvortsov,Yilin Xia,Ojaswa Garg,Shawn Bowers,Bertram Ludäscher*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Logical Robots是一个基于逻辑编程语言Logica的交互式多智能体机器人仿真平台，通过逻辑谓词定义机器人行为，将感知输入映射到运动输出，实现反应式控制与高层规划的统一框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为多智能体机器人行为研究提供一个统一的编程框架，使低层反应式控制和高层规划能够在单一逻辑编程环境中协同工作，简化复杂机器人系统的开发与仿真。

Method: 使用逻辑编程语言Logica，通过逻辑谓词定义机器人行为，这些谓词将来自模拟雷达阵列和共享内存的观测数据映射到期望的运动输出，实现行为规范的声明式编程。

Result: 开发了一个交互式多智能体仿真平台，能够通过逻辑编程方式统一指定自主机器人行为，支持反应式控制与规划任务的集成，为多智能体系统研究提供了连贯的框架。

Conclusion: Logical Robots平台展示了逻辑编程在机器人行为规范中的有效性，为多智能体机器人系统的开发提供了一个统一、声明式的编程环境，有助于探索复杂的协同行为。

Abstract: We present Logical Robots, an interactive multi-agent simulation platform where autonomous robot behavior is specified declaratively in the logic programming language Logica. Robot behavior is defined by logical predicates that map observations from simulated radar arrays and shared memory to desired motor outputs. This approach allows low-level reactive control and high-level planning to coexist within a single programming environment, providing a coherent framework for exploring multi-agent robot behavior.

</details>


### [377] [Dynamic Attentional Context Scoping: Agent-Triggered Focus Sessions for Isolated Per-Agent Steering in Multi-Agent LLM Orchestration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07911)
*Nickson Patel*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: DACS是一种动态注意力上下文范围机制，通过注册模式和聚焦模式解决多智能体LLM编排中的上下文污染问题，显著提升指导准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM编排系统存在上下文污染问题：当N个并发智能体竞争编排器的上下文窗口时，每个智能体的任务状态、部分输出和待处理问题会污染其他智能体的指导交互，降低决策质量。

Method: 提出动态注意力上下文范围（DACS）机制，编排器在两种不对称模式下运行：注册模式（仅保存轻量级智能体状态摘要）和聚焦模式（当智能体发出指导请求时，注入该智能体的完整上下文，同时压缩其他智能体到注册条目）。

Result: 在四个实验阶段共200次试验中，DACS在8个合成场景中达到90.0-98.4%的指导准确性，而扁平上下文基线仅为21.0-60.0%。错误智能体污染从28-57%降至0-14%，上下文效率比最高达3.53倍。准确性优势随N和D增长而增加。

Conclusion: DACS通过智能体触发的、不对称的确定性上下文隔离，有效消除了跨智能体污染，无需上下文压缩或检索，显著提升了多智能体LLM编排系统的决策质量。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM orchestration systems suffer from context pollution: when N concurrent agents compete for the orchestrator's context window, each agent's task state, partial outputs, and pending questions contaminate the steering interactions of every other agent, degrading decision quality. We introduce Dynamic Attentional Context Scoping (DACS), a mechanism in which the orchestrator operates in two asymmetric modes. In Registry mode it holds only lightweight per-agent status summaries (<=200 tokens each), remaining responsive to all agents and the user. When an agent emits a SteeringRequest, the orchestrator enters Focus(a_i) mode, injecting the full context of agent a_i while compressing all other agents to their registry entries. Context isolation is agent-triggered, asymmetric, and deterministic: the context window contains exactly F(a_i) + R_{-i} during steering, eliminating cross-agent contamination without requiring context compression or retrieval. We evaluate DACS across four experimental phases totalling 200 trials: Phase 1 tests N in {3,5,10} (60 trials); Phase 2 tests agent heterogeneity and adversarial dependencies (60 trials); Phase 3 tests decision density up to D=15 (40 trials); Phase 4 uses autonomous LLM agents for free-form questions (40 trials, Claude Haiku 4.5). Across all 8 synthetic scenarios, DACS achieves 90.0--98.4% steering accuracy versus 21.0--60.0% for a flat-context baseline (p < 0.0001 throughout), with wrong-agent contamination falling from 28--57% to 0--14% and context efficiency ratios of up to 3.53x. The accuracy advantage grows with N and D; keyword matching is validated by LLM-as-judge across all phases (mean kappa=0.909). DACS outperforms the flat-context baseline by +17.2pp at N=3 (p=0.0023) and +20.4pp at N=5 (p=0.0008) in Phase 4, with the advantage growing with N confirmed by two independent judges.

</details>


### [378] [More Capable, Less Cooperative? When LLMs Fail At Zero-Cost Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07821)
*Advait Yadav,Sid Black,Oliver Sourbut*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 研究发现LLM智能体在零成本帮助他人的情况下仍会出现合作失败，能力与合作性无关，需要专门设计合作机制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解LLM智能体在多智能体系统中的合作失败问题。现实世界中许多协调问题（如知识共享、代码文档）中帮助他人的个人成本可忽略不计却能带来巨大集体收益，但LLM智能体在帮助他人既不获益也不受损、且有明确指示要合作的情况下是否合作仍未知

Method: 构建了研究无摩擦环境中合作行为的多智能体设置，消除合作的所有战略复杂性。通过因果分解方法自动化智能体通信的一方，将合作失败与能力失败分离，并通过智能体推理分析追踪其根源。测试针对性干预措施

Result: 发现能力不能预测合作性：OpenAI o3仅达到最优集体性能的17%，而OpenAI o3-mini达到50%，尽管有相同的最大化群体收益指示。明确协议使低能力模型性能翻倍，微小共享激励改善了弱合作模型。合作失败和能力失败都会导致性能下降

Conclusion: 仅扩展智能无法解决多智能体系统中的协调问题，即使帮助他人零成本，也需要有意识的合作设计。研究强调了在LLM智能体系统中设计合作机制的重要性

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly coordinate in multi-agent systems, yet we lack an understanding of where and why cooperation failures may arise. In many real-world coordination problems, from knowledge sharing in organizations to code documentation, helping others carries negligible personal cost while generating substantial collective benefits. However, whether LLM agents cooperate when helping neither benefits nor harms the helper, while being given explicit instructions to do so, remains unknown. We build a multi-agent setup designed to study cooperative behavior in a frictionless environment, removing all strategic complexity from cooperation. We find that capability does not predict cooperation: OpenAI o3 achieves only 17% of optimal collective performance while OpenAI o3-mini reaches 50%, despite identical instructions to maximize group revenue. Through a causal decomposition that automates one side of agent communication, we separate cooperation failures from competence failures, tracing their origins through agent reasoning analysis. Testing targeted interventions, we find that explicit protocols double performance for low-competence models, and tiny sharing incentives improve models with weak cooperation. Our findings suggest that scaling intelligence alone will not solve coordination problems in multi-agent systems and will require deliberate cooperative design, even when helping others costs nothing.

</details>


### [379] [Strategic Persuasion with Trait-Conditioned Multi-Agent Systems for Iterative Legal Argumentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07028)
*Philipp D. Siedler*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个基于LLM的多智能体法庭辩论框架，通过可解释的性格特征控制智能体的修辞风格和策略导向，在模拟法律案件中验证了异质团队、适度交互深度以及特定性格特征对说服力的影响，并开发了基于强化学习的动态性格编排器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有博弈论模型通常忽略语言作为说服机制在对抗性领域（如法律、外交、谈判）中的作用。研究旨在将语言作为一级战略行动空间，构建能够进行自适应说服的自主智能体。

Method: 提出了Strategic Courtroom Framework：一个多智能体模拟环境，其中检方和辩方团队由基于性格特征条件化的LLM智能体组成，进行迭代的回合制法律辩论。智能体通过9个可解释特征（分为4种原型）实例化，控制修辞风格和策略导向。在10个合成法律案件和84种三特征团队配置下进行了7000多次模拟试验，使用了DeepSeek-R1和Gemini 2.5 Pro模型。进一步引入了基于强化学习的Trait Orchestrator，动态生成适应案件和对手团队特征的辩护特征。

Result: 异质团队（具有互补特征）始终优于同质配置；适度的交互深度产生更稳定的判决；某些特征（特别是定量和魅力特征）对说服成功贡献不成比例；基于强化学习的Trait Orchestrator发现的策略优于静态的人工设计特征组合。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了如何将语言作为一级战略行动空间，为构建能够在多智能体环境中进行自适应说服的自主智能体奠定了基础。通过可解释的性格特征和动态编排，实现了更有效的说服策略。

Abstract: Strategic interaction in adversarial domains such as law, diplomacy, and negotiation is mediated by language, yet most game-theoretic models abstract away the mechanisms of persuasion that operate through discourse. We present the Strategic Courtroom Framework, a multi-agent simulation environment in which prosecution and defense teams composed of trait-conditioned Large Language Model (LLM) agents engage in iterative, round-based legal argumentation. Agents are instantiated using nine interpretable traits organized into four archetypes, enabling systematic control over rhetorical style and strategic orientation.
  We evaluate the framework across 10 synthetic legal cases and 84 three-trait team configurations, totaling over 7{,}000 simulated trials using DeepSeek-R1 and Gemini~2.5~Pro. Our results show that heterogeneous teams with complementary traits consistently outperform homogeneous configurations, that moderate interaction depth yields more stable verdicts, and that certain traits (notably quantitative and charismatic) contribute disproportionately to persuasive success. We further introduce a reinforcement-learning-based Trait Orchestrator that dynamically generates defense traits conditioned on the case and opposing team, discovering strategies that outperform static, human-designed trait combinations.
  Together, these findings demonstrate how language can be treated as a first-class strategic action space and provide a foundation for building autonomous agents capable of adaptive persuasion in multi-agent environments.

</details>


<div id='stat.ME'></div>

# stat.ME [[Back]](#toc)

### [380] [From Ground Truth to Measurement: A Statistical Framework for Human Labeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07591)
*Robert Chew,Stephanie Eckman,Christoph Kern,Frauke Kreuter*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 提出一个统计框架，将标注结果分解为可解释的变异来源：实例难度、标注者偏差、情境噪声和关系对齐，挑战了传统将所有分歧视为噪声的观点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统监督学习假设标注数据能准确测量模型应学习的概念，但实践中人工标注存在系统性变异（模糊项目、不同解释、简单错误）。研究通常将所有分歧视为噪声，这掩盖了这些区别并限制了我们对模型实际学习内容的理解。

Method: 将标注重新定义为测量过程，引入统计框架将标注结果分解为四个可解释的变异来源：实例难度、标注者偏差、情境噪声和关系对齐。该框架扩展了经典测量误差模型，适应共享和个体化的真实概念，反映传统和人类标注变异对误差的不同解释。

Result: 在多标注者自然语言推理数据集上应用该模型，发现了所有四个理论组分的经验证据，并证明了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 这对以数据为中心的机器学习有重要启示，并概述了该方法如何指导发展更系统的标注科学。

Abstract: Supervised machine learning assumes that labeled data provide accurate measurements of the concepts models are meant to learn. Yet in practice, human labeling introduces systematic variation arising from ambiguous items, divergent interpretations, and simple mistakes. Machine learning research commonly treats all disagreement as noise, which obscures these distinctions and limits our understanding of what models actually learn. This paper reframes annotation as a measurement process and introduces a statistical framework for decomposing labeling outcomes into interpretable sources of variation: instance difficulty, annotator bias, situational noise, and relational alignment. The framework extends classical measurement-error models to accommodate both shared and individualized notions of truth, reflecting traditional and human label variation interpretations of error, and provides a diagnostic for assessing which regime better characterizes a given task. Applying the proposed model to a multi-annotator natural language inference dataset, we find empirical evidence for all four theorized components and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We conclude with implications for data-centric machine learning and outline how this approach can guide the development of a more systematic science of labeling.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [381] [HistDiT: A Structure-Aware Latent Conditional Diffusion Model for High-Fidelity Virtual Staining in Histopathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08305)
*Aasim Bin Saleem,Amr Ahmed,Ardhendu Behera,Hafeezullah Amin,Iman Yi Liao,Mahmoud Khattab,Pan Jia Wern,Haslina Makmur*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: HistDiT：一种用于虚拟组织化学染色的新型潜在条件扩散变换器架构，通过双流条件策略和多目标损失函数，在保持精细细胞结构的同时准确翻译生化表达，超越了现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统免疫组织化学染色方法资源密集、耗时且易造成结构损伤。现有虚拟染色方法在保持精细细胞结构和准确翻译生化表达之间存在权衡问题，生成的样本要么结构相关但模糊，要么纹理真实但存在影响诊断的伪影。

Method: 提出HistDiT，一种新型潜在条件扩散变换器架构，包含：1）双流条件策略，通过VAE编码的潜在空间保持空间约束，通过UNI嵌入提供语义表型指导；2）多目标损失函数，生成具有清晰形态结构的更锐利图像；3）使用结构相关性度量专注于核心形态结构以精确评估样本质量。

Result: 该模型在严格的定量和定性评估中超越了现有基线方法，为虚拟组织学染色建立了新的视觉保真度基准。

Conclusion: HistDiT通过创新的双流条件策略和多目标损失函数，成功解决了虚拟染色中的"结构和染色权衡"问题，为乳腺癌HER2等免疫生物标志物的评估提供了更高效、准确的虚拟染色解决方案。

Abstract: Immunohistochemistry (IHC) is essential for assessing specific immune biomarkers like Human Epidermal growth-factor Receptor 2 (HER2) in breast cancer. However, the traditional protocols of obtaining IHC stains are resource-intensive, time-consuming, and prone to structural damages. Virtual staining has emerged as a scalable alternative, but it faces significant challenges in preserving fine-grained cellular structures while accurately translating biochemical expressions. Current state-of-the-art methods still rely on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or standard convolutional U-Net diffusion models that often struggle with "structure and staining trade-offs". The generated samples are either structurally relevant but blurry, or texturally realistic but have artifacts that compromise their diagnostic use. In this paper, we introduce HistDiT, a novel latent conditional Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture that establishes a new benchmark for visual fidelity in virtual histological staining. The novelty introduced in this work is, a) the Dual-Stream Conditioning strategy that explicitly maintains a balance between spatial constraints via VAE-encoded latents and semantic phenotype guidance via UNI embeddings; b) the multi-objective loss function that contributes to sharper images with clear morphological structure; and c) the use of the Structural Correlation Metric (SCM) to focus on the core morphological structure for precise assessment of sample quality. Consequently, our model outperforms existing baselines, as demonstrated through rigorous quantitative and qualitative evaluations.

</details>


### [382] [A Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) Framework for High Fidelity Image Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06568)
*Zhenyu Du,Yanbo Gao,Shuai Li,Yiyang Li,Hui Yuan,Mao Ye*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出NC-Diffusion框架，通过将量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声，解决扩散模型图像压缩中的噪声不匹配问题，提高重建保真度和推理效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像压缩方法在扩散学习中引入随机噪声，导致重建图像与原始图像存在偏差，压缩效果不理想。需要解决噪声不匹配问题以提高压缩性能

Method: 1. 提出噪声约束扩散(NC-Diffusion)框架，将学习图像压缩中的量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声；2. 构建从原始图像到带量化噪声的初始压缩结果的噪声约束扩散过程；3. 开发自适应频域滤波模块增强U-Net架构中的跳跃连接；4. 设计零样本样本引导增强方法进一步提高图像保真度

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法取得了最佳性能，显著提高了推理效率和重建质量

Conclusion: NC-Diffusion框架通过解决扩散模型图像压缩中的噪声不匹配问题，实现了高保真图像压缩，结合自适应频域滤波和零样本增强技术，在压缩性能上超越了现有方法

Abstract: With the great success of diffusion models in image generation, diffusion-based image compression is attracting increasing interests. However, due to the random noise introduced in the diffusion learning, they usually produce reconstructions with deviation from the original images, leading to suboptimal compression results. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) framework for high fidelity image compression. Unlike existing diffusion-based compression methods that add random Gaussian noise and direct the noise into the image space, the proposed NC-Diffusion formulates the quantization noise originally added in the learned image compression as the noise in the forward process of diffusion. Then a noise constrained diffusion process is constructed from the ground-truth image to the initial compression result generated with quantization noise. The NC-Diffusion overcomes the problem of noise mismatch between compression and diffusion, significantly improving the inference efficiency. In addition, an adaptive frequency-domain filtering module is developed to enhance the skip connections in the U-Net based diffusion architecture, in order to enhance high-frequency details. Moreover, a zero-shot sample-guided enhancement method is designed to further improve the fidelity of the image. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve the best performance compared with existing methods.

</details>


### [383] [Adaptive Differential Privacy for Federated Medical Image Segmentation Across Diverse Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06518)
*Puja Saha,Eranga Ukwatta*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，用于医学图像分割，在保证隐私的同时显著提升分割精度和训练稳定性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗数据因隐私法规和机构限制难以集中，且集中训练的模型因成像协议异质性和数据分布变化而泛化能力差。联邦学习虽能协作训练但不共享原始数据，但加入差分隐私会降低准确性、训练不稳定并削弱泛化能力。

Method: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，动态调整隐私机制以平衡隐私-效用权衡。该方法稳定训练，显著提升Dice分数和分割边界质量，同时保持严格的隐私保证。

Result: 在多种成像模态和分割任务上评估ADP-FL，包括皮肤镜图像的皮肤病变分割、3D CT扫描的肾脏肿瘤分割、多参数MRI的脑肿瘤分割。相比传统联邦学习和标准差分隐私联邦学习，ADP-FL始终获得更高准确性、更好的边界描绘、更快收敛和更大训练稳定性，性能接近相同隐私预算下的非隐私联邦学习。

Conclusion: ADP-FL在实际联邦设置中实现高性能、隐私保护的医学图像分割具有实际可行性，为解决医疗数据隐私与模型性能之间的权衡提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Large volumes of medical data remain underutilized because centralizing distributed data is often infeasible due to strict privacy regulations and institutional constraints. In addition, models trained in centralized settings frequently fail to generalize across clinical sites because of heterogeneity in imaging protocols and continuously evolving data distributions arising from differences in scanners, acquisition parameters, and patient populations. Federated learning offers a promising solution by enabling collaborative model training without sharing raw data. However, incorporating differential privacy into federated learning, while essential for privacy guarantees, often leads to degraded accuracy, unstable convergence, and reduced generalization. In this work, we propose an adaptive differentially private federated learning (ADP-FL) framework for medical image segmentation that dynamically adjusts privacy mechanisms to better balance the privacy-utility trade-off. The proposed approach stabilizes training, significantly improves Dice scores and segmentation boundary quality, and maintains rigorous privacy guarantees. We evaluated ADP-FL across diverse imaging modalities and segmentation tasks, including skin lesion segmentation in dermoscopic images, kidney tumor segmentation in 3D CT scans, and brain tumor segmentation in multi-parametric MRI. Compared with conventional federated learning and standard differentially private federated learning, ADP-FL consistently achieves higher accuracy, improved boundary delineation, faster convergence, and greater training stability, with performance approaching that of non-private federated learning under the same privacy budgets. These results demonstrate the practical viability of ADP-FL for high-performance, privacy-preserving medical image segmentation in real-world federated settings.

</details>


### [384] [Accelerating 4D Hyperspectral Imaging through Physics-Informed Neural Representation and Adaptive Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06561)
*Chi-Jui Ho,Harsh Bhakta,Wei Xiong,Nicholas Antipa*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于物理信息神经表示的方法，从稀疏实验测量中高效重建密集空间分辨的2DIR高光谱图像，将采样需求减少到1/32，实验时间缩短32倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维高光谱成像（HSI）能够可视化超快分子动力学和复杂异质光谱，但将其应用于二维红外（2DIR）光谱学以解析空间变化的振动耦合时，需要密集的奈奎斯特采样和大量信号积累，导致数据采集时间过长。

Method: 采用物理信息神经表示方法，使用多层感知器（MLP）建模稀疏采样的4D坐标与对应光谱强度之间的关系，从有限观测中恢复密集采样的4D光谱。同时开发了损失感知自适应采样方法，在实验过程中逐步引入潜在信息丰富的样本进行迭代数据收集。

Result: 该方法仅使用1/32的采样预算就能实现高保真光谱恢复，相比穷举采样，有效将总实验时间缩短了32倍。重建结果证明，该方法能够忠实地恢复实验测量中的振荡和非振荡光谱动力学。

Conclusion: 该框架为加速任何超立方体数据实验提供了可扩展的解决方案，包括多维光谱学和高光谱成像，为瞬态生物和材料系统的快速化学成像铺平了道路。

Abstract: High-dimensional hyperspectral imaging (HSI) enables the visualization of ultrafast molecular dynamics and complex, heterogeneous spectra. However, applying this capability to resolve spatially varying vibrational couplings in two-dimensional infrared (2DIR) spectroscopy, a type of coherent multidimensional spectroscopy (CMDS), necessitates prohibitively long data acquisition, driven by dense Nyquist sampling requirements and the need for extensive signal accumulation. To address this challenge, we introduce a physics-informed neural representation approach that efficiently reconstructs dense spatially-resolved 2DIR hyperspectral images from sparse experimental measurements. In particular, we used a multilayer perceptron (MLP) to model the relationship between the sub-sampled 4D coordinates and their corresponding spectral intensities, and recover densely sampled 4D spectra from limited observations. The reconstruction results demonstrate that our method, using a fraction of the samples, faithfully recovers both oscillatory and non-oscillatory spectral dynamics in experimental measurement. Moreover, we develop a loss-aware adaptive sampling method to progressively introduce potentially informative samples for iterative data collection while conducting experiments. Experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves high-fidelity spectral recovery using only $1/32$ of the sampling budget, as opposed to exhaustive sampling, effectively reducing total experiment time by up to 32-fold. This framework offers a scalable solution for accelerating any experiments with hypercube data, including multidimensional spectroscopy and hyperspectral imaging, paving the way for rapid chemical imaging of transient biological and material systems.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.mes-hall'></div>

# cond-mat.mes-hall [[Back]](#toc)

### [385] [Quasicrystal Architected Nanomechanical Resonators via Data-Driven Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07379)
*Kawen Li,Hangjin Cho,Richard Norte,Dongil Shin*

Main category: cond-mat.mes-hall

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种从周期性结构转向非周期性结构（特别是准晶体）的纳米机械谐振器设计范式转变，通过数据驱动框架实现了软夹持效应，获得了高品质因子和高力灵敏度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然界中非周期性有序结构（如准晶体）表现出对边界和对称性约束的敏感性降低。虽然软夹持效应已成为实现高Q_m纳米机械谐振器的核心策略，但其实现在很大程度上局限于周期性声子晶体。非周期性结构的潜力尚未被充分探索，主要由于其内在复杂性和缺乏系统方法来识别和利用带隙行为。

Method: 引入数据驱动设计框架，系统地在准晶体架构中实现软夹持效应。以12重对称准晶体为基础设计纳米机械谐振器，通过优化结构参数实现高频带隙，从而获得高品质因子。

Result: 12重准晶体谐振器在MHz频率下实现了Q_m ∼ 10^7的品质因子和亚纳克的有效质量，对应的力灵敏度达到26.4 aN/√Hz，优于之前的二维声子晶体设计。

Conclusion: 准晶体为下一代纳米机械谐振器提供了稳健平台，开启了超越周期性有序的新设计领域，为非周期性结构在纳米机械系统中的应用开辟了新途径。

Abstract: From butterfly wings to remnants of nuclear detonation, aperiodic order repeatedly emerges in nature, often exhibiting reduced sensitivity to boundaries and symmetry constraints. Inspired by this principle, a paradigm shift is introduced in nanomechanical resonator design from periodic to aperiodic structures, focusing on a special class: quasicrystals (QCs). Although soft clamping enabled by phononic stopbands has become a central strategy for achieving high-$Q_m$ nanomechanical resonators, its practical realization has been largely confined to periodic phononic crystals, where band structure engineering is well established. The potential of aperiodic architectures, however, has remained largely unexplored, owing to their intrinsic complexity and the lack of systematic approaches to identifying and exploiting stopband behavior. Here we demonstrate that soft clamping can be realized in quasicrystal architectures and that high-$Q_m$ nanomechanical resonators can be systematically achieved through a data-driven design framework. As a representative demonstration, the 12-fold QC-based resonator exhibits a quality factor $Q_m \sim 10^7$ and an effective mass of sub-nanograms at MHz frequencies, corresponding to an exceptional force sensitivity of $26.4$~aN/$\sqrt{\text{Hz}}$ compared to previous 2D phononic crystals. These results establish QCs as a robust platform for next-generation nanomechanical resonators and open a new design regime beyond periodic order.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [386] [From LLM to Silicon: RL-Driven ASIC Architecture Exploration for On-Device AI Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07526)
*Ravindra Ganti,Steve Xu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: RL驱动的编译器联合优化AI推理的ASIC架构、内存层次和工作负载划分，覆盖3nm到28nm工艺节点，使用SAC算法探索混合离散-连续动作空间，实现统一的PPA优化目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ASIC设计需要针对不同工艺节点进行手动调优，过程耗时且难以实现跨节点的自动适配。需要一种能够联合优化架构、内存和分区，并自动适应不同工艺节点的智能设计方法。

Method: 将设计空间建模为单一马尔可夫决策过程，包含混合离散-连续动作。使用带有专家混合门控的Soft Actor-Critic算法，联合探索网格拓扑、每核微架构和算子放置。支持从3nm到28nm的7个工艺节点。

Result: 在Llama 3.1 8B FP16上实现高性能模式（3nm下29809 tokens/秒），在SmolVLM上实现低功耗模式（所有节点下<13mW，10MHz）。RL自动调整网格大小和每瓦配置，包括异构FETCH、VLEN和内存分配，无需节点特定的手动重调。

Conclusion: 提出的RL驱动编译器能够有效联合优化ASIC架构、内存层次和工作负载划分，实现跨工艺节点的自动适配，在性能和功耗方面均取得显著优化效果。

Abstract: We present an RL-driven compiler that jointly optimizes ASIC architecture, memory hierarchy, and workload partitioning for AI inference across 3nm to 28nm. The design space is formulated as a single Markov Decision Process with mixed discrete-continuous actions and a unified Power-Performance-Area (PPA) objective. Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) with Mixture-of-Experts gating explores the joint space of mesh topology, per-core microarchitecture, and operator placement. We validate on two workloads, Llama 3.1 8B FP16 (high-performance mode, 29809 tokens per second at 3nm) and SmolVLM (low-power mode, less than 13 mW at all nodes, 10 MHz). Across 7 process nodes, the RL automatically adapts mesh sizes and per-tile configurations, including heterogeneous FETCH, VLEN, and memory allocation without node-specific manual retuning.

</details>


### [387] [DHFP-PE: Dual-Precision Hybrid Floating Point Processing Element for AI Acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04507)
*Shubham Kumar,Vijay Pratap Sharma,Vaibhav Neema,Santosh Kumar Vishvakarma*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出一种支持FP8和FP4格式的双精度浮点MAC处理单元，采用创新的位分区技术，在28nm工艺下实现1.94GHz频率、0.00396mm²面积和2.13mW功耗，相比现有设计面积减少60.4%，功耗降低86.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能和边缘计算中低精度算术的快速采用，对能效高且灵活的浮点乘累加单元产生了强烈需求，特别是在低功耗和高吞吐量的AI工作负载场景。

Method: 采用新颖的位分区技术，使单个4位单元乘法器既能作为标准4×4乘法器用于FP8格式，又能作为两个并行2×2乘法器用于2位操作数，实现最大硬件利用率而无需重复逻辑。

Result: 在28nm工艺下实现，工作频率1.94GHz，面积0.00396mm²，功耗2.13mW，相比最先进设计面积减少60.4%，功耗降低86.6%，适合能效受限的AI推理和混合精度计算应用。

Conclusion: 该双精度浮点MAC处理单元通过创新的硬件复用架构，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了面积和功耗，非常适合集成到更大的加速器架构中，用于能量受限的AI推理和混合精度计算应用。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of low-precision arithmetic in artificial intelligence and edge computing has created a strong demand for energy-efficient and flexible floating-point multiply-accumulate (MAC) units. This paper presents a dual-precision floating-point MAC processing element supporting FP8 (E4M3, E5M2) and FP4 (2 x E2M1, 2 x E1M2) formats, specifically optimized for low-power and high-throughput AI workloads. The proposed architecture employs a novel bit-partitioning technique that enables a single 4-bit unit multiplier to operate either as a standard 4 x 4 multiplier for FP8 or as two parallel 2 x 2 multipliers for 2-bit operands, achieving maximum hardware utilization without duplicating logic. Implemented in 28 nm technology, the proposed PE achieves an operating frequency of 1.94 GHz with an area of 0.00396 mm^2 and power consumption of 2.13 mW, resulting in up to 60.4% area reduction and 86.6% power savings compared to state-of-the-art designs, making it well suited for energy-constrained AI inference and mixed-precision computing applications when deployed within larger accelerator architectures.

</details>


### [388] [CBM-Dual: A 65-nm Fully Connected Chaotic Boltzmann Machine Processor for Dual Function Simulated Annealing and Reservoir Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06808)
*Kanta Yoshioka,Soshi Hirayae,Yuichiro Tanaka,Yuichi Katori,Takashi Morie,Hakaru Tamukoh*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的数字混沌动力学处理器，同时支持模拟退火和储层计算，用于自主边缘AI的实时决策和轻量级适应


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决数字混沌动力学处理器的高计算和面积成本问题，为自主边缘AI提供实时决策和轻量级适应能力

Method: 1) 利用混沌玻尔兹曼机固有的低神经元翻转率特性，设计CBM专用调度器，减少99%的乘累加操作；2) 采用高效的乘法分割方案，减少59%的面积

Result: 在65nm工艺下实现12mm²芯片，支持同时异构任务执行，在模拟退火和储层计算领域分别实现25-54倍和4.5倍的能效提升

Conclusion: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的双模混沌动力学处理器，通过创新的调度和乘法分割技术显著降低了计算和面积成本，为边缘AI提供了高效的实时决策和适应能力

Abstract: This paper presents CBM-Dual, the first silicon-proven digital chaotic dynamics processor (CDP) supporting both simulated annealing (SA) and reservoir computing (RC). CBM-Dual enables real-time decision-making and lightweight adaptation for autonomous Edge AI, employing the largest-scale fully connected 1024-neuron chaotic Boltzmann machine (CBM). To address the high computational and area costs of digital CDPs, we propose: 1) a CBM-specific scheduler that exploits an inherently low neuron flip rate to reduce multiply-accumulate operations by 99%, and 2) an efficient multiply splitting scheme that reduces the area by 59%. Fabricated in 65nm (12mm$^2$), CBM-Dual achieves simultaneous heterogeneous task execution and state-of-the-art energy efficiency, delivering $\times$25-54 and $\times$4.5 improvements in the SA and RC fields, respectively.

</details>


### [389] [SHIELD: A Segmented Hierarchical Memory Architecture for Energy-Efficient LLM Inference on Edge NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07396)
*Jintao Zhang,Xuanyao Fong*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: SHIELD是一种生命周期感知的分段eDRAM架构，通过利用BF16激活值的时序驻留和比特级敏感性，显著降低LLM在边缘NPU上的eDRAM刷新能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘NPU上LLM推理受限于片上内存容量，高密度eDRAM适合存储激活工作空间，但其周期性刷新消耗大量能量。现有工作主要关注减少片外流量或优化持久性KV缓存的刷新，而忽略了瞬态且容错的查询和注意力输出激活。

Method: 提出SHIELD架构，将BF16激活值的符号和指数字段与尾数分离，对瞬态QO尾数禁用刷新，对持久性KV尾数应用宽松刷新，利用激活值的生命周期特性和比特级敏感性。

Result: 在多种LLM和推理场景下，SHIELD相比标准刷新基线将eDRAM刷新能耗降低了35%，同时在WikiText-2、PIQA和ARC-Easy基准测试上保持了准确性。

Conclusion: SHIELD通过生命周期感知的分段eDRAM架构，有效解决了边缘NPU上LLM推理的eDRAM刷新能耗问题，为高效边缘AI推理提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) inference on edge Neural Processing Units (NPUs) is fundamentally constrained by limited on-chip memory capacity. Although high-density embedded DRAM (eDRAM) is attractive for storing activation workspaces, its periodic refresh consumes substantial energy. Prior work has primarily focused on reducing off-chip traffic or optimizing refresh for persistent Key-Value (KV) caches, while transient and error-resilient Query and Attention Output (QO) activations are largely overlooked. We propose SHIELD, a lifecycle-aware segmented eDRAM architecture that jointly exploits temporal residency and bit-level sensitivity in bfloat16 (BF16) activations. SHIELD isolates the sign and exponent fields from the mantissa, disables refresh for transient QO mantissas, and applies relaxed refresh to persistent KV mantissas. Across multiple LLMs and inference scenarios, SHIELD reduces eDRAM refresh energy by 35% relative to a standard-refresh baseline while preserving accuracy on WikiText-2, PIQA, and ARC-Easy.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [390] [Beyond Pessimism: Offline Learning in KL-regularized Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06738)
*Yuheng Zhang,Claire Chen,Nan Jiang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需悲观估计的离线KL正则化两人零和博弈算法，首次实现了Õ(1/n)样本复杂度，优于之前的Õ(1/√n)率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线KL正则化零和博弈方法依赖悲观值估计处理分布偏移，只能达到Õ(1/√n)统计率。需要开发更高效的算法框架来突破这一限制

Method: 基于KL正则化最佳响应的平滑性和纳什均衡的斜对称稳定性，开发了新的无悲观算法框架，并提出高效的自博弈策略优化算法

Result: 首次实现了KL正则化零和博弈的Õ(1/n)样本复杂度，且算法迭代次数与样本量呈线性关系，达到与极小极大估计器相同的快速统计率

Conclusion: 通过利用KL正则化博弈的结构特性，无需悲观估计即可实现最优的Õ(1/n)样本复杂度，为离线强化学习提供了更高效的算法框架

Abstract: We study offline learning in KL-regularized two-player zero-sum games, where policies are optimized under a KL constraint to a fixed reference policy. Prior work relies on pessimistic value estimation to handle distribution shift, yielding only $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt n)$ statistical rates. We develop a new pessimism-free algorithm and analytical framework for KL-regularized games, built on the smoothness of KL-regularized best responses and a stability property of the Nash equilibrium induced by skew symmetry. This yields the first $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ sample complexity bound for offline learning in KL-regularized zero-sum games, achieved entirely without pessimism. We further propose an efficient self-play policy optimization algorithm and prove that, with a number of iterations linear in the sample size, it achieves the same fast $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ statistical rate as the minimax estimator.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [391] [PIArena: A Platform for Prompt Injection Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08499)
*Runpeng Geng,Chenlong Yin,Yanting Wang,Ying Chen,Jinyuan Jia*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PIArena是一个统一的提示注入评估平台，解决了当前缺乏标准化评估框架的问题，通过该平台发现现有防御方法存在泛化能力有限、易受自适应攻击等关键局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前提示注入攻击研究面临关键挑战：缺乏统一的评估平台，导致难以可靠比较防御方法、理解其真实鲁棒性以及评估跨任务和基准的泛化能力。许多最初报告有效的防御方法后来被发现存在局限性。

Method: 提出了PIArena平台，这是一个统一且可扩展的提示注入评估平台，允许用户轻松集成最先进的攻击和防御方法，并在各种现有和新基准上进行评估。同时设计了基于策略的动态攻击方法，能够根据防御反馈自适应优化注入提示。

Result: 通过PIArena的综合评估，揭示了最先进防御方法的关键局限性：跨任务泛化能力有限、对自适应攻击的脆弱性，以及当注入任务与目标任务对齐时的根本性挑战。

Conclusion: PIArena填补了提示注入评估的关键空白，为社区提供了标准化评估框架，揭示了当前防御方法的实质性局限性，强调了开发更鲁棒防御方法的必要性。

Abstract: Prompt injection attacks pose serious security risks across a wide range of real-world applications. While receiving increasing attention, the community faces a critical gap: the lack of a unified platform for prompt injection evaluation. This makes it challenging to reliably compare defenses, understand their true robustness under diverse attacks, or assess how well they generalize across tasks and benchmarks. For instance, many defenses initially reported as effective were later found to exhibit limited robustness on diverse datasets and attacks. To bridge this gap, we introduce PIArena, a unified and extensible platform for prompt injection evaluation that enables users to easily integrate state-of-the-art attacks and defenses and evaluate them across a variety of existing and new benchmarks. We also design a dynamic strategy-based attack that adaptively optimizes injected prompts based on defense feedback. Through comprehensive evaluation using PIArena, we uncover critical limitations of state-of-the-art defenses: limited generalizability across tasks, vulnerability to adaptive attacks, and fundamental challenges when an injected task aligns with the target task. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/sleeepeer/PIArena.

</details>


### [392] [Securing Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Taxonomy of Attacks, Defenses, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08304)
*Yuming Xu,Mingtao Zhang,Zhuohan Ge,Haoyang Li,Nicole Hu,Jason Chen Zhang,Qing Li,Lei Chen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文提出将检索增强生成(RAG)的安全问题重新定义为外部知识访问管道的安全问题，通过建立操作边界区分LLM固有风险与RAG引入/放大的风险，并系统化分析RAG工作流程中的安全威胁与防御机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常将LLM固有风险与RAG引入的风险混为一谈，缺乏对RAG特有安全威胁的系统性分析。论文旨在明确RAG安全的核心在于外部知识访问管道的安全性，为此建立清晰的边界来区分不同风险来源。

Method: 提出操作边界概念分离LLM固有缺陷与RAG引入/放大的威胁；将RAG工作流程抽象为六个阶段；围绕三个信任边界和四个主要安全面组织文献：预检索知识污染、检索时访问操纵、下游上下文利用和知识泄露。

Result: 通过系统回顾相应攻击、防御、修复机制和评估基准，发现当前防御措施大多是被动且碎片化的。揭示了RAG安全研究中的关键差距和挑战。

Conclusion: RAG安全应关注整个知识访问生命周期的分层、边界感知保护。未来研究方向应致力于开发更系统、主动的防御机制，以应对RAG特有的安全威胁。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) significantly enhances large language models (LLMs) but introduces novel security risks through external knowledge access. While existing studies cover various RAG vulnerabilities, they often conflate inherent LLM risks with those specifically introduced by RAG. In this paper, we propose that secure RAG is fundamentally about the security of the external knowledge-access pipeline. We establish an operational boundary to separate inherent LLM flaws from RAG-introduced or RAG-amplified threats. Guided by this perspective, we abstract the RAG workflow into six stages and organize the literature around three trust boundaries and four primary security surfaces, including pre-retrieval knowledge corruption, retrieval-time access manipulation, downstream context exploitation, and knowledge exfiltration. By systematically reviewing the corresponding attacks, defenses, remediation mechanisms, and evaluation benchmarks, we reveal that current defenses remain largely reactive and fragmented. Finally, we discuss these gaps and highlight future directions toward layered, boundary-aware protection across the entire knowledge-access lifecycle.

</details>


### [393] [TADP-RME: A Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy Framework for Enhancing Reliability of Data-Driven Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08113)
*Labani Halder,Payel Sadhukhan,Sarbani Palit*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: TADP-RME框架通过自适应隐私预算和逆向流形嵌入，在异构用户信任环境下提升对抗性学习可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私方案采用固定隐私预算，导致在异构用户信任环境下无法灵活权衡效用与隐私；噪声差分隐私保留几何结构易受推理攻击

Method: 提出TADP-RME框架：1) 引入[0,1]范围的逆信任分数自适应调节隐私预算；2) 逆向流形嵌入应用非线性变换破坏局部几何关系，同时通过后处理保持正式差分隐私保证

Result: 理论分析和实验结果表明改进的隐私-效用权衡，攻击成功率降低达3.1%且无显著效用下降；框架在对抗推理攻击方面持续优于现有方法

Conclusion: TADP-RME为对抗性环境中的可靠学习提供了统一方法，通过信任自适应隐私预算和几何结构破坏增强系统可靠性

Abstract: Ensuring reliability in adversarial settings necessitates treating privacy as a foundational component of data-driven systems. While differential privacy and cryptographic protocols offer strong guarantees, existing schemes rely on a fixed privacy budget, leading to a rigid utility-privacy trade-off that fails under heterogeneous user trust. Moreover, noise-only differential privacy preserves geometric structure, which inference attacks exploit, causing privacy leakage.
  We propose TADP-RME (Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy with Reverse Manifold Embedding), a framework that enhances reliability under varying levels of user trust. It introduces an inverse trust score in the range [0,1] to adaptively modulate the privacy budget, enabling smooth transitions between utility and privacy. Additionally, Reverse Manifold Embedding applies a nonlinear transformation to disrupt local geometric relationships while preserving formal differential privacy guarantees through post-processing.
  Theoretical and empirical results demonstrate improved privacy-utility trade-offs, reducing attack success rates by up to 3.1 percent without significant utility degradation. The framework consistently outperforms existing methods against inference attacks, providing a unified approach for reliable learning in adversarial environments.

</details>


### [394] [PrivFedTalk: Privacy-Aware Federated Diffusion with Identity-Stable Adapters for Personalized Talking-Head Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08037)
*Soumya Mazumdar,Vineet Kumar Rakesh,Tapas Samanta*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PrivFedTalk是一个隐私感知的联邦学习框架，用于个性化说话头生成，结合条件潜在扩散模型和参数高效的身份适配器，通过联邦训练避免原始数据共享，保护用户隐私。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统说话头生成训练依赖集中的面部视频和语音数据集，引发严重隐私问题。个性化说话头生成中，身份特定数据高度敏感，无法跨用户或设备共享，需要隐私保护的联邦学习解决方案。

Method: 1) 共享扩散主干在客户端间联合训练，每个客户端从本地私有音视频数据学习轻量级LoRA身份适配器；2) 身份稳定联邦聚合(ISFA)使用隐私安全标量可靠性信号加权客户端更新；3) 时间去噪一致性(TDC)正则化减少帧间漂移、闪烁和身份漂移；4) 应用安全聚合和客户端级差分隐私保护适配器更新。

Result: 在多种训练和聚合条件下与FedAvg、FedProx比较，PrivFedTalk展示了稳定的联邦优化，在受限资源下成功完成端到端训练和评估，支持隐私感知个性化说话头训练在联邦环境中的可行性。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了隐私感知个性化说话头生成在联邦学习环境中的可行性，但指出需要进一步标准化评估来验证更强的组件性能、隐私-效用权衡和定性声明。

Abstract: Talking-head generation has advanced rapidly with diffusion-based generative models, but training usually depends on centralized face-video and speech datasets, raising major privacy concerns. The problem is more acute for personalized talking-head generation, where identity-specific data are highly sensitive and often cannot be pooled across users or devices. PrivFedTalk is presented as a privacy-aware federated framework for personalized talking-head generation that combines conditional latent diffusion with parameter-efficient identity adaptation. A shared diffusion backbone is trained across clients, while each client learns lightweight LoRA identity adapters from local private audio-visual data, avoiding raw data sharing and reducing communication cost. To address heterogeneous client distributions, Identity-Stable Federated Aggregation (ISFA) weights client updates using privacy-safe scalar reliability signals computed from on-device identity consistency and temporal stability estimates. Temporal-Denoising Consistency (TDC) regularization is introduced to reduce inter-frame drift, flicker, and identity drift during federated denoising. To limit update-side privacy risk, secure aggregation and client-level differential privacy are applied to adapter updates. The implementation supports both low-memory GPU execution and multi-GPU client-parallel training on heterogeneous shared hardware. Comparative experiments on the present setup across multiple training and aggregation conditions with PrivFedTalk, FedAvg, and FedProx show stable federated optimization and successful end-to-end training and evaluation under constrained resources. The results support the feasibility of privacy-aware personalized talking-head training in federated environments, while suggesting that stronger component-wise, privacy-utility, and qualitative claims need further standardized evaluation.

</details>


### [395] [TrajGuard: Streaming Hidden-state Trajectory Detection for Decoding-time Jailbreak Defense](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07727)
*Cheng Liu,Xiaolei Liu,Xingyu Li,Bangzhou Xin,Kangyi Ding*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: TrajGuard：一种基于解码时隐藏状态轨迹的免训练越狱防御框架，通过滑动窗口聚合风险信号实现实时检测，平均防御率达95%，延迟仅5.2ms/词元。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有越狱防御方法主要依赖静态检测（提示、输出或内部状态），忽略了风险在解码过程中的动态演变。这导致解码轨迹中嵌入的风险信号未被充分利用，成为当前防御系统的关键盲点。

Method: 提出TrajGuard框架：1）实证发现解码阶段关键层的隐藏状态比输入越狱提示携带更强、更稳定的风险信号；2）越狱尝试中生成的词元隐藏表示逐渐接近潜在空间中的高风险区域；3）通过滑动窗口聚合隐藏状态轨迹实时量化风险；4）仅当局部窗口内风险持续超过阈值时触发轻量级语义裁决；5）实现立即中断或约束后续解码。

Result: 在12种越狱攻击和多种开源LLM上的实验表明：1）平均防御率达到95%；2）检测延迟降至5.2ms/词元；3）误报率保持在1.5%以下；4）无需模型修改。

Conclusion: 解码过程中的隐藏状态轨迹能有效支持实时越狱检测，为无需模型修改的防御提供了有前景的方向。TrajGuard展示了利用动态解码轨迹进行风险监控的可行性，弥补了现有静态防御方法的不足。

Abstract: Existing jailbreak defense paradigms primarily rely on static detection of prompts, outputs, or internal states, often neglecting the dynamic evolution of risk during decoding. This oversight leaves risk signals embedded in decoding trajectories underutilized, constituting a critical blind spot in current defense systems. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that hidden states in critical layers during the decoding phase carry stronger and more stable risk signals than input jailbreak prompts. Specifically, the hidden representations of tokens generated during jailbreak attempts progressively approach high-risk regions in the latent space. Based on this observation, we propose TrajGuard, a training-free, decoding-time defense framework. TrajGuard aggregates hidden-state trajectories via a sliding window to quantify risk in real time, triggering a lightweight semantic adjudication only when risk within a local window persistently exceeds a threshold. This mechanism enables the immediate interruption or constraint of subsequent decoding. Extensive experiments across 12 jailbreak attacks and various open-source LLMs show that TrajGuard achieves an average defense rate of 95%. Furthermore, it reduces detection latency to 5.2 ms/token while maintaining a false positive rate below 1.5%. These results confirm that hidden-state trajectories during decoding can effectively support real-time jailbreak detection, highlighting a promising direction for defenses without model modification.

</details>


### [396] [MCP-DPT: A Defense-Placement Taxonomy and Coverage Analysis for Model Context Protocol Security](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07551)
*Mehrdad Rostamzadeh,Sidhant Narula,Nahom Birhan,Mohammad Ghasemigol,Daniel Takabi*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文对模型上下文协议（MCP）进行防御导向的安全分析，提出分层分类法，识别各架构层的攻击点和防御责任，揭示当前防御主要集中在工具层，而在主机编排、传输和供应链层存在显著安全缺口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP使LLM能够动态发现和调用第三方工具，显著扩展了智能体能力，但引入了独特的安全挑战。现有研究多为攻击导向或基准测试驱动，缺乏对MCP多参与方架构中防御责任归属的指导，这成为关键问题。

Method: 提出防御导向的MCP安全分析方法，引入分层对齐的分类法，将攻击按负责执行的架构组件组织。威胁映射到六个MCP层，识别主要和次要防御点，支持在对手控制工具、服务器或生态系统组件情况下的深度防御推理。

Result: 现有学术和行业防御在该框架中的结构化映射显示保护不均衡且主要集中在工具层，而在主机编排、传输和供应链层存在持续缺口。这些发现表明许多MCP安全弱点源于架构错位而非孤立的实现缺陷。

Conclusion: MCP的安全弱点主要源于架构设计中的防御责任错位，而非单一实现问题。需要更均衡的防御策略，特别是在主机编排、传输和供应链层，以建立有效的深度防御体系。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables large language models (LLMs) to dynamically discover and invoke third-party tools, significantly expanding agent capabilities while introducing a distinct security landscape. Unlike prompt-only interactions, MCP exposes pre-execution artifacts, shared context, multi-turn workflows, and third-party supply chains to adversarial influence across independently operated components. While recent work has identified MCP-specific attacks and evaluated defenses, existing studies are largely attack-centric or benchmark-driven, providing limited guidance on where mitigation responsibility should reside within the MCP architecture. This is problematic given MCP's multi-party design and distributed trust boundaries. We present a defense-placement-oriented security analysis of MCP, introducing a layer-aligned taxonomy that organizes attacks by the architectural component responsible for enforcement. Threats are mapped across six MCP layers, and primary and secondary defense points are identified to support principled defense-in-depth reasoning under adversaries controlling tools, servers, or ecosystem components. A structured mapping of existing academic and industry defenses onto this framework reveals uneven and predominantly tool-centric protection, with persistent gaps at the host orchestration, transport, and supply-chain layers. These findings suggest that many MCP security weaknesses stem from architectural misalignment rather than isolated implementation flaws.

</details>


### [397] [DDP-SA: Scalable Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning via Distributed Differential Privacy and Secure Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07125)
*Wenjing Wei,Farid Nait-Abdesselam,Alla Jammine*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: DDP-SA是一个结合本地差分隐私和加法秘密共享的联邦学习隐私保护框架，通过两阶段保护机制提供更强的端到端隐私保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习隐私保护方法要么仅依赖差分隐私，要么仅依赖安全多方计算，无法同时提供强隐私保证和实用性。需要一种既能保护个体客户端数据隐私，又能在计算上可行的综合解决方案。

Method: 提出两阶段保护机制：1) 客户端使用校准的拉普拉斯噪声扰动本地梯度；2) 将噪声梯度分解为加法秘密共享份额，分发给多个中间服务器。参数服务器仅能重构聚合的噪声梯度，无法获取任何客户端特定贡献。

Result: 实验表明DDP-SA比单独使用本地差分隐私获得显著更高的模型精度，同时比仅使用安全多方计算的方法提供更强的隐私保护。框架参与者数量呈线性扩展，计算和通信开销可控。

Conclusion: DDP-SA通过整合差分隐私和安全多方计算，为联邦学习应用提供了一个实用、可扩展的隐私保护解决方案，在保持计算效率的同时提供更强的端到端隐私保证。

Abstract: This article presents DDP-SA, a scalable privacy-preserving federated learning framework that jointly leverages client-side local differential privacy (LDP) and full-threshold additive secret sharing (ASS) for secure aggregation. Unlike existing methods that rely solely on differential privacy or on secure multi-party computation (MPC), DDP-SA integrates both techniques to deliver stronger end-to-end privacy guarantees while remaining computationally practical. The framework introduces a two-stage protection mechanism: clients first perturb their local gradients with calibrated Laplace noise, then decompose the noisy gradients into additive secret shares that are distributed across multiple intermediate servers. This design ensures that (i) no single compromised server or communication channel can reveal any information about individual client updates, and (ii) the parameter server reconstructs only the aggregated noisy gradient, never any client-specific contribution. Extensive experiments show that DDP-SA achieves substantially higher model accuracy than standalone LDP while providing stronger privacy protection than MPC-only approaches. The proposed framework scales linearly with the number of participants and offers a practical, privacy-preserving solution for federated learning applications with controllable computational and communication overhead.

</details>


### [398] [Private Seeds, Public LLMs: Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07486)
*Qian Ma,Sarah Rajtmajer*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: RPSG是一种利用差分隐私和私有种子生成真实且隐私保护的合成文本数据的方法，在隐私保护和数据保真度之间取得了良好平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型已成为合成数据生成的有力工具，但生成包含个人信息的私有文本副本时，需要在隐私保护和数据效用之间取得平衡。现有方法难以同时保证数据真实性和隐私保护。

Method: 提出RPSG方法，结合隐私保护机制（包括形式化差分隐私）和私有种子（包含个人信息的文本），生成真实的合成数据。该方法利用大语言模型的能力，通过隐私保护机制处理私有数据。

Result: 与最先进的私有合成数据生成方法相比，RPSG在保持对私有数据高保真度的同时，提供了强大的隐私保护。综合实验验证了该方法在隐私和效用方面的优越性能。

Conclusion: RPSG方法成功解决了私有文本数据合成中的隐私-效用权衡问题，为生成真实且隐私保护的合成数据提供了一种有效解决方案，在隐私保护和数据保真度方面均表现出色。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for synthetic data generation. A particularly important use case is producing synthetic replicas of private text, which requires carefully balancing privacy and utility. We propose Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation (RPSG), which leverages privacy-preserving mechanisms, including formal differential privacy (DP); and private seeds, in particular text containing personal information, to generate realistic synthetic data. Comprehensive experiments against state-of-the-art private synthetic data generation methods demonstrate that RPSG achieves high fidelity to private data while providing strong privacy protection.

</details>


### [399] [Data Leakage in Automotive Perception: Practitioners' Insights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06899)
*Md Abu Ahammed Babu,Sushant Kumar Pandey,Darko Durisic,Andras Balint,Miroslaw Staron*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该研究通过访谈汽车感知功能开发工程师，探讨工业实践中数据泄漏的认知、检测与缓解策略，发现知识分布碎片化且依赖角色经验，提出泄漏控制是跨角色的社会技术协调问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据泄漏在机器学习安全关键系统（如汽车感知）中构成严重风险，但工业实践者对数据泄漏的认知和管理方式缺乏了解。研究旨在探索从业者在实际工作中对数据泄漏的知识、经验和缓解策略。

Method: 采用定性研究方法，对10名从事汽车感知功能开发的系统设计、开发和验证工程师进行半结构化访谈，使用反思性主题分析（reflexive thematic analysis）分析访谈数据。

Result: 研究发现：1）数据泄漏知识广泛存在但碎片化，ML工程师将其视为数据分割或验证问题，设计和验证角色则从代表性和场景覆盖角度理解；2）检测主要通过通用考虑和性能异常观察，而非特定工具；3）预防更常见，主要依赖经验和知识共享；4）泄漏控制是跨角色和工作流程的社会技术协调问题。

Conclusion: 数据泄漏控制需要共享定义、可追溯的数据实践和持续的跨角色沟通，以在汽车ML开发中制度化数据泄漏意识，提升ML可靠性工程。

Abstract: Data leakage is the inadvertent transfer of information between training and evaluation datasets that poses a subtle, yet critical, risk to the reliability of machine learning (ML) models in safety-critical systems such as automotive perception. While leakage is widely recognized in research, little is known about how industrial practitioners actually perceive and manage it in practice. This study investigates practitioners' knowledge, experiences, and mitigation strategies around data leakage through ten semi-structured interviews with system design, development, and verification engineers working on automotive perception functions development. Using reflexive thematic analysis, we identify that knowledge of data leakage is widespread and fragmented along role boundaries: ML engineers conceptualize it as a data-splitting or validation issue, whereas design and verification roles interpret it in terms of representativeness and scenario coverage. Detection commonly arises through generic considerations and observed performance anomalies rather than implying specific tools. However, data leakage prevention is more commonly practiced, which depends mostly on experience and knowledge sharing. These findings suggest that leakage control is a socio-technical coordination problem distributed across roles and workflows. We discuss implications for ML reliability engineering, highlighting the need for shared definitions, traceable data practices, and continuous cross-role communication to institutionalize data leakage awareness within automotive ML development.

</details>


### [400] [FedDetox: Robust Federated SLM Alignment via On-Device Data Sanitization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06833)
*Shunan Zhu,Jiawei Chen,Yonghao Yu,Hideya Ochiai*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: FedDetox：针对资源受限边缘设备上小型语言模型的联邦学习安全对齐框架，通过知识蒸馏和拒绝模板替换来防止意外数据中毒


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量公共数据稀缺时，联邦学习成为利用私有用户数据的重要途径，但现实客户端数据常包含有毒或不安全信息，导致"意外数据中毒"问题，严重损害联邦对齐过程中全局模型的安全对齐

Method: 1. 使用知识蒸馏将大规模安全对齐教师模型的复杂安全对齐能力转移到适合资源受限边缘设备的轻量级学生分类器；2. 在人类偏好对齐的联邦学习过程中，边缘客户端在源头识别不安全样本，并用拒绝模板替换，将潜在毒药转化为积极安全信号

Result: 实验表明，该方法在不损害通用效用的前提下，保持了与集中式基线相当水平的模型安全性

Conclusion: FedDetox为资源受限边缘设备上的小型语言模型提供了一种有效的联邦学习安全对齐框架，成功解决了意外数据中毒问题，平衡了安全性和实用性

Abstract: As high quality public data becomes scarce, Federated Learning (FL) provides a vital pathway to leverage valuable private user data while preserving privacy. However, real-world client data often contains toxic or unsafe information. This leads to a critical issue we define as unintended data poisoning, which can severely damage the safety alignment of global models during federated alignment. To address this, we propose FedDetox, a robust framework tailored for Small Language Models (SLMs) on resource-constrained edge devices. We first employ knowledge distillation to transfer sophisticated safety alignment capabilities from large scale safety aligned teacher models into light weight student classifiers suitable for resource constrained edge devices. Specifically, during federated learning for human preference alignment, the edge client identifies unsafe samples at the source and replaces them with refusal templates, effectively transforming potential poisons into positive safety signals. Experiments demonstrate that our approach preserves model safety at a level comparable to centralized baselines without compromising general utility.

</details>


### [401] [Towards Privacy-Preserving Large Language Model: Text-free Inference Through Alignment and Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06831)
*Jeongho Yoon,Chanhee Park,Yongchan Chun,Hyeonseok Moon,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PPFT是一种隐私保护微调方法，通过客户端编码和服务器端投影模块，避免传输原始文本，在隐私保护和模型性能间取得平衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM服务需要用户提交原始文本，存在隐私泄露风险（个人、医疗、法律信息）。现有防御方法计算开销大且降低模型性能，需要在隐私保护与效率之间取得平衡。

Method: PPFT采用两阶段训练：1) 训练客户端编码器与服务器端投影模块和LLM，使服务器基于k-pooled提示嵌入而非原始文本；2) 在私有领域特定数据上使用噪声注入嵌入微调投影模块和LLM，无需暴露明文提示或访问解码器内部参数。

Result: 在领域特定和通用基准测试中，PPFT在隐私保护与模型效用间取得显著平衡，与无噪声上限相比性能下降最小，保持竞争力。

Conclusion: PPFT通过消除传输原始文本的需求，为客户端和服务提供商提供了隐私保护与模型效用的有利平衡，解决了现有方法的隐私-效率权衡问题。

Abstract: Current LLM-based services typically require users to submit raw text regardless of its sensitivity. While intuitive, such practice introduces substantial privacy risks, as unauthorized access may expose personal, medical, or legal information. Although prior defenses strived to mitigate these risks, they often incur substantial computational overhead and degrade model performance. To overcome this privacy-efficiency trade-off, we introduce Privacy-Preserving Fine-Tuning (PPFT), a novel training pipeline that eliminates the need for transmitting raw prompt text while maintaining a favorable balance between privacy preservation and model utility for both clients and service providers. Our approach operates in two stages: first, we train a client-side encoder together with a server-side projection module and LLM, enabling the server to condition on k-pooled prompt embeddings instead of raw text; second, we fine-tune the projection module and LLM on private, domain-specific data using noise-injected embeddings, allowing effective adaptation without exposing plain text prompts and requiring access to the decoder's internal parameters. Extensive experiments on domain-specific and general benchmarks demonstrate that PPFT achieves a striking balance between privacy and utility, maintaining competitive performance with minimal degradation compared to noise-free upper bounds.

</details>


### [402] [SkillTrojan: Backdoor Attacks on Skill-Based Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06811)
*Yunhao Feng,Yifan Ding,Yingshui Tan,Boren Zheng,Yanming Guo,Xiaolong Li,Kun Zhai,Yishan Li,Wenke Huang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SkillTrojan是一种针对技能型智能体系统的后门攻击，通过将恶意逻辑嵌入看似正常的技能中，利用技能组合重构并执行攻击者指定的有效载荷，攻击成功率高且对正常任务影响小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 技能型智能体系统通过组合可重用技能来处理复杂任务，提高了模块化和可扩展性，但同时也引入了尚未被充分研究的安全攻击面。当前的安全研究主要关注模型参数或训练数据层面的攻击，而忽略了技能实现层面的安全风险。

Method: SkillTrojan攻击将加密的有效载荷分割到多个看似正常的技能调用中，仅在预定义触发条件下激活。该方法支持从任意技能模板自动合成后门技能，实现跨技能型智能体生态系统的可扩展传播。攻击针对技能实现而非模型参数或训练数据。

Result: 在EHR SQL任务上，SkillTrojan实现了高达97.2%的攻击成功率，同时在GPT-5.2-1211-Global上保持了89.3%的正常任务准确率。研究发布了包含3000多个精心策划的后门技能的数据集，涵盖多种技能模式和触发-有效载荷配置。

Conclusion: 技能层面的后门攻击具有高度有效性且对正常行为影响最小，暴露了当前技能型智能体架构的关键盲点。这促使需要开发能够明确推理技能组合和执行过程的防御机制，以应对这一新兴的安全威胁。

Abstract: Skill-based agent systems tackle complex tasks by composing reusable skills, improving modularity and scalability while introducing a largely unexamined security attack surface. We propose SkillTrojan, a backdoor attack that targets skill implementations rather than model parameters or training data. SkillTrojan embeds malicious logic inside otherwise plausible skills and leverages standard skill composition to reconstruct and execute an attacker-specified payload. The attack partitions an encrypted payload across multiple benign-looking skill invocations and activates only under a predefined trigger. SkillTrojan also supports automated synthesis of backdoored skills from arbitrary skill templates, enabling scalable propagation across skill-based agent ecosystems. To enable systematic evaluation, we release a dataset of 3,000+ curated backdoored skills spanning diverse skill patterns and trigger-payload configurations. We instantiate SkillTrojan in a representative code-based agent setting and evaluate both clean-task utility and attack success rate. Our results show that skill-level backdoors can be highly effective with minimal degradation of benign behavior, exposing a critical blind spot in current skill-based agent architectures and motivating defenses that explicitly reason about skill composition and execution. Concretely, on EHR SQL, SkillTrojan attains up to 97.2% ASR while maintaining 89.3% clean ACC on GPT-5.2-1211-Global.

</details>


<div id='cs.DC'></div>

# cs.DC [[Back]](#toc)

### [403] [Exploiting Aggregate Programming in a Multi-Robot Service Prototype](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06876)
*Giorgio Audrito,Andrea Basso,Daniele Bortoluzzi,Ferruccio Damiani,Giordano Scarso,Gianluca Torta*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 开发了一个采用聚合编程的多机器人服务系统原型，通过仿真和大学图书馆测试验证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统在医疗、勘探、救援等领域日益重要，但构建此类系统面临物理机器人和环境复杂性叠加分布式系统协调的挑战

Method: 采用聚合编程（AP）方法设计和实现多机器人服务系统的协调软件，利用其基于邻近通信的分布式系统工程能力

Result: 开发了一个多机器人服务系统原型，通过仿真和大学图书馆实际环境测试进行了验证

Conclusion: 聚合编程为多机器人系统协调提供了一种有前景的工程方法，能够应对物理机器人和分布式系统协调的双重复杂性

Abstract: Multi-robot systems are becoming increasingly relevant within diverse application domains, such as healthcare, exploration, and rescue missions. However, building such systems is still a significant challenge, since it adds the complexities of the physical nature of robots and their environments to those inherent in coordinating any distributed (multi-agent) system. Aggregate Programming (AP) has recently emerged as a promising approach to engineering resilient, distributed systems with proximity-based communication, and is notably supported by practical frameworks.  In this paper we present a prototype of a multi-robot service system, which adopts AP for the design and implementation of its coordination software. The prototype has been validated both with simulations, and with tests in a University library.

</details>


### [404] [LegoDiffusion: Micro-Serving Text-to-Image Diffusion Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08123)
*Lingyun Yang,Suyi Li,Tianyu Feng,Xiaoxiao Jiang,Zhipeng Di,Weiyi Lu,Kan Liu,Yinghao Yu,Tao Lan,Guodong Yang,Lin Qu,Liping Zhang,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: LegoDiffusion：将文本到图像生成工作流分解为松散耦合的模型执行节点，实现细粒度资源管理和集群级优化的微服务系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有服务系统将扩散工作流视为不透明的整体，统一配置、放置和缩放所有组成模型，这掩盖了内部数据流、阻止了模型共享，并强制实施粗粒度的资源管理

Method: 将工作流分解为松散耦合的模型执行节点，这些节点可以独立管理和调度，通过显式管理单个模型推理，实现集群级优化，包括按模型缩放、模型共享和自适应模型并行

Result: LegoDiffusion优于现有扩散工作流服务系统，能够维持高达3倍的请求率，并容忍高达8倍的突发流量

Conclusion: 微服务扩散工作流的方法通过分解工作流为独立管理的节点，解锁了集群级优化，显著提升了系统性能和弹性

Abstract: Text-to-image generation executes a diffusion workflow comprising multiple models centered on a base diffusion model. Existing serving systems treat each workflow as an opaque monolith, provisioning, placing, and scaling all constituent models together, which obscures internal dataflow, prevents model sharing, and enforces coarse-grained resource management. In this paper, we make a case for micro-serving diffusion workflows with LegoDiffusion, a system that decomposes a workflow into loosely coupled model-execution nodes that can be independently managed and scheduled. By explicitly managing individual model inference, LegoDiffusion unlocks cluster-scale optimizations, including per-model scaling, model sharing, and adaptive model parallelism. Collectively, LegoDiffusion outperforms existing diffusion workflow serving systems, sustaining up to 3x higher request rates and tolerating up to 8x higher burst traffic.

</details>


### [405] [Blink: CPU-Free LLM Inference by Delegating the Serving Stack to GPU and SmartNIC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07609)
*Mohammad Siavashi,Mariano Scazzariello,Gerald Q. Maguire,Dejan Kostić,Marco Chiesa*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Blink是一个端到端的LLM推理服务架构，通过将主机CPU从稳态推理路径中移除，将职责重新分配到SmartNIC和GPU上，解决了CPU干扰问题并提升了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM推理服务栈依赖主机CPU进行编排和令牌级控制，这使得LLM性能对CPU干扰敏感，限制了应用共置并迫使运营商预留CPU余量，导致大量容量未被利用。

Method: Blink将请求处理卸载到SmartNIC，通过RDMA直接将输入传送到GPU内存，并用持久GPU内核替代主机驱动的调度，该内核无需CPU参与即可执行批处理、调度和KV缓存管理。

Result: 相比TensorRT-LLM、vLLM和SGLang，Blink在隔离环境下将预饱和P99 TTFT降低达8.47倍，P99 TPOT降低达3.40倍，解码吞吐量提升达2.1倍，每令牌能耗降低达48.6%。在CPU干扰下，Blink保持稳定性能，而现有系统性能下降可达两个数量级。

Conclusion: Blink通过将CPU从关键路径中移除，显著提升了LLM推理服务的性能、稳定性和能效，同时增强了系统对CPU干扰的鲁棒性，为数据中心LLM服务提供了更高效的架构方案。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) inference is rapidly becoming a core datacenter service, yet current serving stacks keep the host CPU on the critical path for orchestration and token-level control. This makes LLM performance sensitive to CPU interference, undermining application colocation and forcing operators to reserve CPU headroom, leaving substantial capacity unutilized.
  We introduce Blink, an end-to-end serving architecture that removes the host CPU from the steady-state inference path by redistributing responsibilities across a SmartNIC and a GPU. Blink offloads request handling to the SmartNIC, which delivers inputs directly into GPU memory via RDMA, and replaces host-driven scheduling with a persistent GPU kernel that performs batching, scheduling, and KV-cache management without CPU involvement.
  Evaluated against TensorRT-LLM, vLLM, and SGLang, Blink outperforms all baselines even in isolation, reducing pre-saturation P99 TTFT by up to 8.47$\times$ and P99 TPOT by up to 3.40$\times$, improving decode throughput by up to 2.1$\times$, and reducing energy per token by up to 48.6$\%$. Under CPU interference, Blink maintains stable performance, while existing systems degrade by up to two orders of magnitude.

</details>


### [406] [NestPipe: Large-Scale Recommendation Training on 1,500+ Accelerators via Nested Pipelining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06956)
*Zhida Jiang,Zhaolong Xing,Huichao Chai,Tianxing Sun,Qiang Peng,Baopeng Yuan,Jiaxing Wang,Hua Du,Zhixin Wu,Xuemiao Li,Yikui Cao,Xinyu Liu,Yongxiang Feng,Zhen Chen,Ke Zhang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: NestPipe是一个大规模去中心化嵌入训练框架，通过嵌套流水线技术解决万亿参数推荐模型训练中的数据移动瓶颈，同时保持同步训练语义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着推荐模型参数增长到万亿级别，集群规模扩展到O(1k)时，分布式训练瓶颈从计算和内存转移到数据移动，特别是嵌入查找和通信延迟。现有解决方案要么只优化一个瓶颈，要么通过牺牲训练一致性来提高吞吐量。

Method: NestPipe采用嵌套流水线技术，利用两个层次稀疏并行机会：1) 批间级：通过双缓冲同步构建无陈旧五级流水线(DBP)，缓解查找瓶颈；2) 批内级：基于嵌入冻结现象，通过协调流调度和以键为中心的样本聚类(FWP)，将All2All通信与密集计算重叠。

Result: 在1,536个工作节点的生产GPU和NPU集群上的实验表明，NestPipe实现了最高3.06倍的加速和94.07%的扩展效率。

Conclusion: NestPipe通过创新的嵌套流水线设计，同时解决了大规模推荐模型训练中的查找和通信瓶颈，同时保持了同步训练语义，显著提升了训练效率。

Abstract: Modern recommendation models have increased to trillions of parameters. As cluster scales expand to O(1k), distributed training bottlenecks shift from computation and memory to data movement, especially lookup and communication latency associated with embeddings. Existing solutions either optimize only one bottleneck or improve throughput by sacrificing training consistency. This paper presents NestPipe, a large-scale decentralized embedding training framework that tackles both bottlenecks while preserving synchronous training semantics.
