NestPipe exploits two hierarchical sparse parallelism opportunities through nested pipelining. At the inter-batch level, Dual-Buffer Pipelining (DBP) constructs a staleness-free five-stage pipeline through dual-buffer synchronization, mitigating lookup bottlenecks without embedding staleness. At the intra-batch level, we identify the embedding freezing phenomenon, which inspires Frozen-Window Pipelining (FWP) to overlap All2All communication with dense computation via coordinated stream scheduling and key-centric sample clustering. Experiments on production GPU and NPU clusters with 1,536 workers demonstrate that NestPipe achieves up to 3.06x speedup and 94.07% scaling efficiency.

</details>


### [407] [CodecSight: Leveraging Video Codec Signals for Efficient Streaming VLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06036)
*Yulin Zou,Yan Chen,Wenyan Chen,JooYoung Park,Shivaraman Nitin,Luo Tao,Francisco Romero,Dmitrii Ustiugov*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: CodecSight：基于视频编解码元数据的流式视频分析系统，利用压缩过程中的时空结构信息统一优化视频解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充，无需离线训练即可显著降低计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频流分析是视觉语言模型服务的关键工作负载，但多模态推理的高成本限制了可扩展性。现有系统虽然利用视频流中的时空冗余来降低推理成本，但要么针对视觉Transformer（ViT），要么针对LLM，缺乏端到端优化。此外，现有方法识别冗余的开销较大，需要离线分析训练或昂贵的在线计算，不适合动态实时流。

Method: CodecSight基于关键观察：视频编解码器在压缩过程中已提取了流的时空结构作为副产品。系统将编解码元数据作为低成本运行时信号，统一优化视频解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充。具体包括：1）在ViT编码前进行编解码引导的补丁剪枝；2）在LLM预填充期间选择性刷新键值缓存。所有操作完全在线，无需离线训练。

Result: 实验显示，CodecSight相比最先进的基线方法，吞吐量提升最高达3倍，GPU计算减少最高达87%，同时保持竞争性精度，F1分数仅下降0~8%。

Conclusion: CodecSight通过利用视频编解码元数据作为低成本运行时信号，实现了端到端的视频流分析优化，显著提升了系统效率，同时保持了可接受的精度损失，为实时视频分析提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Video streaming analytics is a crucial workload for vision-language model serving, but the high cost of multimodal inference limits scalability. Prior systems reduce inference cost by exploiting temporal and spatial redundancy in video streams, but they target either the vision transformer (ViT) or the LLM with a limited view, leaving end-to-end opportunities untapped. Moreover, existing methods incur significant overhead to identify redundancy, either through offline profiling and training or costly online computation, making them ill-suited for dynamic real-time streams.
  We present CodecSight, a codec-guided streaming video analytics system, built on a key observation that video codecs already extract the temporal and spatial structure of each stream as a byproduct of compression. CodecSight treats this codec metadata as a low-cost runtime signal to unify optimization across video decoding, visual processing, and LLM prefilling, with transmission reduction as an inherent benefit of operating directly on compressed bitstreams. This drives codec-guided patch pruning before ViT encoding and selective key-value cache refresh during LLM prefilling, both of which are fully online and do not require offline training. Experiments show that CodecSight achieves an improvement in throughput of up to 3$\times$, and a reduction of up to 87% in GPU compute over state-of-the-art baselines, maintaining competitive accuracy with only 0$\sim$8% F1 drop.

</details>


### [408] [Foundry: Template-Based CUDA Graph Context Materialization for Fast LLM Serving Cold Start](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06664)
*Xueshen Liu,Yongji Wu,Yuncheng Yao,Danyang Zhuo,Ion Stoica,Z. Morley Mao*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Foundry是一个模板化的CUDA图上下文物化系统，通过离线处理阶段持久化图拓扑和执行上下文，在线重建可执行图，将Qwen3-235B-A22B的冷启动时间从10分钟减少到3.9秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM服务提供商依赖自动扩缩容和并行重新配置来应对快速变化的工作负载，但冷启动延迟仍然是主要瓶颈。虽然现有系统已将模型权重加载减少到秒级，但CUDA图捕获仍需要数十秒到数分钟，通常主导启动时间。CUDA图无法简单序列化，因为它们紧密耦合到执行上下文，包括嵌入内核参数的设备地址和热启动期间惰性加载的内核代码。

Method: Foundry采用模板化的CUDA图上下文物化系统，在离线处理阶段持久化图拓扑和执行上下文，在线重建可执行图。系统强制执行确定性内存布局，自动提取和重新加载捕获图所需的内核二进制文件，并通过基于拓扑的模板化减少在线重建成本。对于分布式服务，Foundry通过单个GPU离线捕获生成多GPU部署模板，仅修补与rank相关的通信状态。

Result: 在高达235B参数的密集和MoE模型上，Foundry将冷启动延迟减少高达99%，将Qwen3-235B-A22B的初始化时间从10分钟减少到3.9秒，同时保持CUDA图的吞吐量增益。

Conclusion: Foundry通过模板化的CUDA图上下文物化有效解决了LLM服务中的冷启动瓶颈，显著减少了初始化时间，同时保持了CUDA图的性能优势，为动态工作负载下的高效LLM服务提供了解决方案。

Abstract: Modern LLM service providers increasingly rely on autoscaling and parallelism reconfiguration to respond to rapidly changing workloads, but cold-start latency remains a major bottleneck. While recent systems have reduced model weight loading to seconds, CUDA graph capture still takes tens of seconds to minutes and often dominates startup. Unfortunately, CUDA graphs cannot be naively serialized: beyond graph topology, they are tightly coupled to execution context, including device addresses embedded in kernel arguments and kernel code lazily loaded during warmup. Existing approaches either rely on brittle kernel-specific patching or heavyweight process-level checkpoint/restore that are inflexible to dynamic parallelism switching. We present Foundry, a template-based CUDA graph context materialization system that persists both graph topology and execution context during an offline processing stage, and reconstructs executable graphs online with negligible overhead. Foundry enforces deterministic memory layouts, automatically extracts and reloads kernel binaries required by captured graphs, and reduces online reconstruction costs through topology-based templating. For distributed serving, Foundry further enables a single-GPU offline capture to generate templates for multi-GPU deployments by patching only rank-dependent communication state. Across dense and MoE models up to 235B parameters, Foundry reduces cold-start latency by up to 99%, cutting the initialization time of Qwen3-235B-A22B from 10 minutes to 3.9 seconds while preserving the throughput gains of CUDA graphs.

</details>


### [409] [DynLP: Parallel Dynamic Batch Update for Label Propagation in Semi-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06596)
*S M Shovan,Arindam Khanda,S M Ferdous,Sajal K. Das,Mahantesh Halappanavar*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: DynLP：一种GPU中心的动态批处理并行标签传播算法，用于图半监督学习的增量更新，避免全图重计算，实现13-102倍加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中数据通常以增量批次到达，传统标签传播算法每次新批次到达时重新计算所有标签是冗余、计算密集且低效的，缺乏高效的标签传播更新方法

Method: 提出DynLP算法，仅执行必要的更新，将变化传播到相关子图而不需要完全重新计算，利用GPU架构优化实现动态批处理并行标签传播

Result: 在大规模数据集上，相比最先进方法平均实现13倍加速，最高可达102倍加速

Conclusion: DynLP算法有效解决了图半监督学习中增量数据场景下的标签传播效率问题，通过GPU优化和局部更新策略显著提升了计算性能

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning aims to infer class labels using only a small fraction of labeled data. In graph-based semi-supervised learning, this is typically achieved through label propagation to predict labels of unlabeled nodes. However, in real-world applications, data often arrive incrementally in batches. Each time a new batch appears, reapplying the traditional label propagation algorithm to recompute all labels is redundant, computationally intensive, and inefficient. To address the absence of an efficient label propagation update method, we propose DynLP, a novel GPU-centric Dynamic Batched Parallel Label Propagation algorithm that performs only the necessary updates, propagating changes to the relevant subgraph without requiring full recalculation. By exploiting GPU architectural optimizations, our algorithm achieves on average 13x and upto 102x speedup on large-scale datasets compared to state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [410] [From Gaze to Guidance: Interpreting and Adapting to Users' Cognitive Needs with Multimodal Gaze-Aware AI Assistants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08062)
*Valdemar Danry,Javier Hernandez,Andrew Wilson,Pattie Maes,Judith Amores*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 基于眼动追踪的多模态LLM助手，通过注视点分析识别用户阅读困难，提供针对性帮助，相比纯文本LLM在准确性和信息回忆方面表现更优


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM助手在回答问题时功能强大，但缺乏对用户行为上下文的理解，无法准确识别用户何时何地遇到困难。需要利用眼动追踪等行为数据来增强LLM对用户认知状态的理解能力。

Method: 提出了一种基于注视点的多模态LLM助手，使用自我中心视角视频叠加注视点数据来识别用户可能的困难点，并针对性地提供回顾性帮助。通过控制实验（n=36）比较了注视感知AI助手与纯文本LLM助手的表现。

Result: 相比传统LLM助手，注视感知助手在评估用户阅读行为方面被评定为显著更准确和个性化，显著提高了用户的信息回忆能力。用户与注视感知助手交流时使用的词语显著减少，表明交互效率更高。定性结果显示了在理解方面的感知益处，但也指出了注视行为解释不准确时的挑战。

Conclusion: 注视感知的LLM助手能够推理用户的认知需求，从而改善用户的认知结果。该研究表明将行为数据（特别是眼动追踪）整合到AI助手中可以显著提升其理解用户状态和提供针对性帮助的能力。

Abstract: Current LLM assistants are powerful at answering questions, but they have limited access to the behavioral context that reveals when and where a user is struggling. We present a gaze-grounded multimodal LLM assistant that uses egocentric video with gaze overlays to identify likely points of difficulty and target follow-up retrospective assistance. We instantiate this vision in a controlled study (n=36) comparing the gaze-aware AI assistant to a text-only LLM assistant. Compared to a conventional LLM assistant, the gaze-aware assistant was rated as significantly more accurate and personalized in its assessments of users' reading behavior and significantly improved people's ability to recall information. Users spoke significantly fewer words with the gaze-aware assistant, indicating more efficient interactions. Qualitative results underscored both perceived benefits in comprehension and challenges when interpretations of gaze behaviors were inaccurate. Our findings suggest that gaze-aware LLM assistants can reason about cognitive needs to improve cognitive outcomes of users.

</details>


### [411] [BATON: A Multimodal Benchmark for Bidirectional Automation Transition Observation in Naturalistic Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07263)
*Yuhang Wang,Yiyao Xu,Chaoyun Yang,Lingyao Li,Jingran Sun,Hao Zhou*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: BATON数据集填补了自动驾驶控制转移预测的数据空白，包含多模态驾驶数据，研究表明视觉输入不足以可靠预测控制转移，需要结合车辆信号和路线环境信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有驾驶自动化系统要求驾驶员决定何时启用DA并保持持续注意力，这需要大量情境判断并带来显著认知负荷，导致陡峭的学习曲线、次优用户体验以及过度依赖和延迟接管的安全风险。预测驾驶员何时将控制权交给DA以及何时收回控制权对于设计主动、情境感知的HMI至关重要，但现有数据集很少捕获多模态情境信息。

Method: 引入BATON大规模自然驾驶数据集，包含127名驾驶员和136.6小时驾驶数据，同步采集前视视频、车内视频、解码的CAN总线信号、雷达前车交互数据和GPS路线环境信息，形成围绕每个控制转移的闭环多模态记录。定义了三个基准任务：驾驶动作理解、交接预测和接管预测，并评估了序列模型、经典分类器和零样本VLM等基线方法。

Result: 结果表明，仅视觉输入不足以可靠预测控制转移：前视视频捕获道路环境但无法反映驾驶员状态，车内视频反映驾驶员准备状态但无法捕捉外部场景。结合CAN和路线环境信号显著提高了性能，表明各模态之间存在强互补性。接管事件发展更渐进，受益于更长的预测时间范围，而交接事件更依赖即时情境线索，揭示了直接影响辅助驾驶系统HMI设计的不对称性。

Conclusion: BATON数据集填补了自动驾驶控制转移预测的多模态数据空白，研究揭示了不同控制转移类型的时间动态差异，强调了多模态融合对于可靠预测的重要性，为设计更智能、主动的HMI提供了重要见解。

Abstract: Existing driving automation (DA) systems on production vehicles rely on human drivers to decide when to engage DA while requiring them to remain continuously attentive and ready to intervene. This design demands substantial situational judgment and imposes significant cognitive load, leading to steep learning curves, suboptimal user experience, and safety risks from both over-reliance and delayed takeover. Predicting when drivers hand over control to DA and when they take it back is therefore critical for designing proactive, context-aware HMI, yet existing datasets rarely capture the multimodal context, including road scene, driver state, vehicle dynamics, and route environment. To fill this gap, we introduce BATON, a large-scale naturalistic dataset capturing real-world DA usage across 127 drivers, and 136.6 hours of driving. The dataset synchronizes front-view video, in-cabin video, decoded CAN bus signals, radar-based lead-vehicle interaction, and GPS-derived route context, forming a closed-loop multimodal record around each control transition. We define three benchmark tasks: driving action understanding, handover prediction, and takeover prediction, and evaluate baselines spanning sequence models, classical classifiers, and zero-shot VLMs. Results show that visual input alone is insufficient for reliable transition prediction: front-view video captures road context but not driver state, while in-cabin video reflects driver readiness but not the external scene. Incorporating CAN and route-context signals substantially improves performance over video-only settings, indicating strong complementarity across modalities. We further find takeover events develop more gradually and benefit from longer prediction horizons, whereas handover events depend more on immediate contextual cues, revealing an asymmetry with direct implications for HMI design in assisted driving systems.

</details>


### [412] [Generative Experiences for Digital Mental Health Interventions: Evidence from a Randomized Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07558)
*Ananya Bhattacharjee,Michael Liut,Matthew Jörke,Diyi Yang,Emma Brunskill*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: GUIDE系统通过运行时生成个性化干预内容和多模态交互结构，在数字心理健康领域引入"生成式体验"范式，显著降低压力并改善用户体验


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数字心理健康工具主要关注提供什么支持内容，但忽略了如何让用户体验这些支持。即使内容匹配，如果交互形式与用户参与方式不匹配，干预仍可能失败。需要一种能够动态适应用户互动偏好的干预体验生成方法。

Method: 提出"生成式体验"范式，开发GUIDE系统，通过规则引导的模块化组件生成，在运行时动态组合个性化干预内容和多模态交互结构。系统使用基于LLM的认知重构作为对照组。

Result: 在237名参与者的预注册研究中，GUIDE相比LLM对照组显著降低压力水平(p=0.02)并改善用户体验(p=0.04)。系统支持通过多样化交互流程实现不同形式的反思和行动，同时揭示了交互序列个性化中的张力。

Conclusion: 生成式体验范式为数字心理健康干预开辟了新方向，使支持体验能够动态适应用户互动偏好。GUIDE系统展示了在数字环境中动态塑造支持体验和执行方式的基础框架。

Abstract: Digital mental health (DMH) tools have extensively explored personalization of interventions to users' needs and contexts. However, this personalization often targets what support is provided, not how it is experienced. Even well-matched content can fail when the interaction format misaligns with how someone can engage. We introduce generative experience as a paradigm for DMH support, where the intervention experience is composed at runtime. We instantiate this in GUIDE, a system that generates personalized intervention content and multimodal interaction structure through rubric-guided generation of modular components. In a preregistered study with N = 237 participants, GUIDE significantly reduced stress (p = .02) and improved the user experience (p = .04) compared to an LLM-based cognitive restructuring control. GUIDE also supported diverse forms of reflection and action through varied interaction flows, while revealing tensions around personalization across the interaction sequence. This work lays the foundation for interventions that dynamically shape how support is experienced and enacted in digital settings.

</details>


### [413] [Mixed-Initiative Context: Structuring and Managing Context for Human-AI Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07121)
*Haichang Li,Qinshi Zhang,Piaohong Wang,Zhicong Lu*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 提出Mixed-Initiative Context概念，将多轮交互形成的上下文重构为显式、结构化、可操作的对象，实现动态组织和管理，并通过Contextify系统进行用户研究验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机协作中，多轮交互形成的上下文通常被扁平化为时间序列并作为固定整体处理，缺乏沿工作流的动态组织管理机制。这些上下文在生命周期、结构层次和相关性上差异很大，临时或废弃的交流、并行话题线程会干扰推理，同时用户只能通过输入修改间接影响上下文，缺乏明确可控性。

Method: 提出Mixed-Initiative Context概念，将上下文重构为显式、结构化、可操作的交互对象。实现Contextify探测系统，通过用户研究探索用户上下文管理行为、对AI主动性的态度以及整体协作体验。

Result: 通过Contextify系统进行用户研究，探索了用户在人机协作中的上下文管理行为模式，分析了用户对AI主动性的接受程度，评估了Mixed-Initiative Context概念对协作体验的影响。

Conclusion: Mixed-Initiative Context概念允许根据任务需求动态组织和调整上下文的结构、范围和内容，使人类和AI都能积极参与上下文构建和调节。该研究对人机交互社区具有重要启示意义。

Abstract: In the human-AI collaboration area, the context formed naturally through multi-turn interactions is typically flattened into a chronological sequence and treated as a fixed whole in subsequent reasoning, with no mechanism for dynamic organization and management along the collaboration workflow. Yet these contexts differ substantially in lifecycle, structural hierarchy, and relevance. For instance, temporary or abandoned exchanges and parallel topic threads persist in the limited context window, causing interference and even conflict. Meanwhile, users are largely limited to influencing context indirectly through input modifications (e.g., corrections, references, or ignoring), leaving their control neither explicit nor verifiable.
  To address this, we propose Mixed-Initiative Context, which reconceptualizes the context formed across multi-turn interactions as an explicit, structured, and manipulable interactive object. Under this concept, the structure, scope, and content of context can be dynamically organized and adjusted according to task needs, enabling both humans and AI to actively participate in context construction and regulation. To explore this concept, we implement Contextify as a probe system and conduct a user study examining users' context management behaviors, attitudes toward AI initiative, and overall collaboration experience. We conclude by discussing the implications of this concept for the HCI community.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [414] [What Drives Representation Steering? A Mechanistic Case Study on Steering Refusal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08524)
*Stephen Cheng,Sarah Wiegreffe,Dinesh Manocha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过多令牌激活修补框架研究LLM中导向向量的因果机制，发现不同导向方法在相同层使用功能可互换的电路，导向向量主要通过OV电路与注意力机制交互，而忽略QK电路。导向向量可稀疏化90-99%仍保持性能，不同导向方法在重要维度上具有一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管将导向向量应用于大型语言模型是一种高效有效的模型对齐技术，但缺乏对其工作机制的可解释性理解——具体来说，导向向量影响哪些内部机制，以及这如何导致不同的模型输出。为了研究导向向量有效性的因果机制，本文以拒绝行为为案例进行深入研究。

Method: 提出多令牌激活修补框架，对拒绝行为进行案例研究。通过分析不同导向方法在相同层的功能可互换电路，发现导向向量主要通过OV电路与注意力机制交互，而忽略QK电路。对导向的OV电路进行数学分解，揭示语义可解释的概念。基于激活修补结果，对导向向量进行稀疏化处理。

Result: 发现导向向量主要通过OV电路与注意力机制交互，冻结所有注意力分数仅使性能下降8.75%。导向向量可稀疏化90-99%仍保持大部分性能，不同导向方法在重要维度上具有一致性。导向OV电路的数学分解揭示了语义可解释的概念，即使导向向量本身不可解释。

Conclusion: 导向向量通过特定电路机制影响LLM行为，主要作用于OV电路而非QK电路。这种理解不仅提供了导向向量工作机制的可解释性洞察，还启发了高效的稀疏化方法，为模型对齐技术提供了理论基础和实践指导。

Abstract: Applying steering vectors to large language models (LLMs) is an efficient and effective model alignment technique, but we lack an interpretable explanation for how it works-- specifically, what internal mechanisms steering vectors affect and how this results in different model outputs. To investigate the causal mechanisms underlying the effectiveness of steering vectors, we conduct a comprehensive case study on refusal. We propose a multi-token activation patching framework and discover that different steering methodologies leverage functionally interchangeable circuits when applied at the same layer. These circuits reveal that steering vectors primarily interact with the attention mechanism through the OV circuit while largely ignoring the QK circuit-- freezing all attention scores during steering drops performance by only 8.75% across two model families. A mathematical decomposition of the steered OV circuit further reveals semantically interpretable concepts, even in cases where the steering vector itself does not. Leveraging the activation patching results, we show that steering vectors can be sparsified by up to 90-99% while retaining most performance, and that different steering methodologies agree on a subset of important dimensions.

</details>


### [415] [SOLAR: Communication-Efficient Model Adaptation via Subspace-Oriented Latent Adapter Reparametrization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08368)
*Seyed Mahmoud Sajjadi Mohammadabadi,Xiaolong Ma,Lei Yang,Feng Yan,Junshan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SOLAR是一个后训练压缩框架，通过将PEFT适配器表示为基向量的线性组合，显著降低通信和存储成本，同时保持任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法（如LoRA）虽然减少了训练参数，但在资源受限环境中的通信和存储成本仍然是主要瓶颈，需要更高效的压缩方案。

Method: SOLAR将每个PEFT更新表示为基向量的线性组合，这些基向量来自基础模型的奇异向量加上受控随机扰动。通过利用基础模型与任务特定更新之间的子空间相似性，解耦适配器大小与PEFT结构，实现紧凑而富有表现力的表示。

Result: 在语言和视觉任务上使用LLaMA、GPT和ViT模型的实验表明，SOLAR在显著减少模型表示大小的同时保持了任务性能，为分布式系统和边缘设备提供了有效的通信高效解决方案。

Conclusion: SOLAR是一个模型无关且兼容现有PEFT方法的压缩框架，通过利用子空间相似性实现了PEFT适配器的高效压缩，为资源受限环境中的模型部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, such as LoRA, enable scalable adaptation of foundation models by injecting low-rank adapters. However, their communication and storage costs remain a major bottleneck in resource-constrained settings. We propose SOLAR (Subspace-Oriented Latent Adapter Reparameterization), a post-training compression framework that substantially reduces the communication cost (i.e., the number of parameters to transmit or store) of PEFT adapters. SOLAR expresses each PEFT update as a linear combination of basis vectors formed from the foundation model's singular vectors with controlled random perturbations. By exploiting the subspace similarity (the alignment of principal directions) between the foundation model and task-specific fine-tuned updates, SOLAR decouples the adapter size from PEFT structure and ensures compact yet expressive representations. It is model-agnostic and compatible with existing PEFT methods, including LoRA, AdaLoRA, and other adapter modules. We theoretically establish a bound on the reconstruction error. Experiments on language and vision tasks using LLaMA, GPT, and ViT models demonstrate that SOLAR preserves task performance while significantly reducing model representation sizes, offering an effective and communication-efficient solution for deployment in distributed systems and edge devices.

</details>


### [416] [Quantization Impact on the Accuracy and Communication Efficiency Trade-off in Federated Learning for Aerospace Predictive Maintenance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08474)
*Abdelkarim Loukili*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究了在航空航天联邦学习中对称均匀量化对精度-效率权衡的影响，发现INT4量化在保持统计不可区分精度的同时实现8倍梯度通信成本降低，而INT2量化因不稳定而不适用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习在分布式航空航天机队中实现隐私保护的预测性维护，但梯度通信开销限制了其在带宽受限的物联网节点上的部署。需要研究量化技术如何平衡精度与效率。

Method: 使用对称均匀量化(b∈{32,8,4,2}比特)对自定义轻量级1-D卷积模型(AeroConv1D, 9,697参数)进行联邦学习训练，在NASA C-MAPSS基准数据集上采用现实的非独立同分布客户端分区，进行多种子严格评估(N=10种子)。

Result: INT4量化在FD001(p=0.341)和FD002(p=0.264 MAE, p=0.534 NASA分数)上达到与FP32统计不可区分的精度，同时实现8倍梯度通信成本降低(37.88 KiB→4.73 KiB每轮)。INT2量化虽然在某些指标上表现更好，但伴随灾难性的NASA分数不稳定性(CV=45.8% vs. 22.3% FP32)。

Conclusion: INT4量化在航空航天联邦学习中实现了精度与效率的良好平衡，适合硬件部署；INT2量化因操作不稳定性而不适用；正确的非独立同分布评估对揭示极端量化的真实性能至关重要。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving predictive maintenance across distributed aerospace fleets, but gradient communication overhead constrains deployment on bandwidth-limited IoT nodes. This paper investigates the impact of symmetric uniform quantization ($b \in \{32,8,4,2\}$ bits) on the accuracy--efficiency trade-off of a custom-designed lightweight 1-D convolutional model (AeroConv1D, 9\,697 parameters) trained via FL on the NASA C-MAPSS benchmark under a realistic Non-IID client partition. Using a rigorous multi-seed evaluation ($N=10$ seeds), we show that INT4 achieves accuracy \emph{statistically indistinguishable} from FP32 on both FD001 ($p=0.341$) and FD002 ($p=0.264$ MAE, $p=0.534$ NASA score) while delivering an $8\times$ reduction in gradient communication cost (37.88~KiB $\to$ 4.73~KiB per round). A key methodological finding is that naïve IID client partitioning artificially suppresses variance; correct Non-IID evaluation reveals the true operational instability of extreme quantization, demonstrated via a direct empirical IID vs.\ Non-IID comparison. INT2 is empirically characterized as unsuitable: while it achieves lower MAE on FD002 through extreme quantization-induced over-regularization, this apparent gain is accompanied by catastrophic NASA score instability (CV\,=\,45.8\% vs.\ 22.3\% for FP32), confirming non-reproducibility under heterogeneous operating conditions. Analytical FPGA resource projections on the Xilinx ZCU102 confirm that INT4 fits within hardware constraints (85.5\% DSP utilization), potentially enabling a complete FL pipeline on a single SoC. The full simulation codebase and FPGA estimation scripts are publicly available at https://github.com/therealdeadbeef/aerospace-fl-quantization.

</details>


### [417] [Scaling-Aware Data Selection for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08366)
*Tolga Dimlioglu,Nadine Chang,Maying Shen,Rafid Mahmood,Jose M. Alvarez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MOSAIC是一个数据选择框架，通过分区数据集、拟合神经缩放定律并迭代添加最大化指标变化的数据来优化数据混合，在自动驾驶应用中用80%更少的数据超越了基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模物理AI应用需要多样化的训练数据，但现有数据选择框架无法处理数据点对不同评估指标影响的模糊性，需要一种能够考虑多指标优化的通用数据选择方法。

Method: MOSAIC框架包含三个步骤：1) 将数据集划分为不同域；2) 为每个数据域拟合到评估指标的神经缩放定律；3) 通过迭代添加能最大化指标变化的数据域来优化数据混合。

Result: 在自动驾驶端到端规划器模型中，MOSAIC在扩展预测驾驶员模型评分（EPDMS）上超越了多种基线方法，且仅需基线方法80%的数据量。

Conclusion: MOSAIC提供了一个通用的数据选择框架，能够有效优化多指标评估下的数据收集策略，在自动驾驶等物理AI应用中显著减少了所需数据量。

Abstract: Large-scale deep learning models for physical AI applications depend on diverse training data collection efforts. These models and correspondingly, the training data, must address different evaluation criteria necessary for the models to be deployable in real-world environments. Data selection policies can guide the development of the training set, but current frameworks do not account for the ambiguity in how data points affect different metrics. In this work, we propose Mixture Optimization via Scaling-Aware Iterative Collection (MOSAIC), a general data selection framework that operates by: (i) partitioning the dataset into domains; (ii) fitting neural scaling laws from each data domain to the evaluation metrics; and (iii) optimizing a data mixture by iteratively adding data from domains that maximize the change in metrics. We apply MOSAIC to autonomous driving (AD), where an End-to-End (E2E) planner model is evaluated on the Extended Predictive Driver Model Score (EPDMS), an aggregate of driving rule compliance metrics. Here, MOSAIC outperforms a diverse set of baselines on EPDMS with up to 80\% less data.

</details>


### [418] [TTVS: Boosting Self-Exploring Reinforcement Learning via Test-time Variational Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08468)
*Sikai Bai,Haoxi Li,Jie Zhang,Yongjiang Liu,Song Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TTVS框架通过动态合成测试查询的语义等价变体，使大型推理模型能够在无标签测试数据上自我进化，克服传统测试时方法对静态查询集的过拟合问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习范式在专业或新颖领域中面临监督成本高昂的挑战，而传统测试时方法受限于静态查询集学习，容易过拟合文本模式，需要新的测试时适应方法。

Method: 提出测试时变分合成(TTVS)框架，包含两个协同模块：在线变分合成模块将静态测试查询转化为动态多样的语义等价变体流；测试时混合探索模块平衡准确性驱动的利用和一致性驱动的探索。

Result: 在八种模型架构上的广泛实验表明，TTVS仅使用无标签测试数据就超越了其他测试时适应方法，甚至优于使用大量高质量标签数据训练的监督RL技术。

Conclusion: TTVS通过动态合成语义等价变体使模型学习底层问题逻辑而非表面模式，为大型推理模型在监督稀缺场景下的测试时适应提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Despite significant advances in Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) driven by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), this paradigm is fundamentally limited in specialized or novel domains where such supervision is prohibitively expensive or unavailable, posing a key challenge for test-time adaptation. While existing test-time methods offer a potential solution, they are constrained by learning from static query sets, risking overfitting to textual patterns. To address this gap, we introduce Test-Time Variational Synthesis (TTVS), a novel framework that enables LRMs to self-evolve by dynamically augmenting the training stream from unlabeled test queries. TTVS comprises two synergistic modules: (1) Online Variational Synthesis, which transforms static test queries into a dynamic stream of diverse, semantically-equivalent variations, enforcing the model to learn underlying problem logic rather than superficial patterns; (2) Test-time Hybrid Exploration, which balances accuracy-driven exploitation with consistency-driven exploration across synthetic variants. Extensive experiments show TTVS yields superior performance across eight model architectures. Notably, using only unlabeled test-time data, TTVS not only surpasses other test-time adaptation methods but also outperforms state-of-the-art supervised RL-based techniques trained on vast, high-quality labeled data.

</details>


### [419] [A Machine Learning Framework for Turbofan Health Estimation via Inverse Problem Formulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08460)
*Milad Leyli-Abadi,Lucas Thil,Sebastien Razakarivony,Guillaume Doquet,Jesse Read*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种从涡轮风扇发动机运行传感器数据中恢复部件级健康指标的新方法，引入包含维护事件和使用变化的新数据集，比较稳态与非稳态模型、贝叶斯滤波器和自监督学习方法，为健康状态估计问题建立实用基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 涡轮风扇发动机健康状态估计是一个具有挑战性的不适定逆问题，受限于稀疏传感和复杂的非线性热力学。该领域研究较为分散，现有比较局限于使用不现实的数据集且对时间信息利用不足。研究旨在从运行传感器数据中恢复部件级健康指标，考虑实际退化模式和维护事件。

Method: 引入包含行业导向复杂性（如维护事件和使用变化）的新数据集；建立基准比较稳态与非稳态数据驱动模型、贝叶斯滤波器；提出自监督学习方法，在无法获取真实健康标签的情况下学习潜在表示；通过比较无监督表示与直接预测基线的下游估计性能，建立解决该逆问题的实用难度下限。

Result: 传统滤波器仍然是强有力的基线方法；自监督学习方法揭示了健康估计的内在复杂性；结果表明需要更先进和可解释的推理策略；为可重复性提供了生成的数据集和实现代码。

Conclusion: 该研究通过引入新数据集和系统比较方法，为涡轮风扇发动机健康状态估计建立了实用基准。结果表明传统滤波器性能依然稳健，而自监督学习方法凸显了该逆问题的固有难度，强调了开发更先进、可解释推理策略的必要性。

Abstract: Estimating the health state of turbofan engines is a challenging ill-posed inverse problem, hindered by sparse sensing and complex nonlinear thermodynamics. Research in this area remains fragmented, with comparisons limited by the use of unrealistic datasets and insufficient exploration of the exploitation of temporal information. This work investigates how to recover component-level health indicators from operational sensor data under realistic degradation and maintenance patterns. To support this study, we introduce a new dataset that incorporates industry-oriented complexities such as maintenance events and usage changes. Using this dataset, we establish an initial benchmark that compares steady-state and nonstationary data-driven models, and Bayesian filters, classic families of methods used to solve this problem. In addition to this benchmark, we introduce self-supervised learning (SSL) approaches that learn latent representations without access to true health labels, a scenario reflective of real-world operational constraints. By comparing the downstream estimation performance of these unsupervised representations against the direct prediction baselines, we establish a practical lower bound on the difficulty of solving this inverse problem. Our results reveal that traditional filters remain strong baselines, while SSL methods reveal the intrinsic complexity of health estimation and highlight the need for more advanced and interpretable inference strategies. For reproducibility, both the generated dataset and the implementation used in this work are made accessible.

</details>


### [420] [Less Approximates More: Harmonizing Performance and Confidence Faithfulness via Hybrid Post-Training for High-Stakes Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08454)
*Haokai Ma,Lee Yan Zhen,Gang Yang,Yunshan Ma,Ee-Chien Chang,Tat-Seng Chua*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HyTuning：一种混合后训练框架，通过渐进推理增益（PRG）度量自适应重加权推理蒸馏和内部反馈强化学习，在有限监督下提升准确性和置信度忠实性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型部署于高风险任务时，错误但自信的推断可能导致严重现实危害，置信度忠实性问题凸显。现有联合优化方法面临高质量训练语料稀缺、事实无根据的过度自信和错误更新放大等挑战

Method: 提出渐进推理增益（PRG）度量推理步骤是否逐步强化对最终答案的支持；引入HyTuning混合后训练框架，通过PRG风格度量自适应重加权推理蒸馏（RD）和内部反馈强化学习（RLIF），以稀缺监督推理轨迹为稳定锚点，同时利用大量未标记查询实现可扩展性

Result: 在多个领域特定和通用基准测试中，HyTuning在有限监督下提高了准确性，同时实现了置信度忠实性，支持"少近似多"的实际效果

Conclusion: HyTuning框架通过渐进推理增益度量和自适应混合优化，有效解决了语言模型置信度忠实性问题，在有限监督资源下实现了准确性和可靠性的平衡

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes tasks, where confident yet incorrect inferences may cause severe real-world harm, bringing the previously overlooked issue of confidence faithfulness back to the forefront. A promising solution is to jointly optimize unsupervised Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF) with reasoning-trace-guided Reasoning Distillation (RD), which may face three persistent challenges: scarcity of high-quality training corpora, factually unwarranted overconfidence and indiscriminate fusion that amplifies erroneous updates. Inspired by the human confidence accumulation from uncertainty to certainty, we propose Progressive Reasoning Gain (PRG) to measure whether reasoning steps progressively strengthen support for the final answer. Furthermore, we introduce HyTuning, a hybrid post-training framework that adaptively reweights RD and RLIF via a PRG-style metric, using scarce supervised reasoning traces as a stable anchor while exploiting abundant unlabeled queries for scalability. Experiments on several domain-specific and general benchmarks demonstrate that HyTuning improves accuracy while achieving confidence faithfulness under limited supervision, supporting a practical "Less Approximates More" effect.

</details>


### [421] [Provably Adaptive Linear Approximation for the Shapley Value and Beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08438)
*Weida Li,Yaoliang Yu,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在Θ(n)空间约束下高效近似半值的新框架和算法，显著降低了查询复杂度，并开发了首个自适应线性时间线性空间随机算法Adalina。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Shapley值及其半值家族在归因问题中应用广泛，但精确计算需要指数级查询次数。大规模应用需要高效近似方法，特别是在Θ(n)空间约束下的近似极限探索。

Method: 基于向量集中不等式建立理论框架，系统开发线性空间算法，统一OFA、无偏kernelSHAP、SHAP-IQ和回归调整方法，引入自适应随机算法Adalina。

Result: 算法仅需O(n/ε² log(1/δ))次效用查询即可保证误差概率界，理论上实现改进的均方误差，所有理论发现均通过实验验证。

Conclusion: 该工作建立了半值近似的新理论框架，显著降低了查询复杂度，开发了首个自适应线性算法，为大规模归因问题提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: The Shapley value, and its broader family of semi-values, has received much attention in various attribution problems. A fundamental and long-standing challenge is their efficient approximation, since exact computation generally requires an exponential number of utility queries in the number of players $n$. To meet the challenges of large-scale applications, we explore the limits of efficiently approximating semi-values under a $Θ(n)$ space constraint. Building upon a vector concentration inequality, we establish a theoretical framework that enables sharper query complexities for existing unbiased randomized algorithms. Within this framework, we systematically develop a linear-space algorithm that requires $O(\frac{n}{ε^{2}}\log\frac{1}δ)$ utility queries to ensure $P(\|\hat{\boldsymbolφ}-\boldsymbolφ\|_{2}\geqε)\leq δ$ for all commonly used semi-values. In particular, our framework naturally bridges OFA, unbiased kernelSHAP, SHAP-IQ and the regression-adjusted approach, and definitively characterizes when paired sampling is beneficial. Moreover, our algorithm allows explicit minimization of the mean square error for each specific utility function. Accordingly, we introduce the first adaptive, linear-time, linear-space randomized algorithm, Adalina, that theoretically achieves improved mean square error. All of our theoretical findings are experimentally validated.

</details>


### [422] [Adversarial Label Invariant Graph Data Augmentations for Out-of-Distribution Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08404)
*Simon Zhang,Ryan P. DeMilt,Kun Jin,Cathy H. Xia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RIA是一种通过对抗性训练实现分布外泛化的新方法，专门处理协变量偏移问题，通过对抗性标签不变数据增强探索训练数据环境，防止模型坍缩到仅适应训练分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现实应用中，训练和测试数据常来自不同环境，导致分布偏移。协变量偏移是仅输入数据分布变化而概念分布保持不变的分布偏移类型。现有方法需要改进以更好地处理这种OoD泛化问题。

Method: RIA（Regularization for Invariance with Adversarial training）受Q学习启发，通过对抗性探索训练数据环境。使用对抗性标签不变数据增强生成新环境，防止模型坍缩到仅适应训练分布。该方法可与许多现有OoD泛化方法结合，采用交替梯度下降-上升算法求解约束优化问题。

Result: 在OoD图分类任务上进行了大量实验，涵盖多种合成和自然分布偏移。结果显示RIA相比现有OoD基线方法能获得更高的准确率。

Conclusion: RIA通过对抗性训练和标签不变数据增强有效处理协变量偏移下的OoD泛化问题，在多种分布偏移场景下优于现有基线方法。

Abstract: Out-of-distribution (OoD) generalization occurs when representation learning encounters a distribution shift. This occurs frequently in practice when training and testing data come from different environments. Covariate shift is a type of distribution shift that occurs only in the input data, while the concept distribution stays invariant. We propose RIA - Regularization for Invariance with Adversarial training, a new method for OoD generalization under convariate shift. Motivated by an analogy to $Q$-learning, it performs an adversarial exploration for training data environments. These new environments are induced by adversarial label invariant data augmentations that prevent a collapse to an in-distribution trained learner. It works with many existing OoD generalization methods for covariate shift that can be formulated as constrained optimization problems. We develop an alternating gradient descent-ascent algorithm to solve the problem, and perform extensive experiments on OoD graph classification for various kinds of synthetic and natural distribution shifts. We demonstrate that our method can achieve high accuracy compared with OoD baselines.

</details>


### [423] [PriPG-RL: Privileged Planner-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Partially Observable Systems with Anytime-Feasible MPC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08036)
*Mohsen Amiri,Mohsen Amiri,Ali Beikmohammadi,Sindri Magnuśson,Mehdi Hosseinzadeh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种利用训练期间可用的特权规划器来缓解部分可观测性问题的强化学习方法，通过MPC规划器指导学习智能体，并开发了P2P-SAC算法进行知识蒸馏


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决部分可观测环境下强化学习训练困难的问题，利用训练期间可用的特权规划器（具有近似动力学模型和完整状态信息）来指导仅能观测到状态损失投影的学习智能体

Method: 1) 将问题形式化为POMDP，其中规划器具有特权状态信息和近似动力学模型；2) 引入随时可行的MPC算法作为规划器；3) 提出P2P-SAC算法，通过知识蒸馏将规划器的特权知识迁移到学习智能体，缓解部分可观测性问题

Result: 1) 提供了严格的理论分析支持框架；2) 在NVIDIA Isaac Lab仿真中验证了方法有效性；3) 成功在真实世界的Unitree Go2四足机器人上部署，实现了在复杂、障碍物丰富环境中的导航

Conclusion: 通过利用训练期间可用的特权规划器进行知识蒸馏，能够有效缓解部分可观测性问题，提高样本效率和最终策略性能，并在仿真和真实机器人平台上得到验证

Abstract: This paper addresses the problem of training a reinforcement learning (RL) policy under partial observability by exploiting a privileged, anytime-feasible planner agent available exclusively during training. We formalize this as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) in which a planner agent with access to an approximate dynamical model and privileged state information guides a learning agent that observes only a lossy projection of the true state. To realize this framework, we introduce an anytime-feasible Model Predictive Control (MPC) algorithm that serves as the planner agent. For the learning agent, we propose Planner-to-Policy Soft Actor-Critic (P2P-SAC), a method that distills the planner agent's privileged knowledge to mitigate partial observability and thereby improve both sample efficiency and final policy performance. We support this framework with rigorous theoretical analysis. Finally, we validate our approach in simulation using NVIDIA Isaac Lab and successfully deploy it on a real-world Unitree Go2 quadruped navigating complex, obstacle-rich environments.

</details>


### [424] [ADAPTive Input Training for Many-to-One Pre-Training on Time-Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08398)
*Paul Quinlan,Qingguo Li,Xiaodan Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ADAPT是一种新的时间序列预训练范式，能够有效对齐时间序列数据的物理特性，支持在输入尺寸和通道维度差异极大的情况下进行混合批次预训练，在162个时间序列分类数据集上训练并取得了最先进的分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列自监督预训练方法在一对多场景（一个数据集预训练，下游数据集微调）中表现良好，但在预训练阶段加入更多数据集时难以泛化到新数据集。这限制了利用大量多样化数据集构建时间序列基础模型的能力。

Method: 提出ADAPT预训练范式，能够高效对齐时间序列数据的物理特性，克服预训练数据在输入尺寸和通道维度上的极端差异，实现混合批次预训练。

Result: 在162个时间序列分类数据集上进行训练，在分类基准测试中取得了新的最先进性能。成功实现了在时间序列领域同时训练多种数据集，这是构建时间序列通用基础模型的重要基础。

Conclusion: ADAPT解决了时间序列预训练中多数据集泛化的根本挑战，为构建时间序列领域通用基础模型提供了关键技术支持，能够有效利用大量多样化数据集进行预训练。

Abstract: Recent work on time-series models has leveraged self-supervised training to learn meaningful features and patterns in order to improve performance on downstream tasks and generalize to unseen modalities. While these pretraining methods have shown great promise in one-to-many scenarios, where a model is pre-trained on one dataset and fine-tuned on a downstream dataset, they have struggled to generalize to new datasets when more datasets are added during pre-training. This is a fundamental challenge in building foundation models for time-series data, as it limits the ability to develop models that can learn from a large variety of diverse datasets available. To address this challenge, we present a new pre-training paradigm for time-series data called ADAPT, which can efficiently align the physical properties of data in the time-series domain, enabling mixed-batch pre-training despite the extreme discrepancies in the input sizes and channel dimensions of pre-training data. We trained on 162 time-series classification datasets and set new state-of-the-art performance for classification benchmarks. We successfully train a model within the time-series domain on a wide range of datasets simultaneously, which is a major building block for building generalist foundation models in time-series domains.

</details>


### [425] [EgoEverything: A Benchmark for Human Behavior Inspired Long Context Egocentric Video Understanding in AR Environment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08342)
*Qiance Tang,Ziqi Wang,Jieyu Lin,Ziyun Li,Barbara De Salvo,Sai Qian Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EgoEverything是一个新的长上下文第一人称视频理解基准，通过整合人类注意力信号（来自注视数据）生成问题，包含5000多个选择题对，覆盖100多小时视频，专门针对AR应用场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有第一人称视频数据集主要依赖人类佩戴的摄像头，侧重于视觉内容，但缺乏对用户行为（特别是形成视频相关查询时的行为）的考虑。长上下文第一人称视频理解在AR等应用中很重要，但现有基准未能充分捕捉自然人类行为。

Method: 利用人类注意力信号（从注视数据中抽象得出）来生成问题，创建了一个包含5000多个选择题对、覆盖100多小时视频的基准数据集。通过整合注意力信号，使问题生成更符合自然人类行为。

Result: 开发了EgoEverything基准，包含超过5000个选择题对，涵盖100多小时的第一人称视频内容。该基准通过整合人类注意力信号，为长上下文第一人称视频理解提供了更真实的评估环境。

Conclusion: EgoEverything基准通过整合人类注意力信号生成问题，更真实地捕捉了自然人类行为，为AR应用中的长上下文第一人称视频理解提供了更现实的评估环境，解决了现有数据集在考虑用户行为方面的局限性。

Abstract: Long context egocentric video understanding has recently attracted significant research attention, with augmented reality (AR) highlighted as one of its most important application domains. Nevertheless, the task remains highly challenging due to the need for reasoning over extended temporal contexts and diverse, unstructured activities. Although several benchmarks exist, most egocentric datasets rely on human worn cameras and focus mainly on visual content, with limited consideration of underlying user behavior when forming video-related queries. EgoEverything is a benchmark that explicitly considers human behavior by leveraging human attention signals, abstracted from gaze data, when generating questions. It comprises over 5,000 multiple choice question answer pairs, spanning more than 100 hours of video. By integrating human attention signals during question generation, it more faithfully captures natural human behavior and offers a realistic evaluation setting for long-context egocentric video understanding in AR.

</details>


### [426] [Leveraging Complementary Embeddings for Replay Selection in Continual Learning with Small Buffers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08336)
*Danit Yanowsky,Daphna Weinshall*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MERS：一种基于多嵌入重放选择的图方法，通过整合监督和自监督嵌入来改进持续学习中的样本选择策略，在低内存条件下表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题仍然是一个关键挑战。在内存受限的重放式持续学习中，性能严重依赖于重放缓冲区的样本选择策略。现有方法主要使用监督学习获得的嵌入来构建内存缓冲区，但忽略了自监督表示中丰富的类别相关语义信息。

Method: 提出多嵌入重放选择方法（MERS），用基于图的方法替换缓冲区选择模块，该方法整合了监督嵌入和自监督嵌入。该方法不增加模型参数或重放数据量，可作为即插即用的增强模块用于基于重放的持续学习算法。

Result: 在CIFAR-100和TinyImageNet数据集上，MERS在多种持续学习算法中一致优于最先进的样本选择策略，特别是在低内存条件下表现出显著优势。该方法超越了单嵌入基线方法。

Conclusion: MERS通过整合监督和自监督嵌入的丰富语义信息，提供了一种实用、高效的样本选择策略，显著改善了内存受限条件下持续学习的性能，为解决灾难性遗忘问题提供了新思路。

Abstract: Catastrophic forgetting remains a key challenge in Continual Learning (CL). In replay-based CL with severe memory constraints, performance critically depends on the sample selection strategy for the replay buffer. Most existing approaches construct memory buffers using embeddings learned under supervised objectives. However, class-agnostic, self-supervised representations often encode rich, class-relevant semantics that are overlooked. We propose a new method, Multiple Embedding Replay Selection, MERS, which replaces the buffer selection module with a graph-based approach that integrates both supervised and self-supervised embeddings. Empirical results show consistent improvements over SOTA selection strategies across a range of continual learning algorithms, with particularly strong gains in low-memory regimes. On CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet, MERS outperforms single-embedding baselines without adding model parameters or increasing replay volume, making it a practical, drop-in enhancement for replay-based continual learning.

</details>


### [427] [Dead Weights, Live Signals: Feedforward Graphs of Frozen Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08335)
*Marcus Armstrong,Navid Ayoobi,Arjun Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种前馈图架构，将异构冻结大语言模型作为计算节点，通过学习的线性投影在共享潜在空间中通信，仅训练少量参数即可显著提升推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于独立训练LLM潜在空间几何兼容性的发现，希望将静态双模型引导扩展到可端到端训练的多节点图结构，通过优化投影矩阵实现异构冻结模型的有效协同。

Method: 构建异构冻结LLM计算节点图：三个小型模型编码输入到共享潜在空间，聚合信号注入两个大型冻结模型，其表征输入轻量级交叉注意力输出节点。仅训练投影矩阵（17.6M参数），通过残差流注入钩子进行反向传播优化。

Result: 在12B冻结参数基础上仅训练17.6M参数，ARC-Challenge达87.3%、OpenBookQA达82.8%、MMLU达67.2%，分别比最佳单模型提升11.4、6.2、1.2个百分点，比参数匹配的冻结单模型分类器提升9.1、5.2、6.7个百分点。

Conclusion: 验证了通过多个冻结模型边界的梯度流是可行的，输出节点无需显式监督即可发展出跨层-2节点的选择性路由行为，为构建高效异构模型协作系统提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present a feedforward graph architecture in which heterogeneous frozen large language models serve as computational nodes, communicating through a shared continuous latent space via learned linear projections. Building on recent work demonstrating geometric compatibility between independently trained LLM latent spaces~\cite{armstrong2026thinking}, we extend this finding from static two-model steering to end-to-end trainable multi-node graphs, where projection matrices are optimized jointly via backpropagation through residual stream injection hooks. Three small frozen models (Llama-3.2-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, Gemma-2-2B) encode the input into a shared latent space whose aggregate signal is injected into two larger frozen models (Phi-3-mini, Mistral-7B), whose representations feed a lightweight cross-attention output node. With only 17.6M trainable parameters against approximately 12B frozen, the architecture achieves 87.3\% on ARC-Challenge, 82.8\% on OpenBookQA, and 67.2\% on MMLU, outperforming the best single constituent model by 11.4, 6.2, and 1.2 percentage points respectively, and outperforming parameter-matched learned classifiers on frozen single models by 9.1, 5.2, and 6.7 points. Gradient flow through multiple frozen model boundaries is empirically verified to be tractable, and the output node develops selective routing behavior across layer-2 nodes without explicit supervision.

</details>


### [428] [An Illusion of Unlearning? Assessing Machine Unlearning Through Internal Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08271)
*Yichen Gao,Altay Unal,Akshay Rangamani,Zhihui Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了当前机器学习遗忘方法的主要成功源于特征-分类器错位，而非真正的特征层面遗忘，并提出基于类均值特征的分类器方法来实现更可靠的表示层面遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器学习遗忘方法虽然在输出层面表现出良好的遗忘效果，但存在脆弱性（如简单微调即可恢复被遗忘概念）。作者发现现有方法主要依赖特征-分类器错位而非真正的特征层面遗忘，因此需要开发能够在表示层面实现可靠遗忘的方法。

Method: 1. 分析现有遗忘方法的内部表示，揭示特征-分类器错位现象；2. 基于神经崩溃假设，证明仅调整分类器即可实现有效遗忘；3. 提出基于类均值特征的分类器方法，显式强制特征与分类器对齐；4. 在标准基准上进行实验验证。

Result: 实验表明：1. 现有遗忘方法隐藏的特征仍具有高度判别性，简单线性探测可恢复接近原始精度；2. 仅调整分类器可实现可忽略的遗忘精度同时保持保留精度；3. 提出的CMF-based遗忘方法能有效减少表示中的遗忘信息，同时保持高保留精度。

Conclusion: 机器学习遗忘方法需要在表示层面进行忠实评估，而不仅仅是输出层面。基于类均值特征的分类器方法能够实现更可靠的表示层面遗忘，为未来遗忘方法的发展提供了新方向。

Abstract: While numerous machine unlearning (MU) methods have recently been developed with promising results in erasing the influence of forgotten data, classes, or concepts, they are also highly vulnerable-for example, simple fine-tuning can inadvertently reintroduce erased concepts. In this paper, we address this contradiction by examining the internal representations of unlearned models, in contrast to prior work that focuses primarily on output-level behavior. Our analysis shows that many state-of-the-art MU methods appear successful mainly due to a misalignment between last-layer features and the classifier, a phenomenon we call feature-classifier misalignment. In fact, hidden features remain highly discriminative, and simple linear probing can recover near-original accuracy. Assuming neural collapse in the original model, we further demonstrate that adjusting only the classifier can achieve negligible forget accuracy while preserving retain accuracy, and we corroborate this with experiments using classifier-only fine-tuning. Motivated by these findings, we propose MU methods based on a class-mean features (CMF) classifier, which explicitly enforces alignment between features and classifiers. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that CMF-based unlearning reduces forgotten information in representations while maintaining high retain accuracy, highlighting the need for faithful representation-level evaluation of MU.

</details>


### [429] [Equivariant Efficient Joint Discrete and Continuous MeanFlow for Molecular Graph Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08189)
*Rongjian Xu,Teng Pang,Zhiqiang Dong,Guoqiang Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EQUIMF：一种统一的SE(3)-等变生成框架，通过同步的MeanFlow动力学联合建模离散拓扑和连续几何，实现高效少步生成并保持物理一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图生成方法通常将结构与几何解耦，缺乏同步的跨域动力学，依赖迭代采样，导致物理不一致的分子构象和采样速度慢。

Method: 提出EQUIMF框架，引入统一时间桥和平均速度更新，通过相互条件化实现结构与几何的同步MeanFlow动力学；开发离散MeanFlow公式支持离散图结构的高效生成。

Result: EQUIMF在生成质量、物理有效性和采样效率方面一致优于先前的扩散和流匹配方法。

Conclusion: EQUIMF通过统一的SE(3)-等变框架解决了图结构数据生成中的关键挑战，实现了离散拓扑和连续几何的联合建模与高效生成。

Abstract: Graph-structured data jointly contain discrete topology and continuous geometry, which poses fundamental challenges for generative modeling due to heterogeneous distributions, incompatible noise dynamics, and the need for equivariant inductive biases. Existing flow-matching approaches for graph generation typically decouple structure from geometry, lack synchronized cross-domain dynamics, and rely on iterative sampling, often resulting in physically inconsistent molecular conformations and slow sampling. To address these limitations, we propose Equivariant MeanFlow (EQUIMF), a unified SE(3)-equivariant generative framework that jointly models discrete and continuous components through synchronized MeanFlow dynamics. EQUIMF introduces a unified time bridge and average-velocity updates with mutual conditioning between structure and geometry, enabling efficient few-step generation while preserving physical consistency. Moreover, we develop a novel discrete MeanFlow formulation with a simple yet effective parameterization to support efficient generation over discrete graph structures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EQUIMF consistently outperforms prior diffusion and flow-matching methods in generation quality, physical validity, and sampling efficiency.

</details>


### [430] [Long-Term Embeddings for Balanced Personalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08181)
*Andrii Dzhoha,Egor Malykh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Long-Term Embeddings (LTE)框架，通过基于内容的固定语义基础解决序列推荐中的长期偏好建模和特征版本一致性问题，在在线测试中显著提升用户参与度和财务指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代基于transformer的序列推荐器擅长捕捉短期意图，但存在近期偏置问题，忽略了稳定的长期偏好。同时，生产环境中存在特征版本一致性问题，即特征存储通常只保留一个"实时"版本的特征，导致模型在部署和回滚时面临离线-在线不匹配问题。

Method: 提出Long-Term Embeddings (LTE)框架，将嵌入约束在基于内容的物品表示的固定语义基础上，确保跨版本兼容性。研究了两种表示方法：启发式平均和具有固定解码器的不对称自编码器，后者允许行为微调同时保持稳定性。在因果语言建模中，将LTE作为上下文前缀token，使用滞后窗口来避免数据泄漏问题。

Result: 在Zalando的在线A/B测试中，使用滞后窗口将LTE作为上下文前缀token集成的方法，在用户参与度和财务指标方面均取得了显著提升。

Conclusion: LTE框架有效解决了序列推荐中的长期偏好建模问题和生产环境中的特征版本一致性问题，通过基于内容的固定语义基础确保了跨版本兼容性，在实际应用中取得了显著效果。

Abstract: Modern transformer-based sequential recommenders excel at capturing short-term intent but often suffer from recency bias, overlooking stable long-term preferences. While extending sequence lengths is an intuitive fix, it is computationally inefficient, and recent interactions tend to dominate the model's attention. We propose Long-Term Embeddings (LTE) as a high-inertia contextual anchor to bridge this gap. We address a critical production challenge: the point-in-time consistency problem caused by infrastructure constraints, as feature stores typically host only a single "live" version of features. This leads to an offline-online mismatch during model deployments and rollbacks, as models are forced to process evolved representations they never saw during training. To resolve this, we introduce an LTE framework that constrains embeddings to a fixed semantic basis of content-based item representations, ensuring cross-version compatibility. Furthermore, we investigate integration strategies for causal language modeling, considering the data leakage issue that occurs when the LTE and the transformer's short-term sequence share a temporal horizon. We evaluate two representations: a heuristic average and an asymmetric autoencoder with a fixed decoder grounded in the semantic basis to enable behavioral fine-tuning while maintaining stability. Online A/B tests on Zalando demonstrate that integrating LTE as a contextual prefix token using a lagged window yields significant uplifts in both user engagement and financial metrics.

</details>


### [431] [Value-Guidance MeanFlow for Offline Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08174)
*Teng Pang,Zhiqiang Dong,Yan Zhang,Rongjian Xu,Guoqiang Wu,Yilong Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VGM²P：一种基于流的离线多智能体强化学习框架，通过全局优势值引导智能体协作，将最优策略学习视为条件行为克隆，使用无分类器引导MeanFlow提高策略表达能力和推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线多智能体强化学习方法使用扩散或流生成模型捕获联合策略行为，但依赖多步迭代采样导致训练和推理效率低下。虽然通过蒸馏等方法提高了采样效率，但对行为正则化系数敏感。

Method: 提出VGM²P框架：1) 使用全局优势值引导智能体协作，将最优策略学习转化为条件行为克隆；2) 采用无分类器引导MeanFlow进行策略训练和执行，提高策略表达能力和推理效率；3) 实现系数不敏感的条件行为克隆。

Result: 在离散和连续动作空间任务上的实验表明，仅通过条件行为克隆训练，VGM²P就能高效达到与最先进方法相当的性能。

Conclusion: VGM²P是一个简单有效的流基策略学习框架，通过全局优势值引导和无分类器引导MeanFlow，实现了高效的动作生成和系数不敏感的条件行为克隆，在离线多智能体强化学习中表现出色。

Abstract: Offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) aims to learn the optimal joint policy from pre-collected datasets, requiring a trade-off between maximizing global returns and mitigating distribution shift from offline data. Recent studies use diffusion or flow generative models to capture complex joint policy behaviors among agents; however, they typically rely on multi-step iterative sampling, thereby reducing training and inference efficiency. Although further research improves sampling efficiency through methods like distillation, it remains sensitive to the behavior regularization coefficient. To address the above-mentioned issues, we propose Value Guidance Multi-agent MeanFlow Policy (VGM$^2$P), a simple yet effective flow-based policy learning framework that enables efficient action generation with coefficient-insensitive conditional behavior cloning. Specifically, VGM$^2$P uses global advantage values to guide agent collaboration, treating optimal policy learning as conditional behavior cloning. Additionally, to improve policy expressiveness and inference efficiency in multi-agent scenarios, it leverages classifier-free guidance MeanFlow for both policy training and execution. Experiments on tasks with both discrete and continuous action spaces demonstrate that, even when trained solely via conditional behavior cloning, VGM$^2$P efficiently achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [432] [Shift- and stretch-invariant non-negative matrix factorization with an application to brain tissue delineation in emission tomography data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08161)
*Anders S. Olsen,Miriam L. Navarro,Claus Svarer,Jesper L. Hinrich,Morten Mørup,Gitte M. Knudsen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出shift- and stretch-invariant非负矩阵分解框架，用于处理动态神经影像数据中的扩散效应，通过频域方法估计整数/非整数时间偏移和拉伸，在合成数据和脑发射断层扫描数据中验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态神经影像数据（如发射断层扫描测量放射性示踪剂在血液或脑脊液中的传输）常表现出扩散特性，导致距离相关的时间延迟、尺度差异和拉伸效应，限制了传统线性建模和分解方法的有效性。

Method: 提出shift- and stretch-invariant非负矩阵分解框架，在频域中估计整数和非整数时间偏移（对应相位修改）以及时间拉伸（通过零填充或截断处理），使用PyTorch实现。

Result: 在合成数据和脑发射断层扫描数据上验证，模型能够通过处理拉伸效应提供更详细的脑组织结构特征描述。

Conclusion: 该框架有效解决了动态神经影像数据中的扩散相关问题，为脑组织结构的更精细表征提供了新方法。

Abstract: Dynamic neuroimaging data, such as emission tomography measurements of radiotracer transport in blood or cerebrospinal fluid, often exhibit diffusion-like properties. These introduce distance-dependent temporal delays, scale-differences, and stretching effects that limit the effectiveness of conventional linear modeling and decomposition methods. To address this, we present the shift- and stretch-invariant non-negative matrix factorization framework. Our approach estimates both integer and non-integer temporal shifts as well as temporal stretching, all implemented in the frequency domain, where shifts correspond to phase modifications, and where stretching is handled via zero-padding or truncation. The model is implemented in PyTorch (https://github.com/anders-s-olsen/shiftstretchNMF). We demonstrate on synthetic data and brain emission tomography data that the model is able to account for stretching to provide more detailed characterization of brain tissue structure.

</details>


### [433] [A Direct Approach for Handling Contextual Bandits with Latent State Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08149)
*Zhen Li,Gilles Stoltz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文重新研究了有限臂线性bandit模型，改进了Nelson等人(2022)的工作，提出了更自然的模型和更强的高概率遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Nelson等人(2022)的研究存在几个问题：1）他们将奖励简化为隐藏状态后验概率的线性函数，而非隐藏状态本身的函数；2）分析未考虑HMM参数的估计；3）只获得期望遗憾界而非高概率界；4）遗憾界包含不必要的复杂模型依赖（如奖励差距）。本文旨在研究更自然的模型并获得更强的理论保证。

Method: 本文研究更自然的模型，其中奖励直接依赖于隐藏状态（除了观测上下文）。提出完全自适应策略，在线估计HMM参数，并分析其性能。

Result: 获得了更强的高概率遗憾界，这些界限不依赖于奖励函数，仅通过HMM参数估计依赖于模型，避免了不必要的复杂依赖关系。

Conclusion: 本文改进了有限臂线性bandit模型的理论分析，提出了更自然的模型设定和完全自适应策略，获得了不依赖奖励函数的高概率遗憾界，相比先前工作有显著理论提升。

Abstract: We revisit the finite-armed linear bandit model by Nelson et al. (2022), where contexts and rewards are governed by a finite hidden Markov chain. Nelson et al. (2022) approach this model by a reduction to linear contextual bandits; but to do so, they actually introduce a simplification in which rewards are linear functions of the posterior probabilities over the hidden states given the observed contexts, rather than functions of the hidden states themselves. Their analysis (but not their algorithm) also does not take into account the estimation of the HMM parameters, and only tackles expected, not high-probability, bounds, which suffer in addition from unnecessary complex dependencies on the model (like reward gaps). We instead study the more natural model incorporating direct dependencies in the hidden states (on top of dependencies on the observed contexts, as is natural for contextual bandits) and also obtain stronger, high-probability, regret bounds for a fully adaptive strategy that estimates HMM parameters online. These bounds do not depend on the reward functions and only depend on the model through the estimation of the HMM parameters.

</details>


### [434] [Alloc-MoE: Budget-Aware Expert Activation Allocation for Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08133)
*Baihui Liu,Kaiyuan Tian,Wei Wang,Zhaoning Zhang,Linbo Qiao,Dongsheng Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Alloc-MoE：一个统一的框架，通过协调层级和令牌级的预算分配来优化MoE模型的激活预算，在保持性能的同时显著提升推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE架构中大量的专家激活在推理时造成严重的延迟瓶颈，特别是在资源受限的部署场景中。现有减少专家激活的方法会导致严重的模型性能下降。

Method: 提出激活预算概念，并开发Alloc-MoE框架：1) Alloc-L：在层级通过敏感性分析和动态规划确定跨层的最优激活分配；2) Alloc-T：在令牌级基于路由分数动态重新分配激活，优化预算分配而不增加延迟。

Result: 在多个MoE模型上的实验表明，Alloc-MoE能在约束的激活预算下保持模型性能。在DeepSeek-V2-Lite上，以原始预算的一半实现了1.15倍预填充和1.34倍解码加速。

Conclusion: Alloc-MoE通过协调的层级和令牌级预算分配，有效解决了MoE模型推理延迟问题，在保持性能的同时显著提升了推理效率。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) has become a dominant architecture for scaling large language models due to their sparse activation mechanism. However, the substantial number of expert activations creates a critical latency bottleneck during inference, especially in resource-constrained deployment scenarios. Existing approaches that reduce expert activations potentially lead to severe model performance degradation. In this work, we introduce the concept of \emph{activation budget} as a constraint on the number of expert activations and propose Alloc-MoE, a unified framework that optimizes budget allocation coordinately at both the layer and token levels to minimize performance degradation. At the layer level, we introduce Alloc-L, which leverages sensitivity profiling and dynamic programming to determine the optimal allocation of expert activations across layers. At the token level, we propose Alloc-T, which dynamically redistributes activations based on routing scores, optimizing budget allocation without increasing latency. Extensive experiments across multiple MoE models demonstrate that Alloc-MoE maintains model performance under a constrained activation budget. Especially, Alloc-MoE achieves $1.15\times$ prefill and $1.34\times$ decode speedups on DeepSeek-V2-Lite at half of the original budget.

</details>


### [435] [Bias Redistribution in Visual Machine Unlearning: Does Forgetting One Group Harm Another?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08111)
*Yunusa Haruna,Adamu Lawan,Ibrahim Haruna Abdulhamid,Hamza Mohammed Dauda,Jiaquan Zhang,Chaoning Zhang,Shamsuddeen Hassan Muhammad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 机器遗忘会重新分配偏见而非消除偏见，主要沿性别边界而非年龄边界，在CLIP嵌入空间中呈现性别主导结构


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究机器遗忘的公平性影响：当模型遗忘特定人口统计群体时，是中和该概念还是将其重新分配到相关群体，可能放大偏见

Method: 在CelebA数据集上使用CLIP模型（ViT/B-32、ViT-L/14、ViT-B/16），在零样本分类设置下评估三种遗忘方法（Prompt Erasure、Prompt Reweighting、Refusal Vector），通过组间准确率变化、人口统计均等差距和重新分配分数进行分析

Result: 遗忘不会消除偏见而是重新分配偏见，主要沿性别而非年龄边界；移除主导的年轻女性群体始终将性能转移到老年女性群体；Refusal Vector方法减少重新分配但无法实现完全遗忘且显著降低保留性能

Conclusion: 当前遗忘方法存在根本限制：若不考虑嵌入几何结构，可能放大保留群体的偏见

Abstract: Machine unlearning enables models to selectively forget training data, driven by privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA. However, its fairness implications remain underexplored: when a model forgets a demographic group, does it neutralize that concept or redistribute it to correlated groups, potentially amplifying bias? We investigate this bias redistribution phenomenon on CelebA using CLIP models (ViT/B-32, ViT-L/14, ViT-B/16) under a zero-shot classification setting across intersectional groups defined by age and gender. We evaluate three unlearning methods, Prompt Erasure, Prompt Reweighting, and Refusal Vector using per-group accuracy shifts, demographic parity gaps, and a redistribution score. Our results show that unlearning does not eliminate bias but redistributes it primarily along gender rather than age boundaries. In particular, removing the dominant Young Female group consistently transfers performance to Old Female across all model scales, revealing a gender-dominant structure in CLIP's embedding space. While the Refusal Vector method reduces redistribution, it fails to achieve complete forgetting and significantly degrades retained performance. These findings highlight a fundamental limitation of current unlearning methods: without accounting for embedding geometry, they risk amplifying bias in retained groups.

</details>


### [436] [Multimodal Latent Reasoning via Predictive Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08065)
*Ashutosh Adhikari,Mirella Lapata*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Pearl是一个JEPA启发的框架，通过在潜在空间中学习专家工具使用轨迹，避免推理时的显式工具调用，从而减少推理开销并支持多步工具使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具增强的多模态推理方法存在三个主要问题：1) 推理开销大；2) 需要专门的监督；3) 工具调用容易出错。作者希望开发一种更高效、更简单的方法来提升视觉语言模型的感知能力。

Method: 提出Pearl框架，采用JEPA（联合嵌入预测架构）思想，在潜在空间中学习专家工具使用轨迹的预测嵌入。该方法不进行显式工具调用，而是直接学习从多模态轨迹中预测嵌入，保持了标准的视觉语言生成流程。框架是模型无关的，训练简单，自然支持多步工具调用。

Result: 在多个感知基准测试中，Pearl匹配或优于标准监督微调和基于重建的潜在推理方法。实验证据表明，基于重建的方法主要在潜在空间中学习嵌入而非图像编辑，这为预测嵌入学习提供了理论依据。

Conclusion: Pearl通过预测嵌入对齐在潜在空间中学习，避免了推理时的显式工具调用，提供了一种更高效、更简单的多模态推理方法，在保持性能的同时显著减少了推理开销。

Abstract: Tool-augmented multimodal reasoning enables visual language models (VLMs) to improve perception by interacting with external tools (e.g., cropping, depth estimation). However, such approaches incur substantial inference overhead, require specialized supervision, and are prone to erroneous tool calls. We propose Pearl (Predictive Embedding Alignment for Reasoning in Latent space), a JEPA-inspired framework that learns from expert tool-use trajectories entirely in the latent space, eliminating the need for explicit tool invocation at inference time. Unlike reconstruction-based latent reasoning methods, which autoregressively generate latent tokens and suffer from training-inference mismatch and limited support for multi-step tool use, Pearl directly learns predictive embeddings from multimodal trajectories while preserving the standard vision-language generation pipeline: it is model-agnostic, simple to train, and naturally supports trajectories with multiple tool calls. Experiments across multiple perception benchmarks show that Pearl matches or outperforms standard supervised fine-tuning and reconstruction-based latent reasoning approaches. Furthermore, we provide empirical evidence that reconstruction-based methods primarily learn embeddings rather than image edits in latent space, motivating predictive embedding learning as a more principled alternative.

</details>


### [437] [Automating aggregation strategy selection in federated learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08056)
*Dian S. Y. Pang,Endrias Y. Ergetu,Eric Topham,Ahmed E. Fetit*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个自动化联邦学习聚合策略选择的端到端框架，包含单次推理和多轮搜索两种模式，提升非IID条件下的鲁棒性和泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中聚合策略的选择对性能影响显著，但该选择因数据集、异构性水平和计算约束而异，需要自动化解决方案来减少人工干预

Method: 开发包含两种模式的框架：1) 单次推理模式：使用大语言模型根据用户提供或自动检测的数据特征推断合适策略；2) 多轮搜索模式：在有限预算下使用轻量级遗传算法高效探索替代方案

Result: 在多样化数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在非IID条件下增强了鲁棒性和泛化能力，同时减少了手动干预需求

Conclusion: 通过自动化联邦学习中最关键的设计决策之一——聚合策略选择，推动了可访问和自适应联邦学习的发展

Abstract: Federated Learning enables collaborative model training without centralising data, but its effectiveness varies with the selection of the aggregation strategy. This choice is non-trivial, as performance varies widely across datasets, heterogeneity levels, and compute constraints. We present an end-to-end framework that automates, streamlines, and adapts aggregation strategy selection for federated learning. The framework operates in two modes: a single-trial mode, where large language models infer suitable strategies from user-provided or automatically detected data characteristics, and a multi-trial mode, where a lightweight genetic search efficiently explores alternatives under constrained budgets. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets show that our approach enhances robustness and generalisation under non-IID conditions while reducing the need for manual intervention. Overall, this work advances towards accessible and adaptive federated learning by automating one of its most critical design decisions, the choice of an aggregation strategy.

</details>


### [438] [From Universal to Individualized Actionability: Revisiting Personalization in Algorithmic Recourse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08030)
*Lena Marie Budde,Ayan Majumdar,Richard Uth,Markus Langer,Isabel Valera*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究将个性化形式化为个体可操作性，包含硬约束和软约束两个维度，并集成到因果算法追索框架中，通过用户提示方法收集偏好，实证分析了个性化对追索有效性、成本和合理性的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 算法追索旨在提供可操作的推荐以改变不利模型结果，但个性化在追索中的作用大多隐含且未充分探索。现有方法虽通过用户交互融入个性化元素，但缺乏明确的个性化定义，也未系统分析其对其他追索期望特性的下游影响。

Method: 将个性化形式化为个体可操作性，包含两个维度：硬约束（指定哪些特征是个体可操作的）和软约束（捕捉对行动值和成本的偏好）。在因果算法追索框架中操作化这些维度，采用预提示用户方法，在生成任何追索推荐前通过排名或评分收集个人偏好。

Result: 实证评估显示个性化与追索期望特性存在重要权衡：个体可操作性约束（特别是硬约束）会显著降低追索推荐的合理性和有效性。此外，纳入个体可操作性会揭示不同社会人口群体在追索行动成本和合理性方面的差异。

Conclusion: 研究结果强调了在算法追索中需要原则性的个性化定义、谨慎的操作化和严格的评估。个性化虽重要，但需平衡其对追索其他期望特性的影响，并关注可能加剧的群体差异。

Abstract: Algorithmic recourse aims to provide actionable recommendations that enable individuals to change unfavorable model outcomes, and prior work has extensively studied properties such as efficiency, robustness, and fairness. However, the role of personalization in recourse remains largely implicit and underexplored. While existing approaches incorporate elements of personalization through user interactions, they typically lack an explicit definition of personalization and do not systematically analyze its downstream effects on other recourse desiderata.
  In this paper, we formalize personalization as individual actionability, characterized along two dimensions: hard constraints that specify which features are individually actionable, and soft, individualized constraints that capture preferences over action values and costs. We operationalize these dimensions within the causal algorithmic recourse framework, adopting a pre-hoc user-prompting approach in which individuals express preferences via rankings or scores prior to the generation of any recourse recommendation. Through extensive empirical evaluation, we investigate how personalization interacts with key recourse desiderata, including validity, cost, and plausibility. Our results highlight important trade-offs: individual actionability constraints, particularly hard ones, can substantially degrade the plausibility and validity of recourse recommendations across amortized and non-amortized approaches. Notably, we also find that incorporating individual actionability can reveal disparities in the cost and plausibility of recourse actions across socio-demographic groups. These findings underscore the need for principled definitions, careful operationalization, and rigorous evaluation of personalization in algorithmic recourse.

</details>


### [439] [The ecosystem of machine learning competitions: Platforms, participants, and their impact on AI development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08001)
*Ioannis Nasios*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究对机器学习竞赛（MLC）生态系统进行了全面分析，涵盖Kaggle和Zindi等主要平台的工作流程、评估方法、奖励结构、参与者和主办方动机，探讨了MLC在连接学术研究与工业应用、促进AI发展方面的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习竞赛在推动人工智能创新、技能发展和实际问题解决方面发挥着关键作用。研究旨在全面理解MLC生态系统，包括平台运作机制、参与者特征、主办方动机，以及这些竞赛如何塑造AI发展、促进合作并推动技术进步。

Method: 采用多方法研究设计：1）文献综述与综合；2）平台级数据分析（Kaggle、Zindi等主要竞赛平台）；3）从业者见解收集。通过分析竞赛工作流程、评估方法、奖励结构、参与者的专业水平和人口统计趋势，以及竞赛主办方的动机，构建对MLC生态系统的全面理解。

Result: 研究发现MLC在学术研究和工业应用的交汇处运作，促进了跨领域的知识、数据和实践方法交流。竞赛与开源社区的紧密联系进一步推动了ML生态系统内的协作、可重复性和持续创新。MLC通过塑造研究重点、影响行业标准、实现大规模众包问题解决，在AI持续演进中扮演关键角色。研究还揭示了顶级参赛者的人口统计趋势和竞赛质量评估。

Conclusion: 机器学习竞赛是AI发展的重要驱动力，连接了学术与工业领域，促进了知识共享和技术创新。研究为研究人员、从业者和竞赛组织者提供了有价值的见解，并探讨了MLC对未来AI发展的持续影响和演进轨迹。这些竞赛在推动技术进步、培养人才和解决实际问题方面具有长期战略价值。

Abstract: Machine learning competitions (MLCs) play a pivotal role in advancing artificial intelligence (AI) by fostering innovation, skill development, and practical problem-solving. This study provides a comprehensive analysis of major competition platforms such as Kaggle and Zindi, examining their workflows, evaluation methodologies, and reward structures. It further assesses competition quality, participant expertise, and global reach, with particular attention to demographic trends among top-performing competitors. By exploring the motivations of competition hosts, this paper underscores the significant role of MLCs in shaping AI development, promoting collaboration, and driving impactful technological progress. Furthermore, by combining literature synthesis with platform-level data analysis and practitioner insights a comprehensive understanding of the MLC ecosystem is provided.
  Moreover, the paper demonstrates that MLCs function at the intersection of academic research and industrial application, fostering the exchange of knowledge, data, and practical methodologies across domains. Their strong ties to open-source communities further promote collaboration, reproducibility, and continuous innovation within the broader ML ecosystem. By shaping research priorities, informing industry standards, and enabling large-scale crowdsourced problem-solving, these competitions play a key role in the ongoing evolution of AI. The study provides insights relevant to researchers, practitioners, and competition organizers, and includes an examination of the future trajectory and sustained influence of MLCs on AI development.

</details>


### [440] [Benchmarking Deep Learning for Future Liver Remnant Segmentation in Colorectal Liver Metastasis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07999)
*Anthony T. Wu,Arghavan Rezvani,Kela Liu,Roozbeh Houshyar,Pooya Khosravi,Whitney Li,Xiaohui Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究创建了首个经过验证的开放基准数据集，用于结直肠癌肝转移（CRLM）手术规划中的未来肝脏残体（FLR）分割，并建立了多种深度学习模型的基线性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FLR的准确分割对于CRLM手术规划至关重要，可预防致命的术后肝衰竭。然而，由于复杂的切除边界、错综的肝血管系统和弥漫性转移病灶，该分割任务具有技术挑战性。开发自动化AI工具的主要瓶颈是缺乏高质量、经过验证的数据。

Method: 1. 手动精修公开数据集CRLM-CT-Seg中的所有197个CT体积，创建首个开放源、经过验证的基准数据集；2. 建立首个分割基线，比较级联策略（肝脏->CRLM->FLR）和端到端策略，使用nnU-Net、SwinUNETR和STU-Net三种深度学习模型。

Result: 级联nnU-Net在最终FLR分割上获得最佳Dice分数（0.767），而预训练的STU-Net在CRLM分割上表现最优（0.620 Dice），并且对级联错误具有显著更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该工作提供了首个经过验证的基准数据集和可复现的框架，将加速AI辅助手术规划的研究进展。

Abstract: Accurate segmentation of the future liver remnant (FLR) is critical for surgical planning in colorectal liver metastases (CRLM) to prevent fatal post-hepatectomy liver failure. However, this segmentation task is technically challenging due to complex resection boundaries, convoluted hepatic vasculature and diffuse metastatic lesions. A primary bottleneck in developing automated AI tools has been the lack of high-fidelity, validated data. We address this gap by manually refining all 197 volumes from the public CRLM-CT-Seg dataset, creating the first open-source, validated benchmark for this task. We then establish the first segmentation baselines, comparing cascaded (Liver->CRLM->FLR) and end-to-end (E2E) strategies using nnU-Net, SwinUNETR, and STU-Net. We find a cascaded nnU-Net achieves the best final FLR segmentation Dice (0.767), while the pretrained STU-Net provides superior CRLM segmentation (0.620 Dice) and is significantly more robust to cascaded errors. This work provides the first validated benchmark and a reproducible framework to accelerate research in AI-assisted surgical planning.

</details>


### [441] [Is your algorithm unlearning or untraining?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07962)
*Eleni Triantafillou,Ahmed Imtiaz Humayun,Monica Ribero,Alexander Matt Turner,Michael C. Mozer,Georgios Kaissis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文指出当前"机器遗忘"研究领域存在概念混淆，提出了"遗忘"和"去训练"两个不同问题的区分，旨在澄清技术定义并推动该领域发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着模型规模扩大和数据量增加，如何从已训练模型中"删除"特定数据点或行为成为研究热点。但作者发现"遗忘"这一术语被过度使用，文献中缺乏对不同问题表述的区分，导致算法预期效果模糊、评估指标不当、结果难以解释，以及错失重要研究方向。

Method: 作者通过建立"遗忘"和"去训练"两个基本概念的区分来澄清问题。"去训练"旨在逆转在特定遗忘集上的训练效果，即消除这些具体示例在训练过程中对模型的影响。而"遗忘"不仅要消除这些具体示例的影响，还要利用这些示例更广泛地移除它们所代表的整个底层分布（如概念或行为）。

Result: 提出了清晰的技术定义框架，将文献中的问题设置映射到这两个概念中。建立了区分两种不同"遗忘"目标的系统性方法，为领域提供了概念澄清。

Conclusion: 需要区分"遗忘"和"去训练"这两个不同问题，这种区分对于澄清技术定义、识别被忽视的研究问题至关重要，是加速"遗忘"领域发展的关键缺失步骤。作者希望以此启动关于技术定义澄清的讨论。

Abstract: As models are getting larger and are trained on increasing amounts of data, there has been an explosion of interest into how we can ``delete'' specific data points or behaviours from a trained model, after the fact. This goal has been referred to as ``machine unlearning''. In this note, we argue that the term ``unlearning'' has been overloaded, with different research efforts spanning two distinct problem formulations, but without that distinction having been observed or acknowledged in the literature. This causes various issues, including ambiguity around when an algorithm is expected to work, use of inappropriate metrics and baselines when comparing different algorithms to one another, difficulty in interpreting results, as well as missed opportunities for pursuing critical research directions. In this note, we address this issue by establishing a fundamental distinction between two notions that we identify as \unlearning and \untraining, illustrated in Figure 1. In short, \untraining aims to reverse the effect of having trained on a given forget set, i.e. to remove the influence that that specific forget set examples had on the model during training. On the other hand, the goal of \unlearning is not just to remove the influence of those given examples, but to use those examples for the purpose of more broadly removing the entire underlying distribution from which those examples were sampled (e.g. the concept or behaviour that those examples represent). We discuss technical definitions of these problems and map problem settings studied in the literature to each. We hope to initiate discussions on disambiguating technical definitions and identify a set of overlooked research questions, as we believe that this a key missing step for accelerating progress in the field of ``unlearning''.

</details>


### [442] [Rethinking Residual Errors in Compensation-based LLM Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07955)
*Shuaiting Li,Juncan Deng,Kedong Xu,Rongtao Deng,Hong Gu,Minghan Jiang,Haibin Shen,Kejie Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出ResComp方法，通过重新定义残差误差目标，将量化模型输出与原始全精度模型输出对齐，显著改进了GPTQ和GPTAQ的量化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于权重补偿的量化方法（如GPTQ、GPTAQ）在校准过程中存在次优目标：它们将量化输出与补偿权重的输出对齐，而非与原始全精度模型的真实输出对齐。这导致残差误差定义不准确，限制了量化性能的进一步提升。

Method: 1. 重新定义校准目标：将量化模型输出与原始全精度模型输出在每个步骤精确对齐；2. 识别补偿感知误差：揭示残差误差不仅来自前一层输出差异，还来自每层内补偿权重与原始权重之间的差异；3. 继承GPTAQ的神经元分解技术，将补偿感知误差高效整合到权重更新过程中。

Result: 在各种LLM和量化设置上的广泛实验表明，所提增强方法能与GPTQ和GPTAQ无缝集成，显著提升它们的量化性能。代码已公开在GitHub上。

Conclusion: 通过重新定义残差误差目标并识别补偿感知误差，ResComp方法有效改进了现有基于权重补偿的量化框架，为LLM量化提供了更精确的校准方案。

Abstract: Methods based on weight compensation, which iteratively apply quantization and weight compensation to minimize the output error, have recently demonstrated remarkable success in quantizing Large Language Models (LLMs). The representative work, GPTQ, introduces several key techniques that make such iterative methods practical for LLMs with billions of parameters. GPTAQ extends this approach by introducing an asymmetric calibration process that aligns the output of each quantized layer with its full-precision counterpart, incorporating a residual error into the weight compensation framework. In this work, we revisit the formulation of the residual error. We identify a sub-optimal calibration objective in existing methods: during the intra-layer calibration process, they align the quantized output with the output from compensated weights, rather than the true output from the original full-precision model. Therefore, we redefine the objective to precisely align the quantized model's output with the original output of the full-precision model at each step. We then reveal that the residual error originates not only from the output difference of the preceding layer but also from the discrepancy between the compensated and original weights within each layer, which we name the 'compensation-aware error'. By inheriting the neuron decomposition technique from GPTAQ, we can efficiently incorporate this compensation-aware error into the weight update process. Extensive experiments on various LLMs and quantization settings demonstrate that our proposed enhancements integrate seamlessly with both GPTQ and GPTAQ, significantly improving their quantization performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/list0830/ResComp.

</details>


### [443] [Pruning Extensions and Efficiency Trade-Offs for Sustainable Time Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07953)
*Raphael Fischer,Angus Dempster,Sebastian Buschjäger,Matthias Jakobs,Urav Maniar,Geoffrey I. Webb*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个全面的时间序列分类评估框架，探索预测性能与资源消耗的平衡，通过理论有界的剪枝策略提升效率，并提出了新的可剪枝混合分类器Hydrant。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列分类缺乏对模型、数据集和硬件之间性能权衡的统一理解，且现有方法未经过严格的能源效率评估。需要建立综合考虑预测性能和资源消耗的评估框架。

Method: 提出整体评估框架，应用理论有界的剪枝策略到领先的混合分类器Hydra和Quant，并开发新的可剪枝混合分类器Hydrant。在20个MONSTER数据集、13种方法和三种计算设置上进行超过4000个实验配置的系统分析。

Result: 剪枝能显著降低能耗达80%，同时保持有竞争力的预测质量，通常仅损失模型不到5%的准确率。系统分析了模型设计、超参数和硬件选择对实际TSC性能的影响。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法、实验结果和配套软件推动了时间序列分类向可持续和可重复实践的发展，为平衡预测性能和资源消耗提供了系统评估框架。

Abstract: Time series classification (TSC) enables important use cases, however lacks a unified understanding of performance trade-offs across models, datasets, and hardware. While resource awareness has grown in the field, TSC methods have not yet been rigorously evaluated for energy efficiency. This paper introduces a holistic evaluation framework that explicitly explores the balance of predictive performance and resource consumption in TSC. To boost efficiency, we apply a theoretically bounded pruning strategy to leading hybrid classifiers - Hydra and Quant - and present Hydrant, a novel, prunable combination of both. With over 4000 experimental configurations across 20 MONSTER datasets, 13 methods, and three compute setups, we systematically analyze how model design, hyperparameters, and hardware choices affect practical TSC performance. Our results showcase that pruning can significantly reduce energy consumption by up to 80% while maintaining competitive predictive quality, usually costing the model less than 5% of accuracy.
