Extensive experiments across SANA, FLUX.1, and SD3.5-L substantiate that our approach delivers superior alignment performance across multiple metrics while accelerating training convergence by up to $4.64\times$, unlocking the power of massive rollout scaling at a fraction of the cost.

</details>


### [483] [Super Agents and Confounders: Influence of surrounding agents on vehicle trajectory prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03463)
*Daniel Jost,Luca Paparusso,Martin Stoll,Jörg Wagner,Raghu Rajan,Joschka Bödecker*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文发现现有轨迹预测模型存在严重缺陷：过多周围交通参与者信息反而降低预测精度，模型学习到不稳定、非因果的决策模式。提出基于条件信息瓶颈的方法，无需额外监督即可有效压缩并忽略无益的智能体特征，提升预测性能和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型通常假设周围交通参与者信息能改善预测，但研究发现许多模型实际上学习到不稳定、非因果的决策模式，过多周围智能体信息反而降低预测准确性。需要解决如何选择性整合上下文信息的问题。

Method: 使用Shapley-based attribution分析模型决策模式，揭示其不稳定性和非因果性。提出集成条件信息瓶颈（CIB），该模块无需额外监督，训练模型有效压缩智能体特征并忽略对预测任务无益的特征。

Result: 在多个数据集和模型架构上的综合实验表明，该方法不仅在许多情况下提高了整体轨迹预测性能，还增强了对不同扰动的鲁棒性。同时提供了可解释的指标来识别非鲁棒行为。

Conclusion: 轨迹预测中需要选择性整合上下文信息，因为其中常包含虚假或误导性信号。提出的条件信息瓶颈方法为解决这一问题提供了有前景的途径，同时提供了识别非鲁棒行为的可解释指标。

Abstract: In highly interactive driving scenes, trajectory prediction is conditioned on information from surrounding traffic participants such as cars and pedestrians. Our main contribution is a comprehensive analysis of state-of-the-art trajectory predictors, which reveals a surprising and critical flaw: many surrounding agents degrade prediction accuracy rather than improve it. Using Shapley-based attribution, we rigorously demonstrate that models learn unstable and non-causal decision-making schemes that vary significantly across training runs. Building on these insights, we propose to integrate a Conditional Information Bottleneck (CIB), which does not require additional supervision and is trained to effectively compress agent features as well as ignore those that are not beneficial for the prediction task. Comprehensive experiments using multiple datasets and model architectures demonstrate that this simple yet effective approach not only improves overall trajectory prediction performance in many cases but also increases robustness to different perturbations. Our results highlight the importance of selectively integrating contextual information, which can often contain spurious or misleading signals, in trajectory prediction. Moreover, we provide interpretable metrics for identifying non-robust behavior and present a promising avenue towards a solution.

</details>


### [484] [Lumbermark: Resistant Clustering by Chopping Up Mutual Reachability Minimum Spanning Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07143)
*Marek Gagolewski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Lumbermark是一种鲁棒的可分聚类算法，能够检测不同大小、密度和形状的簇，通过迭代切割数据集互达最小生成树的突出部分来工作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要一种能够处理不同大小、密度和形状的簇的鲁棒聚类算法，同时减少低密度对象（如噪声点和离群值）的影响，并提供用户可指定大小的分区作为HDBSCAN的替代方案。

Method: 使用互达距离平滑数据分布，构建互达最小生成树，然后迭代地切割通过数据集互达最小生成树突出部分连接的大分支。该方法可以看作是HDBSCAN的替代方案，但能生成用户指定大小的分区。

Result: Lumbermark在基准数据上表现良好，提供了快速易用的Python和R开源实现（'lumbermark'包），有望成为数据科学家和从业者的有用工具。

Conclusion: Lumbermark是一种有效的可分聚类算法，能够处理复杂的数据分布，减少噪声影响，并提供灵活的分区控制，在不同领域的数据科学应用中具有实用价值。

Abstract: We introduce Lumbermark, a robust divisive clustering algorithm capable of detecting clusters of varying sizes, densities, and shapes. Lumbermark iteratively chops off large limbs connected by protruding segments of a dataset's mutual reachability minimum spanning tree. The use of mutual reachability distances smoothens the data distribution and decreases the influence of low-density objects, such as noise points between clusters or outliers at their peripheries. The algorithm can be viewed as an alternative to HDBSCAN that produces partitions with user-specified sizes. A fast, easy-to-use implementation of the new method is available in the open-source 'lumbermark' package for Python and R. We show that Lumbermark performs well on benchmark data and hope it will prove useful to data scientists and practitioners across different fields.

</details>


### [485] [Selective Neuron Amplification for Training-Free Task Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07098)
*Ryyan Akhtar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出选择性神经元放大（SNA）方法，在推理时增强任务相关神经元的影响而不改变模型参数，解决大语言模型因神经元激活不足而非知识缺失导致的失败问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型经常在看似已理解的任务上失败，实验表明这更多是由于推理过程中某些内部回路未被充分激活，而非知识缺失。需要一种能在推理时增强相关神经元影响而不永久改变模型的方法。

Method: 提出选择性神经元放大（SNA）方法，在推理过程中识别并增强与特定任务相关的神经元激活，不改变模型参数，仅在推理时临时调整神经元影响权重。

Result: SNA主要在模型不确定时有效，当模型已有信心时影响较小。这表明某些模型失败是由于弱激活而非能力不足，SNA能有效改善模型在不确定情况下的表现。

Conclusion: 大语言模型的某些失败源于内部回路激活不足而非能力缺失，SNA提供了一种无需参数更新的推理时干预方法，为理解模型失败机制和改善模型表现提供了新视角。

Abstract: Large language models often fail on tasks they seem to already understand. In our experiments, this appears to be less about missing knowledge and more about certain internal circuits not being strongly activated during inference. We explore Selective Neuron Amplification, which increases the influence of task relevant neurons without changing the model's parameters. The method works at inference time and does not permanently alter the model. SNA helps mainly when the model is uncertain, while having low effect when the model is already confident. This suggests that some model failures are due to weak activation rather than lack of capability.

</details>


### [486] [Are Stochastic Multi-objective Bandits Harder than Single-objective Bandits?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07096)
*Changkun Guan,Mengfan Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明在随机多目标赌博机问题中，帕累托遗憾由最大次优间隙g†决定，而非维度数，并提出了达到最优O(KlogT/g†)帕累托遗憾的算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多目标赌博机中帕累托遗憾是否比单目标问题更难优化存在争议。现有研究表明在随机设置中帕累托遗憾随维度增加而增长，但对抗设置中帕累托遗憾与经典遗憾相当。这种矛盾现象促使研究核心问题：多目标赌博机是否真的比单目标更难？

Method: 提出新算法，采用双层不确定性量化（上置信界和下置信界估计器），结合top-two竞赛策略进行臂选择，以及不确定性贪婪规则进行维度选择，平衡两层探索与利用。

Result: 证明在随机设置中帕累托遗憾由最大次优间隙g†决定，下界为Ω(KlogT/g†)，算法达到最优O(KlogT/g†)帕累托遗憾。数值实验验证了理论保证并显著优于基准方法。

Conclusion: 多目标赌博机在随机设置中并不比单目标更难，帕累托遗憾由最大次优间隙而非维度决定，提出的算法达到最优性能，解决了长期存在的争议。

Abstract: Multi-objective bandits have attracted increasing attention because of their broad applicability and mathematical elegance, where the reward of each arm is a multi-dimensional vector rather than a scalar. This naturally introduces Pareto order relations and Pareto regret. A long-standing question in this area is whether performance is fundamentally harder to optimize because of this added complexity. A recent surprising result shows that, in the adversarial setting, Pareto regret is no larger than classical regret; however, in the stochastic setting, where the regret notion is different, the picture remains unclear. In fact, existing work suggests that Pareto regret in the stochastic case increases with the dimensionality. This controversial yet subtle phenomenon motivates our central question: \emph{are multi-objective bandits actually harder than single-objective ones?} We answer this question in full by showing that, in the stochastic setting, Pareto regret is in fact governed by the maximum sub-optimality gap \(g^\dagger\), and hence by the minimum marginal regret of order \(Ω(\frac{K\log T}{g^\dagger})\). We further develop a new algorithm that achieves Pareto regret of order \(O(\frac{K\log T}{g^\dagger})\), and is therefore optimal. The algorithm leverages a nested two-layer uncertainty quantification over both arms and objectives through upper and lower confidence bound estimators. It combines a top-two racing strategy for arm selection with an uncertainty-greedy rule for dimension selection. Together, these components balance exploration and exploitation across the two layers. We also conduct comprehensive numerical experiments to validate the proposed algorithm, showing the desired regret guarantee and significant gains over benchmark methods.

</details>


### [487] [Mining Electronic Health Records to Investigate Effectiveness of Ensemble Deep Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07085)
*Manar D. Samad,Yina Hou,Shrabani Ghosh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种集成深度聚类方法，通过聚合多个嵌入维度的聚类结果来改进传统和深度学习方法在电子健康记录患者聚类中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录中患者聚类和疾病亚型识别对阐明病理生理学和辅助临床决策至关重要，但当前医疗信息学中的聚类仍主要基于传统方法（特别是K-means），在应用于自编码器学习的嵌入表示时效果有限。深度学习方法主要针对图像聚类设计，与表格型EHR数据存在显著差异。

Method: 提出集成深度聚类方法：1）通过聚合多个嵌入维度的聚类分配，而非依赖单一固定嵌入空间；2）将传统聚类与深度聚类结合在新型集成框架中；3）强调基于生物性别特异性对EHR数据进行聚类。

Result: 在All of Us研究项目的真实EHR数据上评估14种不同聚类方法，提出的集成嵌入深度聚类方法在多个患者队列中获得了最佳整体性能排名。传统聚类方法表现稳健，而集成方法进一步提升了性能。

Conclusion: 强调EHR数据生物性别特异性聚类的重要性，证明结合传统和深度聚类方法的集成框架优于单一方法，为医疗信息学中的患者聚类提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: In electronic health records (EHRs), clustering patients and distinguishing disease subtypes are key tasks to elucidate pathophysiology and aid clinical decision-making. However, clustering in healthcare informatics is still based on traditional methods, especially K-means, and has achieved limited success when applied to embedding representations learned by autoencoders as hybrid methods. This paper investigates the effectiveness of traditional, hybrid, and deep learning methods in heart failure patient cohorts using real EHR data from the All of Us Research Program. Traditional clustering methods perform robustly because deep learning approaches are specifically designed for image clustering, a task that differs substantially from the tabular EHR data setting. To address the shortcomings of deep clustering, we introduce an ensemble-based deep clustering approach that aggregates cluster assignments obtained from multiple embedding dimensions, rather than relying on a single fixed embedding space. When combined with traditional clustering in a novel ensemble framework, the proposed ensemble embedding for deep clustering delivers the best overall performance ranking across 14 diverse clustering methods and multiple patient cohorts. This paper underscores the importance of biological sex-specific clustering of EHR data and the advantages of combining traditional and deep clustering approaches over a single method.

</details>


### [488] [Epistemic Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07072)
*Abhilash Reddy Chenreddy,Erick Delage*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种离线强化学习新框架，用紧凑的不确定性集合替代离散集成，解决数据覆盖不足导致的认知不确定性，在风险敏感策略下实现更好的鲁棒性和泛化性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习中，由于固定数据集覆盖有限或存在偏差（特别是行为策略系统性地避开某些动作），会产生认知不确定性，导致价值估计不准确和泛化不可靠。现有的集成方法（如SAC-N）虽然通过集成最小值保守估计Q值，但需要大型集成且常混淆认知不确定性和偶然不确定性。

Method: 提出统一且可泛化的框架，用紧凑的Q值不确定性集合替代离散集成。进一步引入基于Epinet的模型，直接优化不确定性集合以在鲁棒贝尔曼目标下最大化累积奖励，无需依赖集成。同时建立了评估离线RL算法在风险敏感行为策略下的基准。

Result: 方法在表格和连续状态域中均实现了比基于集成的基线方法更好的鲁棒性和泛化性能，特别是在风险敏感行为策略设置下表现优异。

Conclusion: 提出的不确定性集合框架有效解决了离线强化学习中的认知不确定性挑战，避免了大型集成的计算负担和不确定性混淆问题，为风险敏感场景下的离线RL提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning learns policies from fixed datasets without further environment interaction. A key challenge in this setting is epistemic uncertainty, arising from limited or biased data coverage, particularly when the behavior policy systematically avoids certain actions. This can lead to inaccurate value estimates and unreliable generalization. Ensemble-based methods like SAC-N mitigate this by conservatively estimating Q-values using the ensemble minimum, but they require large ensembles and often conflate epistemic with aleatoric uncertainty. To address these limitations, we propose a unified and generalizable framework that replaces discrete ensembles with compact uncertainty sets over Q-values. %We further introduce an Epinet based model that directly shapes the uncertainty sets to optimize the cumulative reward under the robust Bellman objective without relying on ensembles. We also introduce a benchmark for evaluating offline RL algorithms under risk-sensitive behavior policies, and demonstrate that our method achieves improved robustness and generalization over ensemble-based baselines across both tabular and continuous state domains.

</details>


### [489] [AdaBoost Does Not Always Cycle: A Computer-Assisted Counterexample](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07055)
*Erik Y. Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究通过计算机辅助构造反例，证明了Rudin等人提出的关于AdaBoost是否总是收敛到有限循环的开放问题是否定的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Rudin、Schapire和Daubechies在2012年COLT会议上提出的开放问题：穷举AdaBoost是否总是收敛到有限循环。这个问题在机器学习理论中具有重要意义，涉及AdaBoost算法的收敛性质。

Method: 基于块乘积构造的反例设计，其中两个因子共享精确的周期-2轨道（5步分支映射），但其线性化返回映射的主导特征值具有无理对数比。这种无理性质迫使突发获胜序列具有无理渐近频率，从而排除了最终周期性。所有断言都通过精确有理算术进行验证。

Result: 成功构造了计算机辅助反例，证明穷举AdaBoost不一定收敛到有限循环。反例的关键在于突发获胜序列具有无理渐近频率，这排除了最终周期性，从而回答了开放问题。

Conclusion: 穷举AdaBoost不总是收敛到有限循环，解决了Rudin等人提出的开放问题。该反例基于块乘积构造，利用无理对数比特征值确保序列的非周期性。研究采用了精确有理算术验证，并与AI系统GPT-5.4 Pro和Claude Opus 4.6合作完成。

Abstract: We give a computer-assisted counterexample to the open question, posed by Rudin, Schapire, and Daubechies in COLT 2012, of whether exhaustive AdaBoost always converges to a finite cycle. The construction is based on a block-product gadget whose two factors share an exact period-2 orbit for their 5-step branch maps, but whose linearized return maps have dominant eigenvalues with an irrational logarithmic ratio. This irrationality forces the burst-winner sequence to have an irrational asymptotic frequency, precluding eventual periodicity. All assertions are certified by exact rational arithmetic. This work was developed in collaboration with GPT-5.4 Pro and Claude Opus 4.6.

</details>


### [490] [MoE Routing Testbed: Studying Expert Specialization and Routing Behavior at Small Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07030)
*Tobias Falke,Nicolas Anastassacos,Samson Tan,Chankrisna Richy Meas,Chandana Satya Prakash,Nitesh Sekhar,M Saiful Bari,Krishna Kompella,Gamaleldin F. Elsayed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MoE路由测试平台，用于在小规模下清晰评估专家路由动态，通过可区分域的数据混合和理想路由基准，量化专家专业化程度，发现平衡范围是关键因素


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏混合专家架构在大型语言模型中日益流行，但存在训练挑战：需要所有专家得到良好训练并以非冗余方式专业化。当前缺乏评估指标，且小规模路由技术表现相似，无法反映大规模行为

Method: 提出MoE路由测试平台：1) 使用具有清晰可区分域的数据混合；2) 基于这些域提供理想路由的参考路由器，建立明确的上界；3) 实现专家专业化的量化测量

Result: 比较多种MoE路由方法，发现平衡范围是允许专业化同时保持高专家利用率的关键因素。该观察在35倍更大的模型中得到验证

Conclusion: MoE路由测试平台为小规模路由动态提供了清晰可见性，能够量化评估专家专业化，平衡范围是实现有效专家专业化的核心设计原则

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures are increasingly popular for frontier large language models (LLM) but they introduce training challenges due to routing complexity. Fully leveraging parameters of an MoE model requires all experts to be well-trained and to specialize in non-redundant ways. Assessing this, however, is complicated due to lack of established metrics and, importantly, many routing techniques exhibit similar performance at smaller sizes, which is often not reflective of their behavior at large scale. To address this challenge, we propose the MoE Routing Testbed, a setup that gives clearer visibility into routing dynamics at small scale while using realistic data. The testbed pairs a data mix with clearly distinguishable domains with a reference router that prescribes ideal routing based on these domains, providing a well-defined upper bound for comparison. This enables quantifiable measurement of expert specialization. To demonstrate the value of the testbed, we compare various MoE routing approaches and show that balancing scope is the crucial factor that allows specialization while maintaining high expert utilization. We confirm that this observation generalizes to models 35x larger.

</details>


### [491] [Learning to Query History: Nonstationary Classification via Learned Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07027)
*Jimmy Gammell,Bishal Thapaliya,Yoon Jung,Riyasat Ohib,Bilel Fehri,Deepayan Chakrabarti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种通过检索历史标记样本来处理非平稳分类问题的方法，将分类任务重构为时间序列预测，使用离散检索机制从历史数据中采样相关示例，提高对分布漂移的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际分类场景中普遍存在非平稳性，导致已部署模型即使在训练时对保留集泛化良好，在实际应用中性能也会下降。传统方法无法有效应对分布漂移问题。

Method: 将非平稳分类重构为时间序列预测：分类器不仅基于当前输入，还基于超出训练截止点的历史标记示例序列。引入学习型离散检索机制，通过输入相关查询采样历史示例，使用基于分数的梯度估计器与分类器端到端训练，允许历史数据在训练和部署期间保留在任意文件系统中。

Result: 在合成基准测试和Amazon Reviews '23（电子产品类别）上的实验表明，相比标准分类器，该方法对分布漂移具有更好的鲁棒性，且随着历史数据序列长度增加，VRAM使用量可预测地扩展。

Conclusion: 通过将分类重构为时间序列预测并引入可扩展的离散检索机制，能够有效应对非平稳分类问题，提高模型在分布漂移下的鲁棒性，同时保持内存使用的可预测性。

Abstract: Nonstationarity is ubiquitous in practical classification settings, leading deployed models to perform poorly even when they generalize well to holdout sets available at training time. We address this by reframing nonstationary classification as time series prediction: rather than predicting from the current input alone, we condition the classifier on a sequence of historical labeled examples that extends beyond the training cutoff. To scale to large sequences, we introduce a learned discrete retrieval mechanism that samples relevant historical examples via input-dependent queries, trained end-to-end with the classifier using a score-based gradient estimator. This enables the full corpus of historical data to remain on an arbitrary filesystem during training and deployment. Experiments on synthetic benchmarks and Amazon Reviews '23 (electronics category) show improved robustness to distribution shift compared to standard classifiers, with VRAM scaling predictably as the length of the historical data sequence increases.

</details>


### [492] [Predictive Representations for Skill Transfer in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07016)
*Ruben Vereecken,Luke Dickens,Alessandra Russo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于状态抽象的强化学习迁移新方法——结果预测状态表示（OPSRs），通过任务无关的紧凑环境观测（结果）构建智能体中心的状态表示，并引入基于OPSR的技能实现跨任务知识迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习扩展的关键挑战是泛化学习行为。如果没有迁移已获得知识的能力，智能体必须从零开始学习每个任务。本文旨在通过状态抽象解决强化学习中的迁移问题，构建能够跨任务重用的表示和技能。

Method: 提出结果预测状态表示（OPSRs）——基于任务无关、紧凑的环境观测（结果）构建的智能体中心状态抽象，由结果预测组成。进一步引入基于OPSR的技能（基于选项的抽象动作），这些技能可通过状态抽象在任务间重用。通过演示学习OPSR技能，并在新任务中验证其有效性。

Result: 理论分析和实证研究表明，OPSRs具有最优但有限的迁移潜力。通过引入OPSR技能克服了这一限制，在实证研究中，从演示学习的OPSR技能显著加速了全新未见任务的学习过程，无需任何预处理。

Conclusion: 本文提出的框架是强化学习中迁移问题的重要进展，特别是通过结合状态和动作抽象实现迁移。OPSR及其技能为跨任务知识重用提供了有前景的解决方案，有望推动强化学习的可扩展性发展。

Abstract: A key challenge in scaling up Reinforcement Learning is generalizing learned behaviour. Without the ability to carry forward acquired knowledge an agent is doomed to learn each task from scratch. In this paper we develop a new formalism for transfer by virtue of state abstraction. Based on task-independent, compact observations (outcomes) of the environment, we introduce Outcome-Predictive State Representations (OPSRs), agent-centered and task-independent abstractions that are made up of predictions of outcomes. We show formally and empirically that they have the potential for optimal but limited transfer, then overcome this trade-off by introducing OPSR-based skills, i.e. abstract actions (based on options) that can be reused between tasks as a result of state abstraction. In a series of empirical studies, we learn OPSR-based skills from demonstrations and show how they speed up learning considerably in entirely new and unseen tasks without any pre-processing. We believe that the framework introduced in this work is a promising step towards transfer in RL in general, and towards transfer through combining state and action abstraction specifically.

</details>


### [493] [Frailty Estimation in Elderly Oncology Patients Using Multimodal Wearable Data and Multi-Instance Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06985)
*Ioannis Kyprakis,Vasileios Skaramagkas,Georgia Karanasiou,Lampros Lakkas,Andri Papakonstantinou,Domen Ribnikar,Kalliopi Keramida,Dorothea Tsekoura,Ketti Mazzocco,Anastasia Constantinidou,Konstantinos Marias,Dimitrios I. Fotiadis,Manolis Tsiknakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于多模态可穿戴设备的衰弱相关功能变化预测框架，使用注意力多示例学习融合智能手表活动/睡眠和心电图心率变异性数据，预测老年乳腺癌患者握力和FACIT-F评分变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 衰弱和功能衰退严重影响老年癌症患者的治疗耐受性和预后，但传统评估仅限于不频繁的门诊随访，无法捕捉日常生活中的功能变化。

Method: 使用多模态可穿戴设备（智能手表记录活动/睡眠特征，胸带记录心电图心率变异性特征），构建患者时间窗口袋（M3和M6随访点），采用注意力多示例学习模型融合不规则、多模态数据，处理真实世界数据缺失和弱监督问题，预测握力和FACIT-F评分相对于基线的离散化变化类别（恶化、稳定、改善）。

Result: 在留一受试者交叉验证下，完整多模态模型在M3和M6时间点对握力预测的平衡准确率/F1分别为0.68±0.08/0.67±0.09和0.70±0.10/0.69±0.08；对FACIT-F预测分别为0.59±0.04/0.58±0.06和0.64±0.05/0.63±0.07。消融实验表明智能手表活动/睡眠数据提供最强预测信息，心率变异性与智能手表数据融合时提供补充信息。

Conclusion: 多模态可穿戴设备结合注意力多示例学习能够有效监测老年乳腺癌患者衰弱相关功能变化，为临床提供连续、客观的功能评估工具，智能手表活动/睡眠数据是主要预测信息来源，心电图心率变异性数据提供补充价值。

Abstract: Frailty and functional decline strongly influence treatment tolerance and outcomes in older patients with cancer, yet assessment is typically limited to infrequent clinic visits. We propose a multimodal wearable framework to estimate frailty-related functional change between visits in elderly breast cancer patients enrolled in the multicenter CARDIOCARE study. Free-living smartwatch physical activity and sleep features are combined with ECG-derived heart rate variability (HRV) features from a chest strap and organized into patient-horizon bags aligned to month 3 (M3) and month 6 (M6) follow-ups. Our innovation is an attention-based multiple instance learning (MIL) formulation that fuses irregular, multimodal wearable instances under real-world missingness and weak supervision. An attention-based MIL model with modality-specific multilayer perceptron (MLP) encoders with embedding dimension 128 aggregates variable-length and partially missing longitudinal instances to predict discretized change-from-baseline classes (worsened, stable, improved) for FACIT-F and handgrip strength. Under subject-independent leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) evaluation, the full multimodal model achieved balanced accuracy/F1 of 0.68 +/- 0.08/0.67 +/- 0.09 at M3 and 0.70 +/- 0.10/0.69 +/- 0.08 at M6 for handgrip, and 0.59 +/- 0.04/0.58 +/- 0.06 at M3 and 0.64 +/- 0.05/0.63 +/- 0.07 at M6 for FACIT-F. Ablation results indicated that smartwatch activity and sleep provide the strongest predictive information for frailty-related functional changes, while HRV contributes complementary information when fused with smartwatch streams.

</details>


### [494] [GAN-based Domain Adaptation for Image-aware Layout Generation in Advertising Poster Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07409)
*Chenchen Xu,Min Zhou,Tiezheng Ge,Weiwei Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CGL-Dataset数据集和两种GAN模型（CGL-GAN和PDA-GAN），用于生成基于产品图像的广告海报图形布局，其中PDA-GAN通过像素级判别器实现无监督域适应，在图像感知布局生成上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 布局在平面设计和海报生成中至关重要。现有基于深度学习的布局生成方法需要成对的产品图像和布局数据集，但真实世界中这种配对数据稀缺。本文旨在解决图像条件化布局生成任务，特别是处理修复后海报与干净产品图像之间的域差距问题。

Method: 1. 构建CGL-Dataset：包含60,548个带标注的修复后海报配对数据和121,000个干净产品图像；2. 提出CGL-GAN：对修复区域应用高斯模糊生成布局；3. 提出PDA-GAN：结合无监督域适应，引入像素级判别器（PD）连接到浅层特征图，为每个输入图像像素计算GAN损失，基于输入图像的视觉纹理生成图像感知布局；4. 提出三种新的内容感知评估指标。

Result: 定量和定性评估表明，PDA-GAN在图像感知布局生成方面实现了最先进的性能，能够生成高质量的图像感知布局。提出的内容感知指标有效评估了模型捕捉图形元素与图像内容之间复杂关系的能力。

Conclusion: 本文成功构建了大规模CGL-Dataset，并提出了两种GAN模型用于图像条件化布局生成。PDA-GAN通过像素级判别器有效解决了域适应问题，在生成与图像内容协调的布局方面表现出色，为广告海报自动设计提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Layout plays a crucial role in graphic design and poster generation. Recently, the application of deep learning models for layout generation has gained significant attention. This paper focuses on using a GAN-based model conditioned on images to generate advertising poster graphic layouts, requiring a dataset of paired product images and layouts. To address this task, we introduce the Content-aware Graphic Layout Dataset (CGL-Dataset), consisting of 60,548 paired inpainted posters with annotations and 121,000 clean product images. The inpainting artifacts introduce a domain gap between the inpainted posters and clean images. To bridge this gap, we design two GAN-based models. The first model, CGL-GAN, uses Gaussian blur on the inpainted regions to generate layouts. The second model combines unsupervised domain adaptation by introducing a GAN with a pixel-level discriminator (PD), abbreviated as PDA-GAN, to generate image-aware layouts based on the visual texture of input images. The PD is connected to shallow-level feature maps and computes the GAN loss for each input-image pixel. Additionally, we propose three novel content-aware metrics to assess the model's ability to capture the intricate relationships between graphic elements and image content. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that PDA-GAN achieves state-of-the-art performance and generates high-quality image-aware layouts.

</details>


### [495] [A First Guess is Rarely the Final Answer: Learning to Search in the Travelling Salesperson Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06940)
*Andoni Irazusta Garmendia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NICO-TSP：一种用于旅行商问题的神经改进框架，通过专门设计的2-opt改进机制，在计算匹配评估中比现有方法表现更优，泛化能力更强


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经求解器通常输出单一解，而实践中需要额外计算进行采样或后处理搜索。现有神经改进方法在TSP问题上表现不成熟，主要原因是设计不匹配：许多方法沿用单解方法的状态表示、架构选择和训练方法，而非围绕局部搜索机制专门设计

Method: NICO-TSP采用2-opt改进框架：1）使用恰好n个边令牌表示当前路径，与邻域算子对齐；2）无需路径位置编码直接评分2-opt移动；3）两阶段训练：模仿学习短期最优轨迹，然后通过无批评者的基于组强化学习进行长程展开

Result: 在计算匹配评估中，NICO-TSP在搜索步数和实时时间方面均提供更强大且更步数高效的改进，比现有学习和启发式搜索基线表现更优，对更大分布外实例的泛化能力显著更强，既可作为经典局部搜索的竞争替代，也可作为构造求解器的强大测试时细化模块

Conclusion: NICO-TSP通过专门针对局部搜索机制的设计，解决了现有神经改进方法在TSP问题上的设计不匹配问题，实现了更高效、更可扩展的改进性能，为组合优化的神经改进提供了有效框架

Abstract: Most neural solvers for the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) are trained to output a single solution, even though practitioners rarely stop there: at test time, they routinely spend extra compute on sampling or post-hoc search. This raises a natural question: can the search procedure itself be learned? Neural improvement methods take this perspective by learning a policy that applies local modifications to a candidate solution, accumulating gains over an improvement trajectory. Yet learned improvement for TSP remains comparatively immature, with existing methods still falling short of robust, scalable performance. We argue that a key reason is design mismatch: many approaches reuse state representations, architectural choices, and training recipes inherited from single-solution methods, rather than being built around the mechanics of local search. This mismatch motivates NICO-TSP (Neural Improvement for Combinatorial Optimization): a 2-opt improvement framework for TSP. NICO-TSP represents the current tour with exactly $n$ edge tokens aligned with the neighborhood operator, scores 2-opt moves directly without tour positional encodings, and trains via a two-stage procedure: imitation learning to short-horizon optimal trajectories, followed by critic-free group-based reinforcement learning over longer rollouts. Under compute-matched evaluations that measure improvement as a function of both search steps and wall-clock time, NICO-TSP delivers consistently stronger and markedly more step-efficient improvement than prior learned and heuristic search baselines, generalizes far more reliably to larger out-of-distribution instances, and serves both as a competitive replacement for classical local search and as a powerful test-time refinement module for constructive solvers.

</details>


### [496] [VertAX: a differentiable vertex model for learning epithelial tissue mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06896)
*Alessandro Pasqui,Jim Martin Catacora Ocana,Anshuman Sinha,Matthieu Perez,Fabrice Delbary,Giorgio Gosti,Mattia Miotto,Domenico Caudo,Maxence Ernoult,Hervé Turlier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VertAX：基于JAX的可微分顶点模型框架，用于上皮组织力学建模、参数推断和逆向设计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 上皮组织通过细胞间的局部力学相互作用动态重塑，顶点模型能很好捕捉这一过程，但其众多可调参数使推断和优化具有挑战性，需要灵活建模和学习组织力学的计算框架

Method: 开发VertAX，一个基于JAX的可微分顶点模型框架，提供自动微分、GPU加速和端到端双层优化，支持任意能量和成本函数的纯Python定义，可与机器学习管道无缝集成

Result: 在三个代表性任务上验证：组织形态发生的正向建模、力学参数推断、组织尺度行为的逆向设计；比较了三种微分策略（自动微分、隐式微分、平衡传播），显示后者仅通过重复正向模拟即可近似梯度

Conclusion: VertAX为上皮组织力学提供了灵活的计算框架，平衡传播方法为非可微分模拟器的逆向生物物理问题提供了简单扩展途径

Abstract: Epithelial tissues dynamically reshape through local mechanical interactions among cells, a process well captured by vertex models. Yet their many tunable parameters make inference and optimization challenging, motivating computational frameworks that flexibly model and learn tissue mechanics. We introduce VertAX, a differentiable JAX-based framework for vertex-modeling of confluent epithelia. VertAX provides automatic differentiation, GPU acceleration, and end-to-end bilevel optimization for forward simulation, parameter inference, and inverse mechanical design. Users can define arbitrary energy and cost functions in pure Python, enabling seamless integration with machine-learning pipelines. We demonstrate VertAX on three representative tasks: (i) forward modeling of tissue morphogenesis, (ii) mechanical parameter inference, and (iii) inverse design of tissue-scale behaviors. We benchmark three differentiation strategies-automatic differentiation, implicit differentiation, and equilibrium propagation-showing that the latter can approximate gradients using repeated forward, adjoint-free simulations alone, offering a simple route for extending inverse biophysical problems to non-differentiable simulators with limited additional engineering effort.

</details>


### [497] [Accelerating Training of Autoregressive Video Generation Models via Local Optimization with Representation Continuity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07402)
*Yucheng Zhou,Jianbing Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Local Opt.和ReCo方法加速自回归视频生成训练，在减少一半训练成本的同时保持生成质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归模型在图像生成中表现出色，但在视频生成中面临高计算成本和长训练时间的限制，需要探索加速训练的方法

Method: 提出Local Optimization方法优化局部窗口内的token以减少误差传播，以及基于Lipschitz连续性的Representation Continuity策略，通过连续性损失约束表示变化来提升一致性

Result: 在类别和文本到视频数据集上的实验表明，该方法在保持质量的同时将训练成本减半，并优于基线模型

Conclusion: 提出的Local Opt.和ReCo方法有效解决了自回归视频生成中的训练加速问题，在减少训练帧数的同时缓解了误差累积和不一致问题

Abstract: Autoregressive models have shown superior performance and efficiency in image generation, but remain constrained by high computational costs and prolonged training times in video generation. In this study, we explore methods to accelerate training for autoregressive video generation models through empirical analyses. Our results reveal that while training on fewer video frames significantly reduces training time, it also exacerbates error accumulation and introduces inconsistencies in the generated videos. To address these issues, we propose a Local Optimization (Local Opt.) method, which optimizes tokens within localized windows while leveraging contextual information to reduce error propagation. Inspired by Lipschitz continuity, we propose a Representation Continuity (ReCo) strategy to improve the consistency of generated videos. ReCo utilizes continuity loss to constrain representation changes, improving model robustness and reducing error accumulation. Extensive experiments on class- and text-to-video datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance to the baseline while halving the training cost without sacrificing quality.

</details>


### [498] [Model-Based Reinforcement Learning for Control under Time-Varying Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02260)
*Klemens Iten,Bruce Lee,Chenhao Li,Lenart Treven,Andreas Krause,Bhavya Sukhija*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究非平稳动态系统中的强化学习控制问题，提出基于高斯过程模型的持续学习算法，通过自适应数据缓冲机制处理动态变化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界系统通常存在动态变化（如漂移、磨损、运行条件改变），而传统基于学习的控制方法假设系统动态是平稳的，这一假设在实际中常被违反。需要研究在时变动态下的强化学习控制方法。

Method: 采用持续模型强化学习框架，使用高斯过程动态模型，在频率主义变化预算假设下分析问题。提出实用的乐观模型强化学习算法，包含自适应数据缓冲机制，限制过时数据的影响以保持校准的不确定性。

Result: 分析表明持续非平稳性需要明确限制过时数据的影响以保持校准的不确定性和有意义的动态遗憾保证。提出的算法在具有非平稳动态的连续控制基准测试中表现出改进的性能。

Conclusion: 处理非平稳动态需要专门设计的数据管理策略，自适应数据缓冲机制能有效应对系统动态变化，在时变环境中实现更好的控制性能。

Abstract: Learning-based control methods typically assume stationary system dynamics, an assumption often violated in real-world systems due to drift, wear, or changing operating conditions. We study reinforcement learning for control under time-varying dynamics. We consider a continual model-based reinforcement learning setting in which an agent repeatedly learns and controls a dynamical system whose transition dynamics evolve across episodes. We analyze the problem using Gaussian process dynamics models under frequentist variation-budget assumptions. Our analysis shows that persistent non-stationarity requires explicitly limiting the influence of outdated data to maintain calibrated uncertainty and meaningful dynamic regret guarantees. Motivated by these insights, we propose a practical optimistic model-based reinforcement learning algorithm with adaptive data buffer mechanisms and demonstrate improved performance on continuous control benchmarks with non-stationary dynamics.

</details>


### [499] [Critical Patch-Aware Sparse Prompting with Decoupled Training for Continual Learning on the Edge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07399)
*Wonseon Lim,Jaesung Lee,Dae-Won Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CPS-Prompt：一种面向边缘设备持续学习的临界感知稀疏提示框架，通过临界补丁采样和分离式提示-分类器训练，显著降低训练时内存和计算成本，同时保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备上的持续学习不仅需要高精度，还需要训练时的高效性以满足严格的内存和计算约束。现有的基于提示的持续学习方法主要关注精度或推理时性能，往往忽视了设备上训练的内存和计算成本。

Method: 提出CPS-Prompt框架，包含两个核心技术：1）临界补丁采样（CPS），通过任务感知的令牌减少来降低计算复杂度；2）分离式提示和分类器训练（DPCT），减少反向传播开销。

Result: 在三个公开基准测试和真实边缘硬件上的实验表明，CPS-Prompt相比平衡的CODA-Prompt基线，峰值内存、训练时间和能效提升约1.6倍，同时精度保持在最先进的C-Prompt的2%以内，与CODA-Prompt精度相当。

Conclusion: CPS-Prompt为边缘设备上的持续学习提供了一种有效的解决方案，在显著降低训练时资源消耗的同时保持了竞争性的精度，实现了精度与效率的良好平衡。

Abstract: Continual learning (CL) on edge devices requires not only high accuracy but also training-time efficiency to support on-device adaptation under strict memory and computational constraints. While prompt-based continual learning (PCL) is parameter-efficient and achieves competitive accuracy, prior work has focused mainly on accuracy or inference-time performance, often overlooking the memory and computational costs of on-device training. In this paper, we propose CPS-Prompt, a critical patch-aware sparse prompting framework that explicitly targets training-time memory usage and computational cost by integrating critical patch sampling (CPS) for task-aware token reduction and decoupled prompt and classifier training (DPCT) to reduce backpropagation overhead. Experiments on three public benchmarks and real edge hardware show that CPS-Prompt improves peak memory, training time, and energy efficiency by about 1.6x over the balanced CODA-Prompt baseline, while maintaining accuracy within 2% of the state-of-the-art C-Prompt on average and remaining competitive with CODA-Prompt in accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/laymond1/cps-prompt.

</details>


### [500] [Contraction-Aligned Analysis of Soft Bellman Residual Minimization with Weighted Lp-Norm for Markov Decision Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06837)
*Hyukjun Yang,Han-Dong Lim,Donghwan Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于加权Lp范数的软贝尔曼残差最小化方法，通过调整p值使优化目标与贝尔曼算子的收缩几何对齐，从而改善误差传播控制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在函数逼近下解决MDP问题时存在几何不匹配：贝尔曼最优算子在线性范数下是收缩的，但常用的投影值迭代和贝尔曼残差最小化方法基于L2范数。这种不匹配导致梯度优化困难

Method: 提出软贝尔曼残差最小化方法，并将其扩展到广义加权Lp范数。通过调整p值使优化目标与贝尔曼算子的收缩几何对齐，同时保持与梯度优化的兼容性

Result: 分析表明，随着p增加，该公式能够更好地对齐优化目标与贝尔曼算子的收缩几何，并推导出相应的性能误差界，改进了误差传播控制

Conclusion: 该方法在残差最小化与贝尔曼收缩之间建立了原则性联系，在保持梯度优化兼容性的同时，显著改善了误差传播控制

Abstract: The problem of solving Markov decision processes under function approximation remains a fundamental challenge, even under linear function approximation settings. A key difficulty arises from a geometric mismatch: while the Bellman optimality operator is contractive in the Linfty-norm, commonly used objectives such as projected value iteration and Bellman residual minimization rely on L2-based formulations. To enable gradient-based optimization, we consider a soft formulation of Bellman residual minimization and extend it to a generalized weighted Lp -norm. We show that this formulation aligns the optimization objective with the contraction geometry of the Bellman operator as p increases, and derive corresponding performance error bounds. Our analysis provides a principled connection between residual minimization and Bellman contraction, leading to improved control of error propagation while remaining compatible with gradient-based optimization.

</details>


### [501] [STQuant: Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Framework for Optimizer Quantization in Large Multimodal Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06836)
*Minglu Liu,Cunchen Hu,Liangliang Xu,Fengming Tang,Ruijia Wang,Fu Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STQuant是一个分布式训练框架，通过跨层、状态变量和训练步骤的动态精度分配来减少优化器状态的内存占用，同时保持模型质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量化方法采用固定精度策略，忽略了优化器状态分布在不同层和训练步骤中的显著差异，这种统一设计通常会导致明显的精度下降。需要超越固定量化，实现动态精度分配。

Method: 1) 可证明近似最优的因子选择策略，准确识别对精度适应最有影响力的因子；2) 动态转换决策算法，将搜索成本从指数复杂度降低到线性复杂度。

Result: 在GPT-2和ViT上的实验显示，STQuant将优化器状态内存减少84.4%，平均位宽低至5.1位，相比现有解决方案有显著提升。计算开销仅为O(N/K)，额外空间需求为O(1)。

Conclusion: STQuant通过动态精度分配有效解决了优化器状态量化中的数值敏感性和搜索空间大的挑战，在显著减少内存占用的同时保持了模型质量。

Abstract: Quantization is an effective way to reduce the memory cost of large-scale model training. However, most existing methods adopt fixed-precision policies, which ignore the fact that optimizer-state distributions vary significantly across layers and training steps. Such uniform designs often introduce noticeable accuracy degradation. To move beyond fixed quantization, we propose STQuant, a distributed training framework that reduces the memory footprint of optimizer states via dynamic precision allocation across layers, state variables, and training steps, while maintaining model quality. Naively applying dynamic quantization during training is challenging for two reasons. First, optimizer states are numerically sensitive, and quantization noise can destabilize quality. Second, jointly considering multiple states and layers induces a large combinatorial search space. STQuant addresses these challenges with two key techniques: 1) a provably near-optimal factor selection strategy that accurately identifies the most influential factors for precision adaptation. 2) a dynamic transition decision algorithm that reduces the search cost from exponential to linear complexity. Experiments on GPT-2 and ViT show that STQuant reduces optimizer-state memory by 84.4%, achieving an average bit-width of as low as 5.1 bits, compared with existing solutions. Moreover, STQuant incurs only O(N/K) computational overhead and requires O(1) extra space.

</details>


### [502] [MoBiE: Efficient Inference of Mixture of Binary Experts under Post-Training Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06798)
*Zhixiong Zhao,Zukang Xu,Zhixuan Chen,Dawei Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MoBiE：首个针对MoE架构LLM的二值化框架，通过联合SVD分解、全局梯度集成和输入零空间误差约束，解决了MoE特有的跨专家冗余、任务无关重要性估计和量化路由偏移问题，在保持无额外存储开销的同时显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE架构的LLM虽然性能强大，但存在高内存和计算成本问题。现有针对密集LLM的二值化方法无法有效处理MoE特有的挑战：跨专家冗余、任务无关的重要性估计以及量化引起的路由偏移。

Method: MoBiE框架包含三个核心技术：1）使用联合SVD分解减少跨专家冗余；2）将全局损失梯度集成到局部Hessian度量中以增强权重重要性估计；3）引入基于输入零空间的误差约束来缓解路由失真。所有这些优化都不产生额外存储开销。

Result: 在多个MoE-based LLM和基准测试中，MoBiE始终优于最先进的二值化方法。在Qwen3-30B-A3B上，困惑度降低52.2%，平均零样本性能提升43.4%，推理速度提升2倍以上，同时缩短量化时间。

Conclusion: MoBiE是首个专门为MoE架构LLM设计的二值化框架，有效解决了MoE特有的量化挑战，在保持高效率的同时显著提升了模型性能，为MoE模型的轻量化部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) based large language models (LLMs) offer strong performance but suffer from high memory and computation costs. Weight binarization provides extreme efficiency, yet existing binary methods designed for dense LLMs struggle with MoE-specific issues, including cross-expert redundancy, task-agnostic importance estimation, and quantization-induced routing shifts. To this end, we propose MoBiE, the first binarization framework tailored for MoE-based LLMs. MoBiE is built on three core innovations: 1. using joint SVD decomposition to reduce cross-expert redundancy; 2. integrating global loss gradients into local Hessian metrics to enhance weight importance estimation; 3. introducing an error constraint guided by the input null space to mitigate routing distortion. Notably, MoBiE achieves these optimizations while incurring no additional storage overhead, striking a balance between efficiency and model performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoBiE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art binary methods across multiple MoE-based LLMs and benchmarks. For example, on Qwen3-30B-A3B, MoBiE reduces perplexity by 52.2$\%$, improves average zero-shot performance by 43.4$\%$, achieves over 2 $\times$ inference speedup, and further shortens quantization time. The code is available at https://github.com/Kishon-zzx/MoBiE.

</details>


### [503] [World Action Verifier: Self-Improving World Models via Forward-Inverse Asymmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01985)
*Yuejiang Liu,Fan Feng,Lingjing Kong,Weifeng Lu,Jinzhou Tang,Kun Zhang,Kevin Murphy,Chelsea Finn,Yilun Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WAV框架通过将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性两个因子，并分别验证它们，使世界模型能够识别自身预测错误并自我改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用世界模型需要比策略学习更广泛的鲁棒性，必须对次优动作也能可靠预测，而动作标记的交互数据往往覆盖不足。现有方法在未充分探索的区域通常失效。

Method: 提出世界动作验证器(WAV)框架：1) 将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性；2) 利用动作自由数据的广泛可用性和动作相关特征的较低维度这两个不对称性；3) 通过视频语料库获得多样化子目标生成器；4) 使用稀疏逆模型从状态特征子集推断动作；5) 通过生成的子目标、推断的动作和前向推演的循环一致性提供验证机制。

Result: 在MiniGrid、RoboMimic和ManiSkill的9个任务中，方法实现了2倍的样本效率提升，下游策略性能提高了18%。

Conclusion: WAV框架通过分解验证和利用数据不对称性，有效解决了世界模型在未充分探索区域的鲁棒性问题，显著提升了样本效率和策略性能。

Abstract: General-purpose world models promise scalable policy evaluation, optimization, and planning, yet achieving the required level of robustness remains challenging. Unlike policy learning, which primarily focuses on optimal actions, a world model must be reliable over a much broader range of suboptimal actions, which are often insufficiently covered by action-labeled interaction data. To address this challenge, we propose World Action Verifier (WAV), a framework that enables world models to identify their own prediction errors and self-improve. The key idea is to decompose action-conditioned state prediction into two factors -- state plausibility and action reachability -- and verify each separately. We show that these verification problems can be substantially easier than predicting future states due to two underlying asymmetries: the broader availability of action-free data and the lower dimensionality of action-relevant features. Leveraging these asymmetries, we augment a world model with (i) a diverse subgoal generator obtained from video corpora and (ii) a sparse inverse model that infers actions from a subset of state features. By enforcing cycle consistency among generated subgoals, inferred actions, and forward rollouts, WAV provides an effective verification mechanism in under-explored regimes, where existing methods typically fail. Across nine tasks spanning MiniGrid, RoboMimic, and ManiSkill, our method achieves 2x higher sample efficiency while improving downstream policy performance by 18%.

</details>


### [504] [Drifting Fields are not Conservative](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06333)
*Leonard Franz,Sebastian Hoffmann,Georg Martius*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现漂移模型通常不保守，无法表示为标量损失的梯度，但通过锐化核归一化可恢复保守性，建议使用更简单的损失函数训练


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究漂移模型是否等价于优化标量损失，发现漂移场通常非保守，无法表示为标量势的梯度

Method: 识别位置相关归一化是非保守性的根源，提出通过锐化核进行替代归一化，恢复径向核的保守性

Result: 高斯核是唯一例外，其漂移场可精确表示为标量函数的梯度；锐化核归一化使任何径向核都恢复保守性，但实践中非保守传输的优势有限

Conclusion: 漂移场匹配目标比损失最小化更通用，但实际增益有限，建议使用概念更简单的损失函数训练漂移模型

Abstract: Drifting models generate high-quality samples in a single forward pass by transporting generated samples toward the data distribution using a vector valued drift field. We investigate whether this procedure is equivalent to optimizing a scalar loss and find that, in general, it is not: drift fields are not conservative - they cannot be written as the gradient of any scalar potential. We identify the position-dependent normalization as the source of non-conservatism. The Gaussian kernel is the unique exception where the normalization is harmless and the drift field is exactly the gradient of a scalar function. Generalizing this, we propose an alternative normalization via a related kernel (the sharp kernel) which restores conservatism for any radial kernel, yielding well-defined loss functions for training drifting models. While we identify that the drifting field matching objective is strictly more general than loss minimization, as it can implement non-conservative transport fields that no scalar loss can reproduce, we observe that practical gains obtained utilizing this flexibility are minimal. We thus propose to train drifting models with the conceptually simpler formulations utilizing loss functions.

</details>


### [505] [Flux Attention: Context-Aware Hybrid Attention for Efficient LLMs Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07394)
*Quantong Qiu,Zhiyi Hong,Yi Yang,Haitian Wang,Kebin Liu,Qingqing Dang,Juntao Li,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Flux Attention是一种上下文感知的层级动态注意力框架，通过轻量级层路由器在FA和SA之间自适应路由，解决长上下文场景中标准注意力的二次计算复杂度问题，实现性能与推理速度的优越权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准注意力机制的二次计算复杂度限制了LLM在长上下文场景的可扩展性。现有混合注意力方法采用静态分配比例，无法适应不同任务的动态检索需求，且头级动态稀疏性常导致计算负载不平衡和同步延迟，阻碍自回归解码的硬件加速。

Method: 提出Flux Attention框架，在冻结的预训练LLM中集成轻量级层路由器，基于输入上下文自适应地将每层路由到全注意力(FA)或稀疏注意力(SA)。这种层级路由保持了高保真信息检索，同时确保连续内存访问，将理论计算减少转化为实际时钟加速。

Result: 在多个长上下文和数学推理基准测试中，Flux Attention相比基线模型实现了性能与推理速度的优越权衡，在预填充和解码阶段分别达到最高2.8倍和2.0倍的加速。该参数高效方法仅需在8×A800 GPU上训练12小时。

Conclusion: Flux Attention通过上下文感知的层级动态注意力路由，有效解决了长上下文LLM的计算瓶颈，在保持性能的同时显著提升推理速度，为实际部署提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: The quadratic computational complexity of standard attention mechanisms presents a severe scalability bottleneck for LLMs in long-context scenarios. While hybrid attention mechanisms combining Full Attention (FA) and Sparse Attention (SA) offer a potential solution, existing methods typically rely on static allocation ratios that fail to accommodate the variable retrieval demands of different tasks. Furthermore, head-level dynamic sparsity often introduces severe computational load imbalance and synchronization long-tails, which hinder hardware acceleration during autoregressive decoding. To bridge this gap, we introduce Flux Attention, a context-aware framework that dynamically optimizes attention computation at the layer level. By integrating a lightweight Layer Router into frozen pretrained LLMs, the proposed method adaptively routes each layer to FA or SA based on the input context. This layer-wise routing preserves high-fidelity information retrieval while ensuring contiguous memory access, translating theoretical computational reductions into practical wall-clock speedups. As a parameter-efficient approach, our framework requires only 12 hours of training on 8$\times$A800 GPUs. Extensive experiments across multiple long-context and mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that Flux Attention achieves a superior trade-off between performance and inference speed compared with baseline models, with speed improvements of up to $2.8\times$ and $2.0\times$ in the prefill and decode stages.

</details>


### [506] [Geometric Properties of the Voronoi Tessellation in Latent Semantic Manifolds of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06767)
*Marshall Brett*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究验证了语言模型表示空间中Voronoi镶嵌的线性缩放规律，并开发了通过边界精炼程序（MRP）重塑收敛模型镶嵌的方法，发现Fisher信息距离最大化方法在保持下游性能不变的同时能有效压缩表达能力差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究语言模型在连续向量空间中操作离散标记时形成的Voronoi镶嵌的几何特性，探索如何通过后处理优化重塑这种几何结构，以改善模型的表达能力差距。

Method: 使用Qwen3.5-4B-Base模型，采用float32边界重计算解决bfloat16量化伪影。通过边界精炼程序（MRP）进行后处理优化，比较直接边界最大化与Fisher信息距离最大化两种方法，在剂量响应扫描中评估效果。

Result: 验证了Mabrok（2026）的线性缩放规律（R²=0.9997），发现中间层存在几何模糊区域（层24-28，ρ=-0.29）。Fisher MRP在λ=0.6时实现中位数边界改善28%，下游基准测试保持不变，但收益集中在高频结构标记（84%），内容和实体类贡献随λ增加而减少。

Conclusion: Fisher MRP是一种可行的几何抛光工具，其实用上限不是由总体损害决定，而是由标记级收益的均匀性决定。该方法能够压缩表达能力差距同时保持其缩放规律，但需要解决收益分布不均的问题。

Abstract: Language models operate on discrete tokens but compute in continuous vector spaces, inducing a Voronoi tessellation over the representation manifold. We study this tessellation empirically on Qwen3.5-4B-Base, making two contributions. First, using float32 margin recomputation to resolve bfloat16 quantization artifacts, we validate Mabrok's (2026) linear scaling law of the expressibility gap with $R^2$ = 0.9997 - the strongest confirmation to date - and identify a mid-layer geometric ambiguity regime where margin geometry is anti-correlated with cross-entropy (layers 24-28, $ρ$ = -0.29) before crystallizing into alignment at the final layer ($ρ$ = 0.836).
  Second, we show that the Voronoi tessellation of a converged model is reshapable through margin refinement procedures (MRP): short post-hoc optimization runs that widen token-decision margins without retraining. We compare direct margin maximization against Fisher information distance maximization across a dose-response sweep. Both methods find the same ceiling of ~16,300 correctable positions per 256K evaluated, but differ critically in collateral damage. Margin maximization damage escalates with intervention strength until corrections are overwhelmed. Fisher damage remains constant at ~5,300 positions across the validated range ($λ$ = 0.15-0.6), achieving +28% median margin improvement at $λ$ = 0.6 with invariant downstream benchmarks - a geometric reorganization that compresses the expressibility gap while preserving its scaling law. However, frequency and token-class audits reveal that gains concentrate in high-frequency structural tokens (84% of net corrections at $λ$ = 0.6), with content and entity-like contributions shrinking at higher $λ$. Fisher MRP is therefore a viable geometric polishing tool whose practical ceiling is set not by aggregate damage but by the uniformity of token-level benefit.

</details>


### [507] [The Rhetoric of Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06754)
*Robert C. Williamson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文从修辞学视角分析机器学习技术，认为机器学习本质上是修辞性的而非中立的"客观"世界建模工具，并探讨了其修辞特征及"操纵即服务"这一普遍商业模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 论文旨在挑战机器学习作为中立、客观技术的传统观念，揭示其内在的修辞本质。作者认为机器学习并非简单地从数据构建"世界模型"，而是一种具有说服力的技术实践，需要从修辞学角度进行批判性分析。

Method: 采用修辞学理论框架分析机器学习技术，通过理论论证探讨机器学习的修辞特征。特别关注"操纵即服务"这一商业模式作为案例研究，分析机器学习在商业实践中的修辞运用。

Result: 论证了机器学习具有内在的修辞性，揭示了其作为说服技术的本质。识别了机器学习的具体修辞特征，并通过"操纵即服务"商业模式展示了机器学习如何被用于操纵和说服的商业实践。

Conclusion: 机器学习应被理解为一种修辞技术而非中立工具，其设计和应用都涉及说服和操纵。这一视角有助于更批判性地理解机器学习在商业和社会中的角色，特别是在"操纵即服务"等商业模式中的伦理影响。

Abstract: I examine the technology of machine learning from the perspective of rhetoric, which is simply the art of persuasion. Rather than being a neutral and "objective" way to build "world models" from data, machine learning is (I argue) inherently rhetorical. I explore some of its rhetorical features, and examine one pervasive business model where machine learning is widely used, "manipulation as a service."

</details>


### [508] [Busemann energy-based attention for emotion analysis in Poincaré discs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06752)
*Zinaid Kapić,Vladimir Jaćimović*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EmBolic是一种完全双曲深度学习架构，用于文本消息的细粒度情感分析，利用双曲几何高效捕捉词语和情感之间的层次关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法将情感视为没有度量结构的分类集合，而实际上情感之间存在语义模糊性产生的层次关系。双曲几何能更有效地捕捉这些层次结构，为情感计算提供更合适的表示空间。

Method: 提出EmBolic架构，核心是双曲圆盘中的注意力机制。模型训练从文本消息生成查询（双曲圆盘中的点），而键（边界上的点）从生成的查询自动产生。预测基于查询和键之间的Busemann能量，评估文本消息与代表情感类别的方向的对齐程度。

Result: 实验表明模型具有良好的泛化特性，即使在表示空间维度较小的情况下也能获得相当好的预测准确率。支持了情感计算是双曲表示特别有利的应用领域这一主张。

Conclusion: 双曲几何为情感分析提供了有效的表示框架，能够捕捉情感之间的层次关系，EmBolic架构在细粒度情感分析任务中表现出色，验证了双曲表示在情感计算领域的优势。

Abstract: We present EmBolic - a novel fully hyperbolic deep learning architecture for fine-grained emotion analysis from textual messages. The underlying idea is that hyperbolic geometry efficiently captures hierarchies between both words and emotions. In our context, these hierarchical relationships arise from semantic ambiguities. EmBolic aims to infer the curvature on the continuous space of emotions, rather than treating them as a categorical set without any metric structure. In the heart of our architecture is the attention mechanism in the hyperbolic disc. The model is trained to generate queries (points in the hyperbolic disc) from textual messages, while keys (points at the boundary) emerge automatically from the generated queries. Predictions are based on the Busemann energy between queries and keys, evaluating how well a certain textual message aligns with the class directions representing emotions. Our experiments demonstrate strong generalization properties and reasonably good prediction accuracy even for small dimensions of the representation space. Overall, this study supports our claim that affective computing is one of the application domains where hyperbolic representations are particularly advantageous.

</details>


### [509] [Bi-level Heterogeneous Learning for Time Series Foundation Models: A Federated Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06727)
*Shengchao Chen,Guodong Long,Dikai Liu,Jing Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种针对时间序列基础模型的细粒度学习方法，通过联邦学习框架解决时间序列数据中的双层异质性（域间和域内），提升模型在异构环境下的表示质量和预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列数据的异质性比视觉或语言数据更为显著，不同领域和任务的时间动态差异很大。现有时间序列基础模型通常采用混合批次策略训练大规模数据集，但这会导致梯度冲突并降低表示质量。需要解决异构时间序列中的知识蒸馏和跨域干扰问题。

Method: 提出细粒度学习方法，通过联邦学习框架处理双层异质性：1) 针对域内异质性，通过局部正则化强制域不变和语义一致的表示；2) 针对域间异质性，通过域感知聚合增强跨域协作。该方法从异构序列中蒸馏不变知识，同时减少跨域干扰。

Result: 在多样化基准测试中，使用该方法训练的时间序列基础模型在点预测和概率预测方面均优于集中式和联邦式基线模型，同时在大规模零样本学习中也表现出竞争力。

Conclusion: 该方法为在异构环境中从头训练时间序列基础模型提供了灵活途径，能有效处理时间序列数据的双层异质性，提升模型表示质量和预测性能。

Abstract: Heterogeneity in time series data is more pronounced than in vision or language, as temporal dynamics vary substantially across domains and tasks. Existing efforts on training time series foundation models (TSFMs) from scratch are often trained with mixed-batch strategies that merge large-scale datasets, which can cause gradient conflicts and degrade representation quality. To address this, we propose a fine-grained learning method that distills invariant knowledge from heterogeneous series while reducing cross-domain interference. We characterize heterogeneity at two levels: inter-domain and intra-domain. To tackle this bi-level heterogeneity, we design a federated learning method that mitigates intra-domain conflicts by enforcing domain-invariant and semantically consistent representations through local regularization, and addresses inter-domain discrepancies by enhancing cross-domain collaboration via domain-aware aggregation. Experiments across diverse benchmarks show that TSFMs trained with our method consistently outperform both centralized and federated TSFM baselines in point and probabilistic forecasting, while also achieving competitive zero-shot performance at scale, offering a flexible pathway for training TSFMs from scratch in heterogeneous environments.

</details>


### [510] [Bi-Lipschitz Autoencoder With Injectivity Guarantee](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06701)
*Qipeng Zhan,Zhuoping Zhou,Zexuan Wang,Qi Long,Li Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Bi-Lipschitz自编码器(BLAE)，通过注入性正则化和双Lipschitz松弛解决传统正则化自编码器的非单射映射问题，提升流形结构保持能力和分布漂移鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统正则化自编码器在降维过程中存在非单射映射问题，导致收敛困难和潜在表示扭曲。现有方法通常采用过于刚性的约束，限制了其有效性和鲁棒性，特别是在数据分布变化时表现不佳。

Method: 提出Bi-Lipschitz自编码器(BLAE)，包含两个关键创新：1) 基于分离准则的注入性正则化方案，消除病态局部最小值；2) 双Lipschitz松弛，保持几何结构并增强对数据分布漂移的鲁棒性。同时形式化可接受正则化的概念并提供充分条件。

Result: 在多个数据集上的实验结果表明，BLAE在保持流形结构方面持续优于现有方法，同时对采样稀疏性和分布漂移表现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: BLAE通过解决编码器非单射性这一核心瓶颈，提供了更有效的流形保持降维方法，在保持几何结构的同时增强了模型对数据分布变化的适应性。

Abstract: Autoencoders are widely used for dimensionality reduction, based on the assumption that high-dimensional data lies on low-dimensional manifolds. Regularized autoencoders aim to preserve manifold geometry during dimensionality reduction, but existing approaches often suffer from non-injective mappings and overly rigid constraints that limit their effectiveness and robustness. In this work, we identify encoder non-injectivity as a core bottleneck that leads to poor convergence and distorted latent representations. To ensure robustness across data distributions, we formalize the concept of admissible regularization and provide sufficient conditions for its satisfaction. In this work, we propose the Bi-Lipschitz Autoencoder (BLAE), which introduces two key innovations: (1) an injective regularization scheme based on a separation criterion to eliminate pathological local minima, and (2) a bi-Lipschitz relaxation that preserves geometry and exhibits robustness to data distribution drift. Empirical results on diverse datasets show that BLAE consistently outperforms existing methods in preserving manifold structure while remaining resilient to sampling sparsity and distribution shifts. Code is available at https://github.com/qipengz/BLAE.

</details>


### [511] [GraphWalker: Graph-Guided In-Context Learning for Clinical Reasoning on Electronic Health Records](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06684)
*Yue Fang,Weibin Liao,Yuxin Guo,Jiaran Gao,Hongxin Ding,Jinyang Zhang,Xinke Jiang,Zhibang Yang,Junfeng Zhao,Yasha Wang,Liantao Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GraphWalker：针对电子健康记录（EHR）推理的演示选择框架，通过整合数据驱动和模型驱动视角、群体发现和惰性贪婪搜索，解决现有ICL方法在视角限制、群体意识和信息聚合方面的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于上下文学习（ICL）的EHR推理方法面临三个核心挑战：1）视角限制——数据驱动的相似性无法与LLM推理需求对齐，而模型驱动的信号受限于临床能力；2）群体意识缺失——演示选择独立进行，未建模群体级结构；3）信息聚合问题——忽略演示间的冗余和交互效应，导致边际收益递减。

Method: GraphWalker框架包含三个关键组件：1）联合建模患者临床信息和LLM估计的信息增益，整合数据驱动和模型驱动视角；2）群体发现机制避免局部最优；3）采用带前沿扩展的惰性贪婪搜索算法缓解信息聚合中的边际收益递减问题。

Result: 在多个真实世界EHR基准测试上的广泛实验表明，GraphWalker持续优于最先进的ICL基线方法，在临床推理性能上实现了显著提升。

Conclusion: GraphWalker为解决EHR推理中ICL方法的根本挑战提供了一个原则性的演示选择框架，通过整合多视角建模、群体发现和高效信息聚合策略，显著提升了临床推理性能。

Abstract: Clinical Reasoning on Electronic Health Records (EHRs) is a fundamental yet challenging task in modern healthcare. While in-context learning (ICL) offers a promising inference-time adaptation paradigm for large language models (LLMs) in EHR reasoning, existing methods face three fundamental challenges: (1) Perspective Limitation, where data-driven similarity fails to align with LLM reasoning needs and model-driven signals are constrained by limited clinical competence; (2) Cohort Awareness, as demonstrations are selected independently without modeling population-level structure; and (3) Information Aggregation, where redundancy and interaction effects among demonstrations are ignored, leading to diminishing marginal gains. To address these challenges, we propose GraphWalker, a principled demonstration selection framework for EHR-oriented ICL. GraphWalker (i) jointly models patient clinical information and LLM-estimated information gain by integrating data-driven and model-driven perspectives, (ii) incorporates Cohort Discovery to avoid noisy local optima, and (iii) employs a Lazy Greedy Search with Frontier Expansion algorithm to mitigate diminishing marginal returns in information aggregation. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world EHR benchmarks demonstrate that GraphWalker consistently outperforms state-of-the-art ICL baselines, yielding substantial improvements in clinical reasoning performance. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/PuppyKnightUniversity/GraphWalker

</details>


### [512] [Playing DOOM with 1.3M Parameters: Specialized Small Models vs Large Language Models for Real-Time Game Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07385)
*David Golchinfar,Daryoush Vaziri,Alexander Marquardt*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SauerkrautLM-Doom-MultiVec是一个130万参数的小型模型，在DOOM游戏中实时性能超越参数大92000倍的LLMs，仅需31000个人类演示训练，推理成本极低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索小型任务专用模型在实时控制任务上能否超越通用大型语言模型，验证领域特定数据训练的小模型在推理成本和硬件部署方面的优势。

Method: 结合ModernBERT编码器、哈希嵌入、深度感知令牌表示和注意力池化分类头，从ASCII帧表示中选择游戏动作，每个决策仅需31毫秒。

Result: 在defend_the_center场景中，10个回合获得178个击杀（平均每回合17.8），超过所有测试LLMs的总和（13个击杀）。模型主动攻击敌人而非单纯躲避，性能超越参数大92000倍的Nemotron-120B。

Conclusion: 小型任务专用模型在领域适当数据训练下，能够在实时控制任务上决定性超越通用LLMs，推理成本极低且可在消费级硬件上部署。

Abstract: We present SauerkrautLM-Doom-MultiVec, a 1.3 million parameter model that plays the classic first-person shooter DOOM in real time, outperforming large language models up to 92,000x its size, including Nemotron-120B, Qwen3.5-27B, and GPT-4o-mini. Our model combines a ModernBERT encoder with hash embeddings, depth-aware token representations, and an attention pooling classification head to select game actions from ASCII frame representations at 31ms per decision. Trained on just 31,000 human gameplay demonstrations, it achieves 178 frags in 10 episodes (17.8 per episode) in the defend_the_center scenario, more than all tested LLMs combined (13 frags total). All agents receive equivalent input: ASCII frames and depth maps. Despite having 92,000x fewer parameters than Nemotron-120B, our model is the only agent that actively engages enemies rather than purely evading them. These results demonstrate that small, task-specific models trained on domain-appropriate data can decisively outperform general-purpose LLMs at real-time control tasks, at a fraction of the inference cost, with deployment capability on consumer hardware.

</details>


### [513] [SHAPE: Stage-aware Hierarchical Advantage via Potential Estimation for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06636)
*Zhengyang Ai,Zikang Shan,Xiaodong Ai,Jingxian Tang,Hangkai Hu,Pinyan Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SHAPE框架通过层次化信用分配机制提升LLM推理效率，在数学推理任务中平均准确率提升3%同时减少30%的token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有过程监督方法无法区分实质性进展与冗余表达，导致推理能力有限且token效率低下，需要新的监督机制来提升推理质量和效率。

Method: 提出SHAPE框架，将推理形式化为经验可解性状态空间的轨迹。采用层次化信用分配：在片段级别使用阶段感知优势函数优先处理低潜力状态的突破；在token级别使用熵驱动重分配来锐化执行信号。

Result: 在三个基础模型和五个数学推理基准测试中，SHAPE平均准确率提升3%，同时减少30%的token消耗，显著提升了推理效率和效果。

Conclusion: SHAPE通过形式化推理为状态空间轨迹并采用层次化信用分配，有效解决了过程监督中的进展识别和token效率问题，为LLM推理优化提供了新方向。

Abstract: Process supervision has emerged as a promising approach for enhancing LLM reasoning, yet existing methods fail to distinguish meaningful progress from mere verbosity, leading to limited reasoning capabilities and unresolved token inefficiency. To address this, we propose Stage-aware Hierarchical Advantage via Potential Estimation (SHAPE), a framework that formalizes reasoning as a trajectory through a state space of empirical solvability. SHAPE introduces a hierarchical credit assignment mechanism: at the segment level, it employs a stage-aware advantage function to prioritize efficient breakthroughs in low-potential states; at the token level, it utilizes entropy-driven redistribution to sharpen execution signals. Extensive experiments in math reasoning across three base models and five benchmarks demonstrate that SHAPE achieves an average accuracy gain of 3% with 30% reduced token consumption.

</details>


### [514] [Decisions and Deployment: The Five-Year SAHELI Project (2020-2025) on Restless Multi-Armed Bandits for Improving Maternal and Child Health](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07384)
*Shresth Verma,Arpan Dasgupta,Neha Madhiwalla,Aparna Taneja,Milind Tambe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SAHELI项目使用决策聚焦学习的RMAB框架优化印度母婴健康项目中稀缺资源的分配，相比传统两阶段方法将累计参与度下降减少31%，并显著改善实际健康行为


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在母婴健康项目中，有限的医疗工作者资源无法为弱势群体提供持续个性化的服务，需要优化稀缺资源的调度以最大化长期参与度

Method: 采用决策聚焦学习的Restless Multi-Armed Bandit框架，从传统的"预测-优化"两阶段方法转向直接与最大化参与度目标对齐的学习方法

Result: 大规模随机对照试验显示，DFL策略将累计参与度下降减少31%，显著优于两阶段模型，并证实参与度提升直接转化为实际健康行为的显著改善

Conclusion: SAHELI项目为在健康项目中应用序列决策AI优化资源分配提供了可扩展的蓝图

Abstract: Maternal and child health is a critical concern around the world. In many global health programs disseminating preventive care and health information, limited healthcare worker resources prevent continuous, personalised engagement with vulnerable beneficiaries. In such scenarios, it becomes crucial to optimally schedule limited live-service resources to maximise long-term engagement. To address this fundamental challenge, the multi-year SAHELI project (2020-2025), in collaboration with partner NGO ARMMAN, leverages AI to allocate scarce resources in a maternal and child health program in India. The SAHELI system solves this sequential resource allocation problem using a Restless Multi-Armed Bandit (RMAB) framework. A key methodological innovation is the transition from a traditional Two-Stage "predict-then-optimize" approach to Decision-Focused Learning (DFL), which directly aligns the framework's learning method with the ultimate goal of maximizing beneficiary engagement. Empirical evaluation through large-scale randomized controlled trials demonstrates that the DFL policy reduced cumulative engagement drops by 31% relative to the current standard of care, significantly outperforming the Two-Stage model. Crucially, the studies also confirmed that this increased program engagement translates directly into statistically significant improvements in real-world health behaviors, notably the continued consumption of vital iron and calcium supplements by new mothers. Ultimately, the SAHELI project provides a scalable blueprint for applying sequential decision-making AI to optimize resource allocation in health programs.

</details>


### [515] [PD-SOVNet: A Physics-Driven Second-Order Vibration Operator Network for Estimating Wheel Polygonal Roughness from Axle-Box Vibrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06620)
*Xiancheng Wang,Lin Wang,Rui Wang,Zhibo Zhang,Minghang Zhao,Xiaoheng Zhang,Zhongyue Tan,Kaitai Mao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PD-SOVNet框架，结合物理先验与数据驱动方法，从轴箱振动信号连续回归估计车轮多边形粗糙度的1-40阶频谱，在真实运营数据上表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注车轮多边形粗糙度的检测、识别或严重程度分类，而连续回归估计多阶粗糙度频谱的研究较少，特别是在真实运营数据和未见车轮条件下的应用。需要一种能够结合物理先验知识同时保持数据驱动灵活性的方法来解决这一实际问题。

Method: 提出PD-SOVNet框架，包含：1）共享二阶振动核，嵌入模态响应先验；2）4×4 MIMO耦合模块；3）自适应物理校正分支；4）基于Mamba的时序分支。该灰盒框架将物理知识融入模型，同时保留样本依赖性校正和剩余时序动态的数据驱动灵活性。

Result: 在三个真实世界数据集（包括运营数据和真实故障数据）上的实验表明，该方法在预测精度和跨车轮性能稳定性方面具有竞争力，在更具挑战性的Dataset III上优势最明显。噪声注入实验显示Mamba时序分支有助于减轻扰动输入下的性能退化。

Conclusion: 结构化物理先验有助于在实际轨道车辆监测场景中稳定粗糙度回归，但在更广泛运行条件和更严格比较协议下的进一步验证仍然需要。该方法为车轮多边形粗糙度的连续频谱估计提供了有效的灰盒解决方案。

Abstract: Quantitative estimation of wheel polygonal roughness from axle-box vibration signals is a challenging yet practically relevant problem for rail-vehicle condition monitoring. Existing studies have largely focused on detection, identification, or severity classification, while continuous regression of multi-order roughness spectra remains less explored, especially under real operational data and unseen-wheel conditions. To address this problem, this paper presents PD-SOVNet, a physics-guided gray-box framework that combines shared second-order vibration kernels, a $4\times4$ MIMO coupling module, an adaptive physical correction branch, and a Mamba-based temporal branch for estimating the 1st--40th-order wheel roughness spectrum from axle-box vibrations. The proposed design embeds modal-response priors into the model while retaining data-driven flexibility for sample-dependent correction and residual temporal dynamics. Experiments on three real-world datasets, including operational data and real fault data, show that the proposed method provides competitive prediction accuracy and relatively stable cross-wheel performance under the current data protocol, with its most noticeable advantage observed on the more challenging Dataset III. Noise injection experiments further indicate that the Mamba temporal branch helps mitigate performance degradation under perturbed inputs. These results suggest that structured physical priors can be beneficial for stabilizing roughness regression in practical rail-vehicle monitoring scenarios, although further validation under broader operating conditions and stricter comparison protocols is still needed.

</details>


### [516] [SCOT: Multi-Source Cross-City Transfer with Optimal-Transport Soft-Correspondence Objective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07383)
*Yuyao Wang,Min Yang,Meng Chen,Weiming Huang,Yongshun Gong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SCOT是一个跨城市表示学习框架，通过基于Sinkhorn的熵最优传输学习不等区域集之间的显式软对应关系，提高标签稀缺城市的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨城市迁移学习在标签稀缺城市中具有重要价值，但当城市采用不兼容的分区且没有真实区域对应关系时，现有方法面临挑战：基于启发式区域匹配的方法对锚点选择敏感，而分布级对齐方法则使对应关系隐含且在不均匀性较强时不稳定。

Method: SCOT通过Sinkhorn-based entropic optimal transport学习不等区域集之间的显式软对应关系；使用OT加权的对比目标来锐化可迁移结构；通过循环式重构正则化器稳定优化；对于多源迁移，使用目标诱导的原型先验引导的平衡熵传输，将每个源和目标对齐到共享原型中心。

Result: 在真实世界城市和任务中，SCOT持续提高了迁移准确性和鲁棒性，同时学习到的传输耦合和中心分配为对齐质量提供了可解释的诊断。

Conclusion: SCOT通过显式软对应学习和多源对齐机制，有效解决了跨城市迁移中区域分区不兼容的问题，提供了更准确、鲁棒且可解释的迁移学习方法。

Abstract: Cross-city transfer improves prediction in label-scarce cities by leveraging labeled data from other cities, but it becomes challenging when cities adopt incompatible partitions and no ground-truth region correspondences exist. Existing approaches either rely on heuristic region matching, which is often sensitive to anchor choices, or perform distribution-level alignment that leaves correspondences implicit and can be unstable under strong heterogeneity. We propose SCOT, a cross-city representation learning framework that learns explicit soft correspondences between unequal region sets via Sinkhorn-based entropic optimal transport. SCOT further sharpens transferable structure with an OT-weighted contrastive objective and stabilizes optimization through a cycle-style reconstruction regularizer. For multi-source transfer, SCOT aligns each source and the target to a shared prototype hub using balanced entropic transport guided by a target-induced prototype prior. Across real-world cities and tasks, SCOT consistently improves transfer accuracy and robustness, while the learned transport couplings and hub assignments provide interpretable diagnostics of alignment quality.

</details>


### [517] [Latent Structure of Affective Representations in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07382)
*Benjamin J. Choi,Melanie Weber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究使用几何数据分析工具探索大语言模型中情感表征的潜在结构，发现LLMs学习到的情感表征与心理学中的效价-唤醒模型一致，具有非线性但可线性近似的几何结构，并能用于量化情感处理任务的不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究大语言模型潜在表征的几何结构对模型透明度和AI安全具有重要意义。现有研究主要关注学习表征的一般几何和拓扑特性，但由于缺乏真实潜在几何的基准，验证这些发现具有挑战性。情感处理提供了一个有趣的测试平台，因为情感既具有分类组织又具有连续的情感维度，这在心理学文献中已有充分研究。

Method: 使用几何数据分析工具研究LLMs中情感表征的潜在结构。通过分析LLMs学习到的情感表征，验证其与心理学中广泛使用的效价-唤醒模型的一致性，并探索表征空间的几何特性。

Result: 1. LLMs学习到与心理学效价-唤醒模型一致的情感潜在表征；2. 这些表征展现出非线性几何结构，但仍能被良好地线性近似，为模型透明度方法中常用的线性表征假设提供了实证支持；3. 学习到的潜在表征空间可用于量化情感处理任务的不确定性。

Conclusion: LLMs获得的情感表征具有与人类情感模型相似的几何结构，这对模型可解释性和安全性具有实际意义。研究为理解LLMs内部表征提供了新视角，并支持了线性表征假设在模型透明度方法中的合理性。

Abstract: The geometric structure of latent representations in large language models (LLMs) is an active area of research, driven in part by its implications for model transparency and AI safety. Existing literature has focused mainly on general geometric and topological properties of the learnt representations, but due to a lack of ground-truth latent geometry, validating the findings of such approaches is challenging. Emotion processing provides an intriguing testbed for probing representational geometry, as emotions exhibit both categorical organization and continuous affective dimensions, which are well-established in the psychology literature. Moreover, understanding such representations carries safety relevance. In this work, we investigate the latent structure of affective representations in LLMs using geometric data analysis tools. We present three main findings. First, we show that LLMs learn coherent latent representations of affective emotions that align with widely used valence--arousal models from psychology. Second, we find that these representations exhibit nonlinear geometric structure that can nonetheless be well-approximated linearly, providing empirical support for the linear representation hypothesis commonly assumed in model transparency methods. Third, we demonstrate that the learned latent representation space can be leveraged to quantify uncertainty in emotion processing tasks. Our findings suggest that LLMs acquire affective representations with geometric structure paralleling established models of human emotion, with practical implications for model interpretability and safety.

</details>


### [518] [The Lifecycle of the Spectral Edge: From Gradient Learning to Weight-Decay Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07380)
*Yongzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究分析了在序列任务中参数更新的Gram矩阵谱边缘，发现梯度下降和权重衰减在grokking过程中的两阶段生命周期：grokking前梯度驱动且功能活跃，grokking时梯度与权重衰减对齐形成压缩轴，该方向扰动平坦但对消融敏感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解深度学习模型在grokking现象中参数更新的动态机制，特别是梯度下降和权重衰减如何共同作用导致模型从记忆到泛化的转变。

Method: 方法包括：1) 将谱边缘分解为梯度和权重衰减分量；2) 在Dyck-1和SCAN序列任务上分析grokking过程；3) 使用间隙流方程预测三种普适性类别；4) 应用线性和非线性探针分析信息编码。

Result: 主要结果：1) 发现两阶段生命周期：grokking前谱边缘由梯度驱动且功能活跃，grokking时梯度与权重衰减对齐形成压缩轴；2) 压缩轴扰动平坦但对消融敏感（比随机方向影响大4000倍以上）；3) 识别三种普适性类别（功能、混合、压缩）；4) 非线性探针显示信息被重新编码而非丢失（MLP R²=0.99 vs 线性R²=0.86）；5) grokking后移除权重衰减可逆转压缩同时保留算法。

Conclusion: 结论：grokking过程中梯度下降和权重衰减的相互作用导致参数空间的压缩，这种压缩不是信息丢失而是重新编码。压缩轴对扰动平坦但对消融敏感，表明模型在grokking时形成了算法性的表示。权重衰减在压缩形成后可以移除而不影响算法功能。

Abstract: We decompose the spectral edge -- the dominant direction of the Gram matrix of parameter updates -- into its gradient and weight-decay components during grokking in two sequence tasks (Dyck-1 and SCAN). We find a sharp two-phase lifecycle: before grokking the edge is gradient-driven and functionally active; at grokking, gradient and weight decay align, and the edge becomes a compression axis that is perturbation-flat yet ablation-critical (>4000x more impactful than random directions). Three universality classes emerge (functional, mixed, compression), predicted by the gap flow equation. Nonlinear probes show information is re-encoded, not lost (MLP $R^2=0.99$ where linear $R^2=0.86$), and removing weight decay post-grok reverses compression while preserving the algorithm.

</details>


### [519] [When Does Context Help? A Systematic Study of Target-Conditional Molecular Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06558)
*Bryan Cheng,Jasper Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 系统研究目标上下文在分子性质预测中的作用，发现融合架构选择比是否包含上下文更重要，上下文可实现数据稀缺下的预测，但也可能因分布不匹配而损害性能，同时揭露了标准基准测试中的根本缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究目标上下文（如蛋白质靶点）何时有助于分子性质预测，系统评估上下文条件化在不同蛋白质家族、融合架构、数据规模和时间分割下的效果，填补该领域缺乏系统性研究的空白。

Method: 使用NestDrug（基于FiLM的架构）将分子表示条件化于目标身份，在10个蛋白质家族、4种融合架构、67-9,409个训练化合物的数据规模下，同时采用时间分割和随机分割进行评估。

Result: 1) 融合架构起主导作用：FiLM比拼接方法提升24.2个百分点，比加性条件化提升8.6个百分点；2) 上下文可实现原本不可能的预测：在数据稀缺的CYP3A4上，多任务迁移达到0.686 AUC，而单目标随机森林仅0.238；3) 上下文可能系统性地损害性能：分布不匹配导致BACE1下降10.2个百分点，少样本适应持续劣于零样本。

Conclusion: 如何融合上下文比是否包含上下文更重要；上下文条件化可实现数据稀缺下的预测，但分布不匹配会损害性能；标准基准测试存在根本缺陷（如数据泄露），时间分割评估显示上下文条件化分子表示能泛化到未来化学空间。

Abstract: We present the first systematic study of when target context helps molecular property prediction, evaluating context conditioning across 10 diverse protein families, 4 fusion architectures, data regimes spanning 67-9,409 training compounds, and both temporal and random evaluation splits. Using NestDrug, a FiLM-based architecture that conditions molecular representations on target identity, we characterize both success and failure modes with three principal findings. First, fusion architecture dominates: FiLM outperforms concatenation by 24.2 percentage points and additive conditioning by 8.6 pp; how you incorporate context matters more than whether you include it. Second, context enables otherwise impossible predictions: on data-scarce CYP3A4 (67 training compounds), multi-task transfer achieves 0.686 AUC where per-target Random Forest collapses to 0.238. Third, context can systematically hurt: distribution mismatch causes 10.2 pp degradation on BACE1; few-shot adaptation consistently underperforms zero-shot. Beyond methodology, we expose fundamental flaws in standard benchmarking: 1-nearest-neighbor Tanimoto achieves 0.991 AUC on DUD-E without any learning, and 50% of actives leak from training data, rendering absolute performance metrics meaningless. Our temporal split evaluation (train up to 2020, test 2021-2024) achieves stable 0.843 AUC with no degradation, providing the first rigorous evidence that context-conditional molecular representations generalize to future chemical space.

</details>


### [520] [Efficient Quantization of Mixture-of-Experts with Theoretical Generalization Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06515)
*Mohammed Nowaz Rabbani Chowdhury,Kaoutar El Maghraoui,Hsinyu Tsai,Naigang Wang,Geoffrey W. Burr,Liu Liu,Meng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于专家变化的专家级混合精度量化方法，通过路由器L2范数变化和神经元内方差分配比特宽度，在降低推理成本的同时保持MoE模型精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏混合专家模型虽然通过激活少量专家减少计算量，但大量参数仍带来显著内存开销。现有混合精度方法需要大量计算进行比特分配，且忽略了不同专家对量化敏感度的差异

Method: 提出理论基础的专家级混合精度策略：1) 基于训练期间路由器L2范数变化分配比特宽度，变化小的专家捕获关键但低频特征，对量化更敏感，需要更高精度；2) 为避免高量化噪声，对具有大最大神经元内方差的专家也分配更高精度

Result: 在Switch Transformer和Mixtral等大规模MoE模型上的实验表明，该方法比现有方法获得更高精度，同时降低推理成本，比特分配开销可忽略

Conclusion: 提出的专家级混合精度量化方法有效解决了MoE模型内存开销问题，通过考虑专家敏感度差异实现精度与效率的更好平衡

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) allows scaling of language and vision models efficiently by activating only a small subset of experts per input. While this reduces computation, the large number of parameters still incurs substantial memory overhead during inference. Post-training quantization has been explored to address this issue. Because uniform quantization suffers from significant accuracy loss at low bit-widths, mixed-precision methods have been recently explored; however, they often require substantial computation for bit-width allocation and overlook the varying sensitivity of model performance to the quantization of different experts. We propose a theoretically grounded expert-wise mixed precision strategy that assigns bit-width to each expert primarily based on their change in routers l2 norm during training. Experts with smaller changes are shown to capture less frequent but critical features, and model performance is more sensitive to the quantization of these experts, thus requiring higher precision. Furthermore, to avoid allocating experts to lower precision that inject high quantization noise, experts with large maximum intra-neuron variance are also allocated higher precision. Experiments on large-scale MoE models, including Switch Transformer and Mixtral, show that our method achieves higher accuracy than existing approaches, while also reducing inference cost and incurring only negligible overhead for bit-width assignment.

</details>


### [521] [VLMShield: Efficient and Robust Defense of Vision-Language Models against Malicious Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06502)
*Peigui Qi,Kunsheng Tang,Yanpu Yu,Jialin Wu,Yide Song,Wenbo Zhou,Zhicong Huang,Cheng Hong,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出VLMShield框架，通过多模态聚合特征提取和分布模式分析，实现轻量级视觉语言模型安全检测，防御恶意提示攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在视觉集成过程中对齐能力被削弱，面临恶意提示攻击的安全漏洞。现有防御方法在效率和鲁棒性方面存在不足。

Method: 首先提出多模态聚合特征提取框架，使CLIP能够处理长文本并将多模态信息融合为统一表示。基于特征分布模式分析，开发轻量级安全检测器VLMShield，作为即插即用解决方案识别多模态恶意攻击。

Result: 大量实验证明该方法在鲁棒性、效率和实用性等多个维度上表现优异，为安全多模态AI部署铺平道路。

Conclusion: VLMShield通过特征分布分析有效防御视觉语言模型的恶意提示攻击，提供高效、鲁棒的即插即用安全解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) face significant safety vulnerabilities from malicious prompt attacks due to weakened alignment during visual integration. Existing defenses suffer from efficiency and robustness. To address these challenges, we first propose the Multimodal Aggregated Feature Extraction (MAFE) framework that enables CLIP to handle long text and fuse multimodal information into unified representations. Through empirical analysis of MAFE-extracted features, we discover distinct distributional patterns between benign and malicious prompts. Building upon this finding, we develop VLMShield, a lightweight safety detector that efficiently identifies multimodal malicious attacks as a plug-and-play solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior performance across multiple dimensions, including robustness, efficiency, and utility. Through our work, we hope to pave the way for more secure multimodal AI deployment. Code is available at [this https URL](https://github.com/pgqihere/VLMShield).

</details>


### [522] [Transformer See, Transformer Do: Copying as an Intermediate Step in Learning Analogical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06501)
*Philipp Hellwig,Willem Zuidema,Claire E. Stevenson,Martha Lewis*

Main category: cs.LG
