*Junxiang Pan,Lipu Zhou,Baojie Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HyVGGT-VO是一个结合稀疏视觉里程计计算效率和前馈模型稠密重建能力的新型框架，通过自适应混合跟踪前端和分层优化实现实时姿态估计与全局尺度一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：前馈模型在稠密视觉SLAM系统中计算负担重，只能提供关键帧的稀疏姿态输出且无法实现实时姿态估计；传统稀疏方法计算效率高、输出频率高，但缺乏稠密重建能力。需要结合两者的优势。

Method: 提出HyVGGT-VO框架，首次将传统VO框架与最先进的前馈模型VGGT紧密耦合。设计自适应混合跟踪前端，动态切换传统光流和VGGT跟踪头以确保鲁棒性。引入分层优化框架，联合优化VO姿态和VGGT预测尺度以确保全局尺度一致性。

Result: 相比现有基于VGGT的方法，处理速度提升约5倍。在室内EuRoC数据集上平均轨迹误差降低85%，在室外KITTI基准上降低12%。

Conclusion: HyVGGT-VO成功结合了稀疏VO的计算效率和前馈模型的稠密重建能力，实现了实时姿态估计与全局尺度一致性，为机器人、增强现实等应用提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: Dense visual odometry (VO), which provides pose estimation and dense 3D reconstruction, serves as the cornerstone for applications ranging from robotics to augmented reality. Recently, feed-forward models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in dense mapping. However, when these models are used in dense visual SLAM systems, their heavy computational burden restricts them to yielding sparse pose outputs at keyframes while still failing to achieve real-time pose estimation. In contrast, traditional sparse methods provide high computational efficiency and high-frequency pose outputs, but lack the capability for dense reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose HyVGGT-VO, a novel framework that combines the computational efficiency of sparse VO with the dense reconstruction capabilities of feed-forward models. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to tightly couple a traditional VO framework with VGGT, a state-of-the-art feed-forward model. Specifically, we design an adaptive hybrid tracking frontend that dynamically switches between traditional optical flow and the VGGT tracking head to ensure robustness. Furthermore, we introduce a hierarchical optimization framework that jointly refines VO poses and the scale of VGGT predictions to ensure global scale consistency. Our approach achieves an approximately 5x processing speedup compared to existing VGGT-based methods, while reducing the average trajectory error by 85% on the indoor EuRoC dataset and 12% on the outdoor KITTI benchmark. Our code will be publicly available upon acceptance. Project page: https://geneta2580.github.io/HyVGGT-VO.io.

</details>


### [675] [O-ConNet: Geometry-Aware End-to-End Inference of Over-Constrained Spatial Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02038)
*Haoyu Sun,Meng Zhao,Tianhao Wang,Jianxu Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: O-ConNet：一种端到端深度学习框架，仅需三个稀疏可达点即可推断空间过约束机构的结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹，无需在推理时显式求解约束方程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在科学发现中展现出强大潜力，但其建模宏观刚体运动学约束的能力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探索深度学习在空间过约束机构上的应用，解决从稀疏观测中推断机构参数和运动轨迹的问题。

Method: 提出O-ConNet端到端框架，仅使用三个稀疏可达点作为输入，通过深度学习直接推断机构的结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹。该方法避免了在推理过程中显式求解复杂的约束方程。

Result: 在包含42,860个有效样本的自建Bennett 4R数据集上，O-ConNet取得Param-MAE 0.276±0.077和Traj-MAE 0.145±0.018（10次运行均值±标准差），分别比最强序列基线（LSTM-Seq2Seq）提升65.1%和88.2%。

Conclusion: 端到端学习能够捕捉闭环几何结构，为在极端稀疏观测条件下进行空间过约束机构的逆向设计提供了实用途径。

Abstract: Deep learning has shown strong potential for scientific discovery, but its ability to model macroscopic rigid-body kinematic constraints remains underexplored. We study this problem on spatial over-constrained mechanisms and propose O-ConNet, an end-to-end framework that infers mechanism structural parameters from only three sparse reachable points while reconstructing the full motion trajectory, without explicitly solving constraint equations during inference. On a self-constructed Bennett 4R dataset of 42,860 valid samples, O-ConNet achieves Param-MAE 0.276 +/- 0.077 and Traj-MAE 0.145 +/- 0.018 (mean +/- std over 10 runs), outperforming the strongest sequence baseline (LSTM-Seq2Seq) by 65.1 percent and 88.2 percent, respectively. These results suggest that end-to-end learning can capture closed-loop geometric structure and provide a practical route for inverse design of spatial over-constrained mechanisms under extremely sparse observations.

</details>


### [676] [Bridging Discrete Planning and Continuous Execution for Redundant Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02021)
*Teng Yan,Yue Yu,Yihan Liu,Bingzhuo Zhong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种连接离散规划与连续执行的桥梁框架，通过改进规划侧的动作空间和执行侧的逆运动学层，显著提升了7-DoF冗余机械臂在体素网格强化学习路径规划中的执行质量和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体素网格强化学习在冗余机械臂路径规划中广泛应用，但直接通过逐点数值逆运动学执行会导致步长抖动、关节突变和奇异配置附近的不稳定问题。需要在不修改离散规划器本身的情况下，建立离散规划与连续执行之间的桥梁。

Method: 1) 规划侧：引入步长归一化的26邻域笛卡尔动作和几何平局打破机制，抑制不必要的转向和消除步长振荡；2) 执行侧：实现任务优先级阻尼最小二乘逆运动学层，将末端执行器位置作为主要任务，姿态和关节居中作为投影到零空间的从属任务，结合信任区域裁剪和关节速度约束。

Result: 在7-DoF机械臂的随机稀疏、中等和密集环境中，该方法将密集场景的规划成功率从约0.58提升到1.00，代表性路径长度从约1.53米缩短到1.10米，在保持末端执行器误差低于1毫米的同时，将峰值关节加速度降低了一个数量级以上。

Conclusion: 该桥梁框架显著提高了基于体素的强化学习路径在冗余机械臂上的连续执行质量，通过协调离散规划与连续执行，解决了传统方法中的稳定性问题，为实际应用提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Voxel-grid reinforcement learning is widely adopted for path planning in redundant manipulators due to its simplicity and reproducibility. However, direct execution through point-wise numerical inverse kinematics on 7-DoF arms often yields step-size jitter, abrupt joint transitions, and instability near singular configurations. This work proposes a bridging framework between discrete planning and continuous execution without modifying the discrete planner itself. On the planning side, step-normalized 26-neighbor Cartesian actions and a geometric tie-breaking mechanism are introduced to suppress unnecessary turns and eliminate step-size oscillations. On the execution side, a task-priority damped least-squares (TP-DLS) inverse kinematics layer is implemented. This layer treats end-effector position as a primary task, while posture and joint centering are handled as subordinate tasks projected into the null space, combined with trust-region clipping and joint velocity constraints. On a 7-DoF manipulator in random sparse, medium, and dense environments, this bridge raises planning success in dense scenes from about 0.58 to 1.00, shortens representative path length from roughly 1.53 m to 1.10 m, and while keeping end-effector error below 1 mm, reduces peak joint accelerations by over an order of magnitude, substantially improving the continuous execution quality of voxel-based RL paths on redundant manipulators.

</details>


### [677] [Integrated Identification of Collaborative Robots for Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01991)
*Alessandro Dimauro,Davide Tebaldi,Fabio Pini,Luigi Biagiotti,Francesco Leali*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于模型的集成参数识别方法，用于提高机器人辅助增材制造系统的精度和控制性能，通过五步法识别机器人、执行器和控制器的动态参数，并在6自由度协作机器人上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人辅助增材制造虽然克服了传统笛卡尔系统的尺寸和运动学限制，但机器人动态复杂性增加带来了精度、控制和误差预测方面的挑战。协作机器人通常存在传感器和编程限制，需要可靠的动态模型来提升系统性能。

Method: 提出集成参数识别方法，包含五个步骤：1)几何和惯性分析；2)摩擦参数识别；3)控制器参数识别；4)剩余参数识别；5)物理一致性验证。该方法能够同时识别机器人、执行器和控制器的参数，确保识别参数的物理一致性。

Result: 在6自由度协作机器人上进行热塑性挤出工艺的实际案例验证，实验结果表明识别模型与实际机器人的输出匹配度非常高，证明了该方法能够显著提升机器人辅助3D打印过程中的精度、控制和误差预测能力。

Conclusion: 提出的集成参数识别方法能够为机器人辅助增材制造系统建立可靠的动态模型，即使在协作机器人存在传感器和编程限制的情况下也能有效工作，为提高制造精度和控制系统性能提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: In recent years, the integration of additive manufacturing (AM) and industrial robotics has opened new perspectives for the production of complex components, particularly in the automotive sector. Robot-assisted additive manufacturing processes overcome the dimensional and kinematic limitations of traditional Cartesian systems, enabling non-planar deposition and greater geometric flexibility. However, the increasing dynamic complexity of robotic manipulators introduces challenges related to precision, control, and error prediction. This work proposes a model-based approach equipped with an integrated identification procedure of the system's parameters, including the robot, the actuators and the controllers. We show that the integrated modeling procedure allows to obtain a reliable dynamic model even in the presence of sensory and programming limitations typical of collaborative robots. The manipulator's dynamic model is identified through an integrated five step methodology: starting with geometric and inertial analysis, followed by friction and controller parameters identification, all the way to the remaining parameters identification. The proposed procedure intrinsically ensures the physical consistency of the identified parameters. The identification approach is validated on a real world case study involving a 6-Degrees-Of-Freedom (DoFs) collaborative robot used in a thermoplastic extrusion process. The very good matching between the experimental results given by actual robot and those given by the identified model shows the potential enhancement of precision, control, and error prediction in Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes.

</details>


### [678] [Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective for Bridging Efficiency and Stability in Generative Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01860)
*Yuhui Chen,Haoran Li,Zhennan Jiang,Yuxing Qin,Yuxuan Wan,Weiheng Liu,Dongbin Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: POCO是一种用于机器人操作的强化学习框架，通过后验推理方法优化生成模型策略，避免策略崩溃并提高样本效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管表达性生成模型能够捕捉复杂的多模态动作分布，但通过强化学习微调这些策略仍然面临不稳定性和样本效率低下的挑战

Method: 提出POCO框架，将策略改进形式化为时间动作块的后验推理问题，采用期望最大化过程将奖励加权的隐式后验蒸馏到策略中，无需似然估计，并采用离线到在线范式将在线探索锚定到预训练先验

Result: 在7个仿真基准和4个接触丰富的真实世界任务中，POCO防止了灾难性策略崩溃，优于最先进的基线方法，在真实世界任务中达到96.7%的成功率

Conclusion: POCO为微调大型视觉语言动作模型提供了一种原则性的强化学习框架，能够有效解决策略不稳定性和样本效率问题，在仿真和真实世界任务中都表现出色

Abstract: Expressive generative models have advanced robotic manipulation by capturing complex, multi-modal action distributions over temporally extended trajectories. However, fine-tuning these policies via RL remains challenging due to instability and sample inefficiency. We introduce Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective (POCO), a principled RL framework that formulates policy improvement as a posterior inference problem tailored for temporal action chunks. Through an Expectation-Maximization procedure, POCO distills a reward-weighted implicit posterior into the policy without likelihood estimation. Furthermore, POCO adopts an offline-to-online paradigm that anchors online exploration to pre-trained priors, and its model-agnostic design scales to fine-tune large VLA models without architectural modifications. Evaluations across 7 simulation benchmarks and 4 contact-rich real-world tasks demonstrate that POCO prevents catastrophic policy collapse, outperforms SOTA baselines, and achieves a 96.7% success rate on real-world tasks. Videos are available at our project website https://cccedric.github.io/poco/.

</details>


### [679] [Preferential Bayesian Optimization with Crash Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01776)
*Johanna Menn,David Stenger,Sebastian Trimpe*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CrashPBO：一种在偏好贝叶斯优化中整合实验崩溃反馈的机制，减少硬件系统优化过程中的崩溃次数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在硬件系统（如四旋翼飞行器控制）的参数优化中，标准偏好贝叶斯优化无法处理实验崩溃情况，导致频繁探索会导致崩溃的参数，造成时间浪费和设备损耗

Method: 提出CrashPBO机制，允许用户在优化过程中同时表达偏好和报告崩溃情况，将崩溃信息整合到贝叶斯优化框架中

Result: 在合成函数基准测试中，该机制减少63%的崩溃次数并提高数据效率；在三个机器人平台上验证了方法的广泛适用性和可迁移性

Conclusion: CrashPBO提供了一个灵活、用户友好的框架，用于在参数学习中整合人类对偏好和崩溃的反馈，特别适用于硬件系统的优化

Abstract: Bayesian optimization is a popular black-box optimization method for parameter learning in control and robotics. It typically requires an objective function that reflects the user's optimization goal. However, in practical applications, this objective function is often inaccessible due to complex or unmeasurable performance metrics. Preferential Bayesian optimization (PBO) overcomes this limitation by leveraging human feedback through pairwise comparisons, eliminating the need for explicit performance quantification. When applying PBO to hardware systems, such as in quadcopter control, crashes can cause time-consuming experimental resets, wear and tear, or otherwise undesired outcomes. Standard PBO methods cannot incorporate feedback from such crashed experiments, resulting in the exploration of parameters that frequently lead to experimental crashes. We thus introduce CrashPBO, a user-friendly mechanism that enables users to both express preferences and report crashes during the optimization process. Benchmarking on synthetic functions shows that this mechanism reduces crashes by 63% and increases data efficiency. Through experiments on three robotics platforms, we demonstrate the wide applicability and transferability of CrashPBO, highlighting that it provides a flexible, user-friendly framework for parameter learning with human feedback on preferences and crashes.

</details>


### [680] [Realistic Lip Motion Generation Based on 3D Dynamic Viseme and Coarticulation Modeling for Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01756)
*Sheng Li,Jingcheng Huang,Min Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于3D动态视位和协同发音建模的仿人机器人唇部运动生成框架，通过中文发音理论构建动态视位库，采用声韵母解耦和能量调制的协同发音机制，在14自由度唇部驱动系统上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现逼真的唇部同步对于仿人机器人自然的人机非语言交互至关重要，需要解决连续语音流中的运动冲突问题，为仿人机器人提供轻量、高效且实用的语音驱动唇部运动生成方案。

Method: 1. 基于中文发音理论构建基于ARKit标准的3D动态视位库，提供唇部连贯的先验轨迹；2. 开发协同发音机制，采用声韵母解耦和能量调制解决连续语音流中的运动冲突；3. 设计高维空间唇部运动到14自由度唇部驱动系统的重定向策略。

Result: 通过皮尔逊相关系数(PCC)和平均绝对加加速度(MAJ)指标的定量消融实验验证了所提架构的效率和准确性，表明该方法能够有效生成逼真的唇部运动。

Conclusion: 该研究为仿人机器人的语音驱动唇部运动生成提供了一个轻量、高效且高度实用的范式，3D动态视位库和实际部署视频已在GitHub开源。

Abstract: Realistic lip synchronization is essential for the natural human-robot non-verbal interaction of humanoid robots. Motivated by this need, this paper presents a lip motion generation framework based on 3D dynamic viseme and coarticulation modeling. By analyzing Chinese pronunciation theory, a 3D dynamic viseme library is constructed based on the ARKit standard, which offers coherent prior trajectories of lips. To resolve motion conflicts within continuous speech streams, a coarticulation mechanism is developed by incorporating initial-final (Shengmu-Yunmu) decoupling and energy modulation. After developing a strategy to retarget high-dimensional spatial lip motion to a 14-DOF lip actuation system of a humanoid head platform, the efficiency and accuracy of the proposed architecture is experimentally validated and demonstrated with quantitative ablation experiments using the metrics of the Pearson Correlation Coefficient (PCC) and the Mean Absolute Jerk (MAJ). This research offers a lightweight, efficient, and highly practical paradigm for the speech-driven lip motion generation of humanoid robots. The 3D dynamic viseme library and real-world deployment videos are available at {https://github.com/yuesheng21/Phoneme-to-Lip-14DOF}

</details>


### [681] [Analysis of Efficient Transmission Methods of Grid Maps for Intelligent Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01753)
*Robin Dehler,Dominik Authaler,Aryan Thakur,Thomas Wodtko,Michael Buchholz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于补丁的网格地图通信管道，利用现有压缩算法高效传输网格地图数据，解决智能交通系统中网格地图数据量过大的通信问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网格地图作为智能车辆环境建模的基础方法，虽然无需对象假设，但数据量庞大。补丁网格地图虽能部分缓解，但数据量仍过大，不适用于分布式处理或V2X应用，需要从通信角度解决网格地图数据传输效率问题

Method: 基于补丁网格地图方法，提出补丁式通信管道，利用现有压缩算法高效传输网格地图数据。对车内通信和V2X通信进行全面分析，并通过两个真实世界实验设置验证

Result: 通过提出的通信管道和分析，验证了网格地图数据在智能交通系统中的高效传输可行性，为实际应用提供了技术基础

Conclusion: 总结了智能交通系统中网格地图数据高效传输的推荐指南，为解决网格地图数据量过大导致的通信瓶颈提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Grid mapping is a fundamental approach to modeling the environment of intelligent vehicles or robots. Compared with object-based environment modeling, grid maps offer the distinct advantage of representing the environment without requiring any assumptions about objects, such as type or shape. For grid-map-based approaches, the environment is divided into cells, each containing information about its respective area, such as occupancy. This representation of the entire environment is crucial for achieving higher levels of autonomy. However, it has the drawback that modeling the scene at the cell level results in inherently large data sizes. Patched grid maps tackle this issue to a certain extent by adapting cell sizes in specific areas. Nevertheless, the data sizes of patched grid maps are still too large for novel distributed processing setups or vehicle-to-everything (V2X) applications. Our work builds on a patch-based grid-map approach and investigates the size problem from a communication perspective. To address this, we propose a patch-based communication pipeline that leverages existing compression algorithms to transmit grid-map data efficiently. We provide a comprehensive analysis of this pipeline for both intra-vehicle and V2X-based communication. The analysis is verified for these use cases with two real-world experiment setups. Finally, we summarize recommended guidelines for the efficient transmission of grid-map data in intelligent transportation systems.

</details>


### [682] [Causal Scene Narration with Runtime Safety Supervision for Vision-Language-Action Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01723)
*Yun Li,Yidu Zhang,Simon Thompson,Ehsan Javanmardi,Manabu Tsukada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CSN通过意图-约束对齐、量化基础和结构化分离重构VLA文本输入，结合安全监督和偏好对齐训练，显著提升自动驾驶性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶VLA模型处理导航指令、危险警告和交通状态描述等多样化文本输入时，通常以碎片化方式呈现，迫使模型自行发现哪些环境约束与当前操作相关，导致效率低下

Method: 提出因果场景叙述(CSN)：1) 推理时零GPU成本的意图-约束对齐、量化基础和结构化分离；2) 基于单纯形法的运行时安全监督；3) 使用Plackett-Luce DPO和负对数似然正则化的训练时对齐

Result: 多城镇闭环CARLA评估显示：CSN将原始LMDrive的驾驶评分提升+31.1%，偏好对齐变体提升+24.5%；因果结构贡献39.1%的性能增益；感知噪声消融证实CSN对现实传感误差具有鲁棒性；语义安全监督改善违规评分

Conclusion: CSN通过结构化文本输入显著提升VLA自动驾驶性能，因果结构是关键因素；意图感知监控对VLA系统至关重要，而反应式碰撞时间监控会降低性能

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving must integrate diverse textual inputs, including navigation commands, hazard warnings, and traffic state descriptions, yet current systems often present these as disconnected fragments, forcing the model to discover on its own which environmental constraints are relevant to the current maneuver. We introduce Causal Scene Narration (CSN), which restructures VLA text inputs through intent-constraint alignment, quantitative grounding, and structured separation, at inference time with zero GPU cost. We complement CSN with Simplex-based runtime safety supervision and training-time alignment via Plackett-Luce DPO with negative log-likelihood (NLL) regularization. A multi-town closed-loop CARLA evaluation shows that CSN improves Driving Score by +31.1% on original LMDrive and +24.5% on the preference-aligned variant. A controlled ablation reveals that causal structure accounts for 39.1% of this gain, with the remainder attributable to information content alone. A perception noise ablation confirms that CSN's benefit is robust to realistic sensing errors. Semantic safety supervision improves Infraction Score, while reactive Time-To-Collision monitoring degrades performance, demonstrating that intent-aware monitoring is needed for VLA systems.

</details>


### [683] [Hi-LOAM: Hierarchical Implicit Neural Fields for LiDAR Odometry and Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01720)
*Zhiliu Yang,Jianyuan Zhang,Lianhui Zhao,Jinyu Dai,Zhu Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Hi-LOAM：一种基于多尺度隐式神经表示的自监督LiDAR里程计与建图框架，使用哈希表和八叉树结构存储层次化特征，通过无对应点的扫描到隐式匹配进行位姿估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LOAM框架要么依赖监督信号，要么缺乏重建保真度，难以准确描绘大规模复杂场景的细节。需要克服这些限制，开发更精确、通用的LiDAR定位与建图方法。

Method: 1. 输入LiDAR点云，基于八叉树结构在多个层级的哈希表中学习和存储层次化潜在特征；2. 通过浅层MLP将多尺度特征解码为有符号距离值进行建图；3. 采用无对应点的扫描到隐式匹配范式估计最优位姿，将当前扫描注册到子地图中；4. 整个训练过程自监督进行，无需模型预训练。

Result: 在多个真实世界和合成数据集上的广泛实验表明，Hi-LOAM在有效性和泛化能力方面优于现有最先进方法，展现了卓越的性能。

Conclusion: Hi-LOAM通过多尺度隐式神经表示和自监督学习，实现了高保真度的LiDAR定位与建图，克服了现有方法的局限性，具有良好的泛化能力和实际应用价值。

Abstract: LiDAR Odometry and Mapping (LOAM) is a pivotal technique for embodied-AI applications such as autonomous driving and robot navigation. Most existing LOAM frameworks are either contingent on the supervision signal, or lack of the reconstruction fidelity, which are deficient in depicting details of large-scale complex scenes. To overcome these limitations, we propose a multi-scale implicit neural localization and mapping framework using LiDAR sensor, called Hi-LOAM. Hi-LOAM receives LiDAR point cloud as the input data modality, learns and stores hierarchical latent features in multiple levels of hash tables based on an octree structure, then these multi-scale latent features are decoded into signed distance value through shallow Multilayer Perceptrons (MLPs) in the mapping procedure. For pose estimation procedure, we rely on a correspondence-free, scan-to-implicit matching paradigm to estimate optimal pose and register current scan into the submap. The entire training process is conducted in a self-supervised manner, which waives the model pre-training and manifests its generalizability when applied to diverse environments. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate the superior performance, in terms of the effectiveness and generalization capabilities, of our Hi-LOAM compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [684] [3-D Relative Localization for Multi-Robot Systems with Angle and Self-Displacement Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01703)
*Chenyang Liang,Liangming Chen,Baoyi Cui,Jie Mei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于机器人间内角与自位移测量的三维相对定位框架，包含线性定位理论与抗噪声MAP估计器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决存在测量噪声情况下的机器人间相对定位问题，传统方法易受噪声影响且存在局部最优、先验概率未知、计算复杂度增长等挑战

Method: 1) 提出分布式线性相对定位算法与可定位性充分条件；2) 将线性计算过程重构为流形上的加权总体最小二乘优化问题；3) 结合神经密度估计器处理先验概率未知问题；4) 设计边缘化机制控制计算成本

Result: 开发了系统性的三维相对定位框架，能够在线性方式下确定邻居的相对位置和姿态，并通过改进的MAP估计器有效处理测量噪声，同时保持恒定计算复杂度

Conclusion: 该框架为噪声环境下的机器人相对定位提供了系统解决方案，通过线性理论、WTLS优化、NDE结合和边缘化机制，解决了传统MAP估计器的三个主要挑战

Abstract: Realizing relative localization by leveraging inter-robot local measurements is a challenging problem, especially in the presence of measurement noise. Motivated by this challenge, in this paper we propose a novel and systematic 3-D relative localization framework based on inter-robot interior angle and self-displacement measurements. Initially, we propose a linear relative localization theory comprising a distributed linear relative localization algorithm and sufficient conditions for localizability. According to this theory, robots can determine their neighbors' relative positions and orientations in a purely linear manner. Subsequently, in order to deal with measurement noise, we present an advanced Maximum a Posterior (MAP) estimator by addressing three primary challenges existing in the MAP estimator. Firstly, it is common to formulate the MAP problem as an optimization problem, whose inherent non-convexity can result in local optima. To address this issue, we reformulate the linear computation process of the linear relative localization algorithm as a Weighted Total Least Squares (WTLS) optimization problem on manifolds. The optimal solution of the WTLS problem is more accurate, which can then be used as initial values when solving the optimization problem associated with the MAP problem, thereby reducing the risk of falling into local optima. The second challenge is the lack of knowledge of the prior probability density of the robots' relative positions and orientations at the initial time, which is required as an input for the MAP estimator. To deal with it, we combine the WTLS with a Neural Density Estimator (NDE). Thirdly, to prevent the increasing size of the relative positions and orientations to be estimated as the robots continuously move when solving the MAP problem, a marginalization mechanism is designed, which ensures that the computational cost remains constant.

</details>


### [685] [Bridging Large-Model Reasoning and Real-Time Control via Agentic Fast-Slow Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01681)
*Jiayi Chen,Shuai Wang,Guangxu Zhu,Chengzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Agentic Fast-Slow Planning分层框架，通过感知-决策-轨迹生成-控制解耦，结合VLM场景压缩、LLM决策、语义引导A*搜索和MPC跟踪，提升自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：要么让LLM直接生成轨迹（脆弱、难验证、延迟高），要么在线调整MPC目标（混合慢速决策与快速控制，接口模糊）。需要将语义意图映射到可靠实时控制的有效框架。

Method: 提出分层框架：1) Perception2Decision：车载VLM检测器压缩场景为以自我为中心的拓扑结构，云端LLM决策器映射为符号化驾驶指令；2) Decision2Trajectory：语义引导A*将语言指令嵌入软成本函数，Agentic Refinement模块通过反馈和记忆调整规划器超参数；3) MPC实时跟踪轨迹，困难情况下使用云端引导参考。

Result: 在CARLA仿真实验中，相比纯MPC和A*引导MPC基线，Agentic Fast-Slow Planning在扰动下鲁棒性显著提升：横向偏差减少达45%，完成时间减少超过12%。

Conclusion: 该框架通过解耦不同时间尺度的感知、推理、规划和控制，实现了语义意图到可靠实时控制的有效映射，在保持可解释性的同时提高了自动驾驶系统的性能和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Large foundation models enable powerful reasoning for autonomous systems, but mapping semantic intent to reliable real-time control remains challenging. Existing approaches either (i) let Large Language Models (LLMs) generate trajectories directly - brittle, hard to verify, and latency-prone - or (ii) adjust Model Predictive Control (MPC) objectives online - mixing slow deliberation with fast control and blurring interfaces. We propose Agentic Fast-Slow Planning, a hierarchical framework that decouples perception, reasoning, planning, and control across natural timescales. The framework contains two bridges. Perception2Decision compresses scenes into ego-centric topologies using an on-vehicle Vision-Language Model (VLM) detector, then maps them to symbolic driving directives in the cloud with an LLM decision maker - reducing bandwidth and delay while preserving interpretability. Decision2Trajectory converts directives into executable paths: Semantic-Guided A* embeds language-derived soft costs into classical search to bias solutions toward feasible trajectories, while an Agentic Refinement Module adapts planner hyperparameters using feedback and memory. Finally, MPC tracks the trajectories in real time, with optional cloud-guided references for difficult cases. Experiments in CARLA show that Agentic Fast-Slow Planning improves robustness under perturbations, reducing lateral deviation by up to 45% and completion time by over 12% compared to pure MPC and an A*-guided MPC baseline. Code is available at https://github.com/cjychenjiayi/icra2026_AFSP.

</details>


### [686] [AURA: Multimodal Shared Autonomy for Real-World Urban Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01659)
*Yukai Ma,Honglin He,Selina Song,Wayne Wu,Bolei Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AURA是一个用于城市导航的共享自主框架，将高层人类指令与低层AI控制解耦，通过空间感知指令编码器对齐多模态输入，显著减少接管频率和操作负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂城市环境中的长时程导航依赖持续人工操作，导致疲劳、效率降低和安全问题。现有共享自主方法要求人类和AI在同一动作空间操作，造成高认知负荷。

Method: 提出AURA多模态框架，将城市导航分解为高层人类指令和低层AI控制。包含空间感知指令编码器对齐各种人类指令与视觉空间上下文。构建MM-CoS大规模数据集用于训练。

Result: 仿真和真实世界实验表明，AURA能有效遵循人类指令，减少手动操作负担，提高导航稳定性，支持在线适应。在类似接管条件下，共享自主框架减少接管频率超过44%。

Conclusion: AURA通过解耦高层指令和低层控制，为城市导航提供有效的共享自主解决方案，显著降低人类操作负担和接管需求，提高导航效率和安全性。

Abstract: Long-horizon navigation in complex urban environments relies heavily on continuous human operation, which leads to fatigue, reduced efficiency, and safety concerns. Shared autonomy, where a Vision-Language AI agent and a human operator collaborate on maneuvering the mobile machine, presents a promising solution to address these issues. However, existing shared autonomy methods often require humans and AI to operate within the same action space, leading to high cognitive overhead. We present Assistive Urban Robot Autonomy (AURA), a new multi-modal framework that decomposes urban navigation into high-level human instruction and low-level AI control. AURA incorporates a Spatial-Aware Instruction Encoder to align various human instructions with visual and spatial context. To facilitate training, we construct MM-CoS, a large-scale dataset comprising teleoperation and vision-language descriptions. Experiments in simulation and the real world demonstrate that AURA effectively follows human instructions, reduces manual operation effort, and improves navigation stability, while enabling online adaptation. Moreover, under similar takeover conditions, our shared autonomy framework reduces the frequency of takeovers by more than 44%. Demo video and more detail are provided in the project page.

</details>


### [687] [Smooth Feedback Motion Planning with Reduced Curvature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01614)
*Aref Amiri,Steven M. LaValle*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种在单纯形分解上生成更直接运动轨迹的方法，通过对齐局部向量场和构建星形链来减少路径弯曲，降低控制能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于单元分解的反馈运动规划方法产生的路径存在不必要的弯曲，导致运动速度变慢和控制能耗增加，需要更高效的直接路径生成方法。

Method: 1) 引入启发式方法系统地对齐和分配局部向量场以生成更直接的轨迹；2) 提出新颖的几何算法构建围绕目标的极大星形单纯形链，形成大"漏斗"区域；3) 在该区域内应用最优的直接到目标控制律。

Result: 仿真显示：总弯曲度平均减少91.40%，LQR控制能耗平均降低45.47%。与基于采样和优化的规划器相比，验证了时间效率和鲁棒性优势。

Conclusion: 该方法在低维配置空间(d≤3)中计算可行，能有效生成更直接的轨迹，减少路径弯曲和控制能耗，同时保持形式化保证和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Feedback motion planning over cell decompositions provides a robust method for generating collision-free robot motion with formal guarantees. However, existing algorithms often produce paths with unnecessary bending, leading to slower motion and higher control effort. This paper presents a computationally efficient method to mitigate this issue for a given simplicial decomposition. A heuristic is introduced that systematically aligns and assigns local vector fields to produce more direct trajectories, complemented by a novel geometric algorithm that constructs a maximal star-shaped chain of simplexes around the goal. This creates a large ``funnel'' in which an optimal, direct-to-goal control law can be safely applied. Simulations demonstrate that our method generates measurably more direct paths, reducing total bending by an average of 91.40\% and LQR control effort by an average of 45.47\%. Furthermore, comparative analysis against sampling-based and optimization-based planners confirms the time efficacy and robustness of our approach. While the proposed algorithms work over any finite-dimensional simplicial complex embedded in the collision-free subset of the configuration space, the practical application focuses on low-dimensional ($d\le3$) configuration spaces, where simplicial decomposition is computationally tractable.

</details>


### [688] [Boosting Vision-Language-Action Finetuning with Feasible Action Neighborhood Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01570)
*Haochen Niu,Kanyu Zhang,Shuyu Yin,Qinghai Guo,Peilin Liu,Fei Wen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出FAN引导的正则化方法，通过高斯先验使VLA模型输出分布与可行动作邻域几何对齐，提升机器人操作任务的样本效率和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实机器人操作中，每个状态存在可行动作邻域而非单一正确动作，但当前VLA训练方法直接从语言设置继承，未利用FAN特性，导致泛化差和样本效率低。

Method: 引入FAN引导的正则化器，通过高斯先验使模型输出分布与FAN几何对齐，促进在偏好方向和幅度周围的局部平滑单峰预测。

Result: 在强化微调和监督微调实验中，该方法显著提升了样本效率和成功率，在分布内和分布外场景均表现优异。

Conclusion: 通过与物理操作内在动作容差对齐，FAN引导的正则化为样本高效、可泛化的VLA适应提供了原则性和实用的方法。

Abstract: In real-world robotic manipulation, states typically admit a neighborhood of near-equivalent actions. That is, for each state, there exist a feasible action neighborhood (FAN) rather than a single correct action, within which motions yield indistinguishable progress. However, prevalent VLA training methodologies are directly inherited from linguistic settings and do not exploit the FAN property, thus leading to poor generalization and low sample efficiency. To address this limitation, we introduce a FAN-guided regularizer that shapes the model's output distribution to align with the geometry of FAN. Concretely, we introduce a Gaussian prior that promotes locally smooth and unimodal predictions around the preferred direction and magnitude. In extensive experiments across both reinforced finetuning (RFT) and supervised finetuning (SFT), our method achieves significant improvement in sample efficiency, and success rate in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. By aligning with the intrinsic action tolerance of physical manipulation, FAN-guided regularization provides a principled and practical method for sample-efficient, and generalizable VLA adaptation.

</details>


### [689] [AnchorVLA: Anchored Diffusion for Efficient End-to-End Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01567)
*Jia Syuen Lim,Zhizhen Zhang,Peter Bohm,Brendan Tidd,Zi Huang,Yadan Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AnchorVLA：一种用于移动操作的扩散式VLA策略，通过锚定扩散和轻量级自校正机制，在保持多模态动作生成的同时降低推理成本并减少块化导致的漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动操作中的核心挑战是在保持多个合理动作模型的同时在执行期间保持反应性。扩散策略虽然能建模多模态动作分布，但完整迭代去噪在控制时成本高昂；动作分块虽能分摊推理成本，却会导致部分开环行为和漂移累积。

Method: AnchorVLA结合轻量级VLA适配骨干和锚定扩散动作头，后者在锚定轨迹周围使用截断扩散计划进行局部去噪。为减轻分块导致的漂移，引入测试时自校正机制，通过轻量级残差校正模块在部署期间进行高频、每步调整。

Result: 在多样化的移动操作任务中，AnchorVLA在扰动和分布偏移下提高了成功率和稳定性，同时保持了低延迟推理。

Conclusion: AnchorVLA通过锚定扩散和自校正机制，实现了多模态动作生成与高效闭环控制的平衡，为移动操作提供了鲁棒且反应灵敏的解决方案。

Abstract: A central challenge in mobile manipulation is preserving multiple plausible action models while remaining reactive during execution. A bottle in a cluttered scene can often be approached and grasped in multiple valid ways. Robust behavior depends on preserving this action diversity while remaining reactive as the scene evolves. Diffusion policies are appealing because they model multimodal action distributions rather than collapsing to one solution. But in practice, full iterative denoising is costly at control time. Action chunking helps amortize inference, yet it also creates partially open-loop behavior, allowing small mismatches to accumulate into drift. We present AnchorVLA, a diffusion-based VLA policy for mobile manipulation built on the core insight that when sampling begins near a plausible solution manifold, extensive denoising is unnecessary to recover multimodal, valid actions. AnchorVLA combines a lightweight VLA adaptation backbone with an anchored diffusion action head, which denoises locally around anchor trajectories using a truncated diffusion schedule. This retains multimodal action generation while reducing inference cost for closed-loop control. Crucially, to mitigate chunking-induced drift, we introduce a test-time self-correction mechanism via a lightweight residual correction module that makes high-frequency, per-step adjustments during rollout. Across diverse mobile manipulation tasks, AnchorVLA improves success and stability under disturbances and distribution shifts while maintaining low-latency inference. The source code is made available at https://github.com/jason-lim26/AnchorVLA.

</details>


### [690] [A Dynamic Toolkit for Transmission Characteristics of Precision Reducers with Explicit Contact Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02387)
*Jiacheng Miao,Chao Liu,Qiliang Wang,Yunhui Guan,Weidong He*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发用于精密减速器传动特性分析的动态工具包，通过显式接触几何建模实现更高精度和计算效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 精密减速器是机器人系统中的关键部件，直接影响人形机器人、四足机器人、协作机器人、工业机器人和SCARA机器人的运动精度和动态性能。传统动力学软件在建模准确接触行为、评估齿轮刚度和预测系统振动方面存在挑战。

Method: 提出统一框架，集成先进接触理论和数值求解方法，采用模块化、可脚本化的架构设计，支持跨不同减速器拓扑结构的快速重构。

Result: 与已发布的基准测试进行数值验证，确认了所提方法的准确性。相比传统动力学软件，该工具包提供更高的精度和计算效率。

Conclusion: 该动态工具包为精密减速器的传动特性分析提供了有效的解决方案，能够准确建模接触行为、评估刚度和预测振动，支持多种机器人应用中的减速器设计优化。

Abstract: Precision reducers are critical components in robotic systems, directly affecting the motion accuracy and dynamic performance of humanoid robots, quadruped robots, collaborative robots, industrial robots, and SCARA robots. This paper presents a dynamic toolkit for analyzing the transmission characteristics of precision reducers with explicit contact geometry. A unified framework is proposed to address the challenges in modeling accurate contact behaviors, evaluating gear stiffness, and predicting system vibrations. By integrating advanced contact theories and numerical solving methods, the proposed toolkit offers higher precision and computational efficiency compared to traditional dynamics software. The toolkit is designed with a modular, scriptable architecture that supports rapid reconfiguration across diverse reducer topologies. Numerical validation against published benchmarks confirms the accuracy of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [691] [Distal-Stable Beam for Continuum Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01490)
*Ryouichi Saito,Takahiro Koide,Yuya Tanaka,Yasutaka Nakashima,Motoji Yamamoto,Ayato Kanada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新型结构单元"远端稳定梁"，通过纯几何设计实现强刚度梯度，在保持中间段柔顺性的同时确保远端高刚性，为连续体机器人提供同时具备安全性和精度的新设计方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续体机器人适用于受限环境，但存在远端刚度低的问题，导致在外载荷下产生较大姿态误差。现有设计难以同时实现柔顺性和远端稳定性。

Method: 提出远端稳定梁结构单元，由两根平行杆和一根收敛杆通过导向盘约束构成。这种几何耦合设计抑制变形模式，保持远端姿态，通过纯几何方式实现强刚度梯度。

Result: 实验显示远端刚度比中心高12倍，相比传统悬臂梁提升约100倍。该机制无需主动刚度调节即可同时实现柔顺性和远端稳定性。

Conclusion: 远端稳定梁为需要同时具备安全性和精度的连续体机器人提供了新的设计方法，通过几何设计实现刚度梯度，解决了柔顺性与远端稳定性之间的矛盾。

Abstract: Continuum robots are well suited for constrained environments but suffer from low distal stiffness, resulting in large posture errors under external loads. In this paper, we propose a novel structural primitive, the Distal-Stable Beam, which achieves a strong stiffness gradient through purely geometric design, maintaining compliance in the intermediate section while ensuring high distal rigidity. The structure consists of two parallel rods and one convergent rod constrained by guide disks, introducing geometric coupling that suppresses deformation modes and preserves distal posture. Experiments show that the distal stiffness is 12 times higher than at the center, corresponding to an approximately 100-fold improvement over a conventional cantilever beam. The proposed mechanism enables simultaneous compliance and distal stability without active stiffness modulation, providing a new design approach for continuum robots requiring both safety and precision.

</details>


### [692] [Efficient Equivariant Transformer for Self-Driving Agent Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01466)
*Scott Xu,Dian Chen,Kelvin Wong,Chris Zhang,Kion Fallah,Raquel Urtasun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DriveGATr：一种基于几何代数的SE(2)-等变Transformer架构，用于自动驾驶中的智能体建模，无需显式成对相对位置编码，降低了计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶中准确建模智能体行为需要考虑场景对称性（如智能体顺序不变性和SE(2)-等变性）。现有Transformer方法通过显式成对相对位置编码实现SE(2)-等变性，但计算成本随智能体数量呈二次方增长，限制了在大规模场景和批处理中的可扩展性。

Method: 提出DriveGATr架构：1）将场景元素编码为二维投影几何代数ℝ*_{2,0,1}中的多向量；2）使用等变Transformer块堆栈处理这些表示；3）关键创新：通过多向量间的标准注意力建模几何关系，无需显式成对相对位置编码。

Result: 在Waymo Open Motion Dataset上的实验表明：1）DriveGATr在交通模拟任务上达到最先进水平；2）在性能与计算成本之间建立了更优的帕累托前沿；3）计算效率显著提升，避免了二次方成本。

Conclusion: DriveGATr通过几何代数表示和标准注意力机制，实现了SE(2)-等变的智能体建模，在保持性能的同时大幅降低了计算成本，为大规模自动驾驶场景建模提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Accurately modeling agent behaviors is an important task in self-driving. It is also a task with many symmetries, such as equivariance to the order of agents and objects in the scene or equivariance to arbitrary roto-translations of the entire scene as a whole; i.e., SE(2)-equivariance. The transformer architecture is a ubiquitous tool for modeling these symmetries. While standard self-attention is inherently permutation equivariant, explicit pairwise relative positional encodings have been the standard for introducing SE(2)-equivariance. However, this approach introduces an additional cost that is quadratic in the number of agents, limiting its scalability to larger scenes and batch sizes. In this work, we propose DriveGATr, a novel transformer-based architecture for agent modeling that achieves SE(2)-equivariance without the computational cost of existing methods. Inspired by recent advances in geometric deep learning, DriveGATr encodes scene elements as multivectors in the 2D projective geometric algebra $\mathbb{R}^*_{2,0,1}$ and processes them with a stack of equivariant transformer blocks. Crucially, DriveGATr models geometric relationships using standard attention between multivectors, eliminating the need for costly explicit pairwise relative positional encodings. Experiments on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset demonstrate that DriveGATr is comparable to the state-of-the-art in traffic simulation and establishes a superior Pareto front for performance vs computational cost.

</details>


### [693] [Low-Burden LLM-Based Preference Learning: Personalizing Assistive Robots from Natural Language Feedback for Users with Paralysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01463)
*Keshav Shankar,Dan Ding,Wei Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于大语言模型的低负担离线框架，将自然语言反馈直接转换为确定性机器人控制策略，减少运动障碍用户的认知负担


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统偏好学习方法（如穷举成对比较）对严重运动障碍用户造成严重的身体和认知疲劳，需要更人性化的个性化机器人行为设计方法

Method: 使用基于职业治疗实践框架（OTPF）的大语言模型，将模糊的人类语音解码为明确的生理和心理需求，映射为透明决策树，并通过"LLM-as-a-Judge"自动验证代码结构安全性

Result: 在10名瘫痪成人的模拟备餐研究中，自然语言方法显著降低用户工作负荷，独立临床专家确认生成策略安全且准确反映用户偏好

Conclusion: 该框架成功将自然语言反馈转化为安全的机器人控制策略，为物理辅助机器人提供低负担的个性化行为设计解决方案

Abstract: Physically Assistive Robots (PARs) require personalized behaviors to ensure user safety and comfort. However, traditional preference learning methods, like exhaustive pairwise comparisons, cause severe physical and cognitive fatigue for users with profound motor impairments. To solve this, we propose a low-burden, offline framework that translates unstructured natural language feedback directly into deterministic robotic control policies. To safely bridge the gap between ambiguous human speech and robotic code, our pipeline uses Large Language Models (LLMs) grounded in the Occupational Therapy Practice Framework (OTPF). This clinical reasoning decodes subjective user reactions into explicit physical and psychological needs, which are then mapped into transparent decision trees. Before deployment, an automated "LLM-as-a-Judge" verifies the code's structural safety. We validated this system in a simulated meal preparation study with 10 adults with paralysis. Results show our natural language approach significantly reduces user workload compared to traditional baselines. Additionally, independent clinical experts confirmed the generated policies are safe and accurately reflect user preferences.

</details>


### [694] [Learning When to See and When to Feel: Adaptive Vision-Torque Fusion for Contact-Aware Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01414)
*Jiuzhou Lei,Chang Liu,Yu She,Xiao Liang,Minghui Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究比较了不同力/力矩-视觉信号集成策略在基于扩散的机器人操作策略中的表现，并提出了一种自适应集成方法，在非接触阶段忽略力/力矩信号，在接触阶段自适应利用视觉和力矩信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于视觉的策略在机器人操作中表现良好，但在接触密集和力敏感的任务中，纯视觉传感不足，需要力/力矩信号提供接触动力学、对齐和交互质量的关键信息。虽然已有多种视觉与力/力矩信号集成策略，但缺乏对这些方法的系统比较。

Method: 研究比较了不同的力/力矩-视觉集成策略，包括辅助预测目标、专家混合架构和接触感知门控机制。提出了一种自适应集成策略，在非接触阶段忽略力/力矩信号，在接触阶段自适应地利用视觉和力矩信息。

Result: 实验结果表明，提出的自适应集成方法在成功率上比最强基线提高了14%，突显了接触感知多模态融合对机器人操作的重要性。

Conclusion: 该研究系统比较了不同的力/力矩-视觉集成策略，并证明提出的自适应接触感知多模态融合方法在机器人操作任务中具有优越性能，强调了根据接触状态自适应集成多模态信息的重要性。

Abstract: Vision-based policies have achieved a good performance in robotic manipulation due to the accessibility and richness of visual observations. However, purely visual sensing becomes insufficient in contact-rich and force-sensitive tasks where force/torque (F/T) signals provide critical information about contact dynamics, alignment, and interaction quality. Although various strategies have been proposed to integrate vision and F/T signals, including auxiliary prediction objectives, mixture-of-experts architectures, and contact-aware gating mechanisms, a comparison of these approaches remains lacking. In this work, we provide a comparison study of different F/T-vision integration strategies within diffusion-based manipulation policies. In addition, we propose an adaptive integration strategy that ignores F/T signals during non-contact phases while adaptively leveraging both vision and torque information during contact. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms the strongest baseline by 14% in success rate, highlighting the importance of contact-aware multimodal fusion for robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [695] [A soft and lightweight fabric-based pneumatic interface for multimodal fingertip tactile feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01390)
*Rui Chen,Daniele Leonardis,Antonio Frisoli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于织物的气动驱动指尖触觉设备，重量仅2.1克，可实现多种触觉模式的高精度识别


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可穿戴指尖触觉设备难以同时实现足够的触觉输出、低质量、简单制造和无束缚便携性，需要一种新的技术方案来填补这一空白

Method: 采用织物基气动驱动技术，通过计算机数控热封工艺制造四个热塑性聚氨酯涂层织物气动腔，形成柔软贴合接口，配合腕戴式控制单元实现无束缚操作

Result: 机械和动态特性测试确认织物驱动器能产生足够的力、位移和带宽用于指尖触觉渲染；15名参与者的心理物理学研究显示，在三种触觉模式（接触配置、定向滑动、振动触觉频率）上的分类准确率超过90%

Conclusion: 织物基气动驱动技术为轻量化、低成本、多模态指尖触觉接口提供了一条可行的技术路线

Abstract: Wearable fingertip haptic devices are critical for realistic interaction in virtual reality, augmented reality, and teleoperation, yet existing approaches struggle to simultaneously achieve adequate tactile output, low mass, simple fabrication, and untethered portability. Here we show that fabric-based pneumatic actuation can address this gap. Our device comprises four pneumatic chambers fabricated from thermoplastic polyurethane-coated fabric via computer numerical control heat-sealing, yielding a soft, conformable interface weighing 2.1 g that operates untethered with a wrist-mounted control unit. Mechanical and dynamic characterization confirms that the fabric actuators produce sufficient force, displacement, and bandwidth for fingertip tactile rendering. A psychophysical study with 15 participants demonstrates classification accuracy exceeding 90% across three distinct tactile modes -- contact configuration, directional sliding, and vibrotactile frequency. These findings establish fabric-based pneumatic actuation as a viable technology route for lightweight, low-cost, and multimodal fingertip haptic interfaces.

</details>


### [696] [Open-loop POMDP Simplification and Safe Skipping of Replanning with Formal Performance Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01352)
*Da Kong,Vadim Indelman*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种具有形式性能保证的自适应开环简化框架，通过拓扑信念树交替开环和闭环规划，显著降低POMDP规划复杂度，并提供可计算边界确保最优动作识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: POMDP为不确定性下的决策提供了原则性数学框架，但精确求解计算不可行。需要解决计算难处理性问题，同时保持形式性能保证。

Method: 提出自适应开环简化框架：1) 通过拓扑信念树自适应交替开环和闭环规划；2) 推导可计算边界确保识别原始POMDP的最优动作；3) 提出安全跳过重规划框架，支持多步开环动作序列的理论保证；4) 开发实用在线求解器，包括基于采样的求解器和随时求解器。

Result: 经验结果表明，在保持可证明性能保证的同时实现了显著的计算加速，推进了POMDP规划的可处理性和效率。这是首个解决跳过重规划问题并提供形式性能保证的框架。

Conclusion: 该框架通过自适应开环简化有效解决了POMDP的计算难处理性问题，提供了形式性能保证和实用求解器，在计算效率和性能保证之间取得了平衡。

Abstract: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) provide a principled mathematical framework for decision-making under uncertainty. However, the exact solution to POMDPs is computationally intractable. In this paper, we address the computational intractability by introducing a novel framework for adaptive open-loop simplification with formal performance guarantees. Our method adaptively interleaves open-loop and closed-loop planning via a topology-based belief tree, enabling a significant reduction in planning complexity. The key contribution lies in the derivation of efficiently computable bounds which provide formal guarantees and can be used to ensure that our simplification can identify the immediate optimal action of the original POMDP problem. Our framework therefore provides computationally tractable performance guarantees for macro-actions within POMDPs. Furthermore, we propose a novel framework for safely skipping replanning during execution, supported by theoretical guarantees on multi-step open-loop action sequences. To the best of our knowledge, this framework is the first to address skipping replanning with formal performance guarantees. Practical online solvers for our proposed simplification are developed, including a sampling-based solver and an anytime solver. Empirical results demonstrate substantial computational speedups while maintaining provable performance guarantees, advancing the tractability and efficiency of POMDP planning.

</details>


### [697] [Functional Force-Aware Retargeting from Virtual Human Demos to Soft Robot Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01224)
*Uksang Yoo,Mengjia Zhu,Evan Pezent,Jom Preechayasomboon,Jean Oh,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Amir Memar,Ben Abbatematteo,Homanga Bharadhwaj,Ashish Deshpande,Harsha Prahlad*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SoftAct框架通过显式建模接触力，利用VR采集人类演示数据，采用两阶段力感知重定向算法，解决软体机器人手与人类手之间的本体不匹配问题，实现接触丰富的操作技能迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法仅重定向人类关节轨迹，无法有效处理软体机器人手与人类手之间的极端本体不匹配和非线性柔顺性，特别是在接触丰富的操作任务中，接触几何和力分布对技能迁移至关重要。

Method: 1) 利用沉浸式VR采集包含手部运动学、物体运动、密集接触斑块和详细接触力信息的人类演示；2) 两阶段力感知重定向算法：第一阶段将演示接触力分配到各手指并建立力平衡映射，第二阶段结合末端执行器姿态跟踪与测地加权接触细化进行在线重定向。

Result: 在定制非人形气动软体机器人手上测试：相比运动学和基于学习的基线方法，SoftAct控制器将指尖轨迹跟踪RMSE降低达55%，跟踪方差降低达69%；在策略层面，在零样本真实世界部署和仿真中均获得更高成功率。

Conclusion: 显式建模接触几何和力分布对于软体机器人手的有效技能迁移至关重要，仅通过运动学模仿无法恢复这些信息。SoftAct框架能够再现人类演示的功能意图，同时自然适应极端本体不匹配和非线性柔顺性。

Abstract: We introduce SoftAct, a framework for teaching soft robot hands to perform human-like manipulation skills by explicitly reasoning about contact forces. Leveraging immersive virtual reality, our system captures rich human demonstrations, including hand kinematics, object motion, dense contact patches, and detailed contact force information. Unlike conventional approaches that retarget human joint trajectories, SoftAct employs a two-stage, force-aware retargeting algorithm. The first stage attributes demonstrated contact forces to individual human fingers and allocates robot fingers proportionally, establishing a force-balanced mapping between human and robot hands. The second stage performs online retargeting by combining baseline end-effector pose tracking with geodesic-weighted contact refinements, using contact geometry and force magnitude to adjust robot fingertip targets in real time. This formulation enables soft robotic hands to reproduce the functional intent of human demonstrations while naturally accommodating extreme embodiment mismatch and nonlinear compliance. We evaluate SoftAct on a suite of contact-rich manipulation tasks using a custom non-anthropomorphic pneumatic soft robot hand. SoftAct's controller reduces fingertip trajectory tracking RMSE by up to 55 percent and reduces tracking variance by up to 69 percent compared to kinematic and learning-based baselines. At the policy level, SoftAct achieves consistently higher success in zero-shot real-world deployment and in simulation. These results demonstrate that explicitly modeling contact geometry and force distribution is essential for effective skill transfer to soft robotic hands, and cannot be recovered through kinematic imitation alone. Project videos and additional details are available at https://soft-act.github.io/.

</details>


### [698] [Collaborative Task and Path Planning for Heterogeneous Robotic Teams using Multi-Agent PPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01213)
*Matthias Rubio,Julia Richter,Hendrik Kolvenbach,Marco Hutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于MAPPO的多机器人协同规划方法，用于解决异质机器人团队在行星探索中的目标分配与调度问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行星探索需要多机器人协同工作，但传统规划算法在问题规模增大时计算成本过高，无法实现实时规划

Method: 采用多智能体近端策略优化(MAPPO)算法，将计算复杂度从运行时转移到训练时，实现实时协同规划

Result: 与穷举搜索的单目标最优解进行基准测试，并在行星探索场景中评估在线重规划能力

Conclusion: 学习基方法为解决复杂多机器人协同规划问题提供了可行方案，是实现实时规划的关键步骤

Abstract: Efficient robotic extraterrestrial exploration requires robots with diverse capabilities, ranging from scientific measurement tools to advanced locomotion. A robotic team enables the distribution of tasks over multiple specialized subsystems, each providing specific expertise to complete the mission. The central challenge lies in efficiently coordinating the team to maximize utilization and the extraction of scientific value. Classical planning algorithms scale poorly with problem size, leading to long planning cycles and high inference costs due to the combinatorial growth of possible robot-target allocations and possible trajectories. Learning-based methods are a viable alternative that move the scaling concern from runtime to training time, setting a critical step towards achieving real-time planning. In this work, we present a collaborative planning strategy based on Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO) to coordinate a team of heterogeneous robots to solve a complex target allocation and scheduling problem. We benchmark our approach against single-objective optimal solutions obtained through exhaustive search and evaluate its ability to perform online replanning in the context of a planetary exploration scenario.

</details>


### [699] [SMASH: Mastering Scalable Whole-Body Skills for Humanoid Ping-Pong with Egocentric Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01158)
*Junli Ren,Yinghui Li,Kai Zhang,Penglin Fu,Haoran Jiang,Yixuan Pan,Guangjun Zeng,Tao Huang,Weizhong Guo,Peng Lu,Tianyu Li,Jingbo Wang,Li Chen,Hongyang Li,Ping Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种模块化的人形机器人乒乓球系统，通过机载感知和全身协调控制实现敏捷击球，无需外部摄像头，首次实现仅使用机载传感器的连续击球。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人形机器人乒乓球系统依赖外部感知且无法实现敏捷的全身协调控制，主要面临两个核心挑战：快速运动下的低延迟机载感知，以及获取足够多样化的任务对齐击球动作来学习精确自然的全身行为。

Method: 提出模块化系统，结合可扩展的全身技能学习与机载自我中心感知。通过紧密协调的全身控制实现敏捷精确的球体交互，使用生成模型增强和多样化击球动作，建立可扩展的运动先验，产生自然稳健的击球行为。

Result: 在真实世界实验中展示了高速条件下的稳定精确球体交换，验证了可扩展的感知驱动全身技能学习。首次实现仅使用机载传感器的人形机器人连续击球系统，克服了低延迟感知、自我运动引起的不稳定性和有限视野等挑战。

Conclusion: 该系统通过统一可扩展的全身技能学习与机载感知，实现了敏捷的人形机器人乒乓球交互，为动态人形交互任务提供了可扩展的感知驱动全身技能学习框架。

Abstract: Existing humanoid table tennis systems remain limited by their reliance on external sensing and their inability to achieve agile whole-body coordination for precise task execution. These limitations stem from two core challenges: achieving low-latency and robust onboard egocentric perception under fast robot motion, and obtaining sufficiently diverse task-aligned strike motions for learning precise yet natural whole-body behaviors. In this work, we present \methodname, a modular system for agile humanoid table tennis that unifies scalable whole-body skill learning with onboard egocentric perception, eliminating the need for external cameras during deployment. Our work advances prior humanoid table-tennis systems in three key aspects. First, we achieve agile and precise ball interaction with tightly coordinated whole-body control, rather than relying on decoupled upper- and lower-body behaviors. This enables the system to exhibit diverse strike motions, including explosive whole-body smashes and low crouching shots. Second, by augmenting and diversifying strike motions with a generative model, our framework benefits from scalable motion priors and produces natural, robust striking behaviors across a wide workspace. Third, to the best of our knowledge, we demonstrate the first humanoid table-tennis system capable of consecutive strikes using onboard sensing alone, despite the challenges of low-latency perception, ego-motion-induced instability, and limited field of view. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate stable and precise ball exchanges under high-speed conditions, validating scalable, perception-driven whole-body skill learning for dynamic humanoid interaction tasks.

</details>


### [700] [Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation under Distribution Shift with Bounded Extremum Seeking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01142)
*Shaifalee Saxena,Rafael Fierro,Alexander Scheinker*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种结合强化学习与有界极值搜索的混合控制器，用于提升机器人操作任务在分布外条件下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习在机器人操作中表现良好，但训练的策略在测试条件与训练分布不同时性能会下降。这在接触丰富的任务（如推动和抓放）中尤为明显，因为目标、接触条件或机器人动力学的变化都可能导致推理时系统处于分布外状态。

Method: 提出混合控制器，将深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）策略与有界极值搜索（ES）相结合。DDPG策略在标准条件下训练机器人推动和抓放任务，部署时与有界ES结合。RL策略提供快速操作行为，有界ES确保控制器在操作条件偏离训练条件时对时间变化的鲁棒性。

Result: 控制器在多种分布外设置下进行评估，包括时变目标和空间变化的摩擦斑块。混合控制器在这些条件下表现出比纯RL策略更好的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 结合强化学习与有界极值搜索的混合控制器能够有效提升机器人操作任务在分布外条件下的鲁棒性，为实际部署提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning has shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, but learned policies often degrade in performance when test conditions differ from the training distribution. This limitation is especially important in contact-rich tasks such as pushing and pick-and-place, where changes in goals, contact conditions, or robot dynamics can drive the system out-of-distribution at inference time. In this paper, we investigate a hybrid controller that combines reinforcement learning with bounded extremum seeking to improve robustness under such conditions. In the proposed approach, deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) policies are trained under standard conditions on the robotic pushing and pick-and-place tasks, and are then combined with bounded ES during deployment. The RL policy provides fast manipulation behavior, while bounded ES ensures robustness of the overall controller to time variations when operating conditions depart from those seen during training. The resulting controller is evaluated under several out-of-distribution settings, including time-varying goals and spatially varying friction patches.

</details>


### [701] [VRUD: A Drone Dataset for Complex Vehicle-VRU Interactions within Mixed Traffic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01134)
*Ziyu Wang,Hongrui Kou,Cheng Wang,Ruochen Li,Hubert P. H. Shum,Amir Atapour-Abarghouei,Yuxin Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于无人机的高精度数据集构建方法，创建了车辆-弱势道路使用者交互数据集(VRUD)，填补了复杂非结构化城市环境中自动驾驶数据集的空白


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开源数据集主要关注高速公路或规范交叉口等结构化场景，缺乏对混乱、非结构化城市环境的数据表示，而城市L4自动驾驶面临高密度弱势道路使用者及其高度不确定交互行为的挑战

Method: 提出高效的无人机数据集构建方法，从深圳典型"城中村"收集数据，使用4K/30Hz记录，基于新型向量碰撞时间阈值提取多智能体交互场景，并支持标准OpenDRIVE高清地图

Result: 创建了包含4小时4K/30Hz记录的VRUD数据集，包含11,479个VRU轨迹和1,939个车辆轨迹，VRU占比约87%，远超现有基准，提取了4,002个多智能体交互场景

Conclusion: VRUD数据集为增强自动驾驶系统在复杂非结构化城市环境中的安全性能提供了宝贵的边缘案例资源，已开源供进一步研究

Abstract: The Operational Design Domain (ODD) of urbanoriented Level 4 (L4) autonomous driving, especially for autonomous robotaxis, confronts formidable challenges in complex urban mixed traffic environments. These challenges stem mainly from the high density of Vulnerable Road Users (VRUs) and their highly uncertain and unpredictable interaction behaviors. However, existing open-source datasets predominantly focus on structured scenarios such as highways or regulated intersections, leaving a critical gap in data representing chaotic, unstructured urban environments. To address this, this paper proposes an efficient, high-precision method for constructing drone-based datasets and establishes the Vehicle-Vulnerable Road User Interaction Dataset (VRUD), as illustrated in Figure 1. Distinct from prior works, VRUD is collected from typical "Urban Villages" in Shenzhen, characterized by loose traffic supervision and extreme occlusion. The dataset comprises 4 hours of 4K/30Hz recording, containing 11,479 VRU trajectories and 1,939 vehicle trajectories. A key characteristic of VRUD is its composition: VRUs account for about 87% of all traffic participants, significantly exceeding the proportions in existing benchmarks. Furthermore, unlike datasets that only provide raw trajectories, we extracted 4,002 multi-agent interaction scenarios based on a novel Vector Time to Collision (VTTC) threshold, supported by standard OpenDRIVE HD maps. This study provides valuable, rare edge-case resources for enhancing the safety performance of ADS in complex, unstructured urban environments. To facilitate further research, we have made the VRUD dataset open-source at: https://zzi4.github.io/VRUD/.

</details>


### [702] [BAT: Balancing Agility and Stability via Online Policy Switching for Long-Horizon Whole-Body Humanoid Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01064)
*Donghoon Baek,Sang-Hun Kim,Sehoon Ha*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出BAT框架：通过在线策略切换在两种互补的全身RL控制器间动态选择，平衡敏捷性与稳定性，实现长时域全身行为控制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在全局协调的耦合全身策略与模块化精度的解耦策略之间存在权衡，缺乏系统集成方法来解决敏捷性、鲁棒性和精度之间的平衡问题

Method: BAT框架包含：1) 基于分层RL的切换策略，采用滑动时域策略预评估的专家指导；2) 选项感知VQ-VAE，从离散运动令牌序列预测选项偏好；3) 两模块置信度加权融合的最终决策

Result: 在Unitree G1人形机器人上的仿真和真实实验表明，BAT能够实现多功能的长时域运动-操作任务，并在多样化任务中优于现有方法

Conclusion: BAT框架通过动态策略切换成功解决了敏捷性、鲁棒性和精度之间的权衡问题，为长时域全身行为控制提供了有效的统一解决方案

Abstract: Despite recent advances in control, reinforcement learning, and imitation learning, developing a unified framework that can achieve agile, precise, and robust whole-body behaviors, particularly in long-horizon tasks, remains challenging. Existing approaches typically follow two paradigms: coupled whole-body policies for global coordination and decoupled policies for modular precision. However, without a systematic method to integrate both, this trade-off between agility, robustness, and precision remains unresolved. In this work, we propose BAT, an online policy-switching framework that dynamically selects between two complementary whole-body RL controllers to balance agility and stability across different motion contexts. Our framework consists of two complementary modules: a switching policy learned via hierarchical RL with an expert guidance from sliding-horizon policy pre-evaluation, and an option-aware VQ-VAE that predicts option preference from discrete motion token sequences for improved generalization. The final decision is obtained via confidence-weighted fusion of two modules. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot demonstrate that BAT enables versatile long-horizon loco-manipulation and outperforms prior methods across diverse tasks.

</details>


### [703] [Stein Variational Uncertainty-Adaptive Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01034)
*Hrishikesh Sathyanarayan,Ian Abraham*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于Stein变分分布鲁棒控制器的非线性动力系统控制方法，用于处理潜在参数不确定性，通过任务相关的粒子近似替代保守的最坏情况优化，在保持计算并行性的同时实现性能-鲁棒性权衡的改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分布鲁棒优化（DRO）采用最坏情况设计，可能牺牲名义性能；现有方法对不确定性模型有参数化限制；需要一种既能处理潜在参数不确定性，又能避免过度保守设计，同时保持计算效率的控制框架。

Method: 将最优控制与Stein变分推断耦合，使用基于粒子的任务相关不确定性分布近似，避免对不确定性模型的限制性参数假设，通过关注对闭环性能影响最大的参数敏感性来塑造控制律。

Result: 在代表性控制问题上，该方法相比名义控制、集成控制和经典分布鲁棒基线，在性能-鲁棒性权衡方面表现出改进，实现了更好的鲁棒性而不过度牺牲名义性能。

Conclusion: 该框架将鲁棒控制与变分推断统一在单一决策理论公式中，为具有参数不确定性的广泛控制系统类别提供了计算高效且非保守的鲁棒控制解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a Stein variational distributionally robust controller for nonlinear dynamical systems with latent parametric uncertainty. The method is an alternative to conservative worst-case ambiguity-set optimization with a deterministic particle-based approximation of a task-dependent uncertainty distribution, enabling the controller to concentrate on parameter sensitivities that most strongly affect closed-loop performance. Our method yields a controller that is robust to latent parameter uncertainty by coupling optimal control with Stein variational inference, and avoiding restrictive parametric assumptions on the uncertainty model while preserving computational parallelism. In contrast to classical DRO, which can sacrifice nominal performance through worst-case design, we find our approach achieves robustness by shaping the control law around relevant uncertainty that are most critical to the task objective. The proposed framework therefore reconciles robust control and variational inference in a single decision-theoretic formulation for broad classes of control systems with parameter uncertainty. We demonstrate our approach on representative control problems that empirically illustrate improved performance-robustness tradeoffs over nominal, ensemble, and classical distributionally robust baselines.

</details>


### [704] [Infinite-Horizon Ergodic Control via Kernel Mean Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01023)
*Christian Hughes,Ian Abraham*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于核均值嵌入的无限时域遍历控制器，解决长期覆盖任务中的计算扩展性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于核的遍历控制方法在一般覆盖域上提供强覆盖保证，但由于计算复杂度随时域扩展而急剧增加，实际应用仅限于有限时域，限制了其在长期覆盖任务中的使用

Method: 推导无限时域遍历控制器，配备扩展的核均值嵌入误差访问状态，递归记录状态访问历史；该扩展状态将过去访问与未来控制解耦，并将遍历控制扩展到无限时域；还提出基于扩展误差状态的滚动时域控制变体

Result: 提供了控制器的渐近收敛性理论证明，并在2D和3D覆盖问题中展示了保持遍历覆盖保证

Conclusion: 通过引入扩展误差状态解决了遍历控制的计算扩展性问题，使基于核的遍历控制能够应用于长期覆盖任务，同时保持覆盖保证

Abstract: This paper derives an infinite-horizon ergodic controller based on kernel mean embeddings for long-duration coverage tasks on general domains. While existing kernel-based ergodic control methods provide strong coverage guarantees on general coverage domains, their practical use has been limited to sub-ergodic, finite-time horizons due to intractable computational scaling, prohibiting its use for long-duration coverage. We resolve this scaling by deriving an infinite-horizon ergodic controller equipped with an extended kernel mean embedding error visitation state that recursively records state visitation. This extended state decouples past visitation from future control synthesis and expands ergodic control to infinite-time settings. In addition, we present a variation of the controller that operates on a receding-horizon control formulation with the extended error state. We demonstrate theoretical proof of asymptotic convergence of the derived controller and show preservation of ergodic coverage guarantees for a class of 2D and 3D coverage problems.

</details>


### [705] [PanoAir: A Panoramic Visual-Inertial SLAM with Cross-Time Real-World UAV Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00852)
*Yiyang Wu,Xiaohu Zhang,Yanjin Du,Tongsu Zhang,Chujun Li,Siyang Chen,Guoyi Zhang,Xiangpeng Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出首个面向无人机的全景视觉-惯性SLAM框架及真实世界数据集，解决传统有限视野VI-SLAM在复杂无人机场景中的漂移和失效问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VI-SLAM方法主要依赖有限视野传感器，在复杂无人机场景中容易产生漂移甚至失效。全景相机提供全向感知可提高鲁棒性，但全景VI-SLAM及其对应的无人机真实世界数据集尚未充分探索

Method: 1) 构建首个覆盖多样化飞行条件的真实世界全景视觉-惯性数据集；2) 提出全景VI-SLAM框架，通过全景特征提取和全景闭环利用全向视野，增强特征约束并确保全局一致性

Result: 在提出的数据集和公共基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法相比现有方法在精度、鲁棒性和一致性方面表现优异。在嵌入式平台上的部署验证了其实用性，计算效率与PC实现相当

Conclusion: 提出的全景VI-SLAM框架和数据集填补了无人机领域全景视觉-惯性SLAM的研究空白，为复杂无人机场景提供了准确、鲁棒且实用的姿态估计解决方案

Abstract: Accurate pose estimation is fundamental for unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) applications, where Visual-Inertial SLAM (VI-SLAM) provides a cost-effective solution for localization and mapping. However, existing VI-SLAM methods mainly rely on sensors with limited fields of view (FoV), which can lead to drift and even failure in complex UAV scenarios. Although panoramic cameras provide omnidirectional perception to improve robustness, panoramic VI-SLAM and corresponding real-world datasets for UAVs remain underexplored. To address this limitation, we first construct a real-world panoramic visual-inertial dataset covering diverse flight conditions, including varying illumination, altitudes, trajectory lengths, and motion dynamics. To achieve accurate and robust pose estimation under such challenging UAV scenarios, we propose a panoramic VI-SLAM framework that exploits the omnidirectional FoV via the proposed panoramic feature extraction and panoramic loop closure, enhancing feature constraints and ensuring global consistency. Extensive experiments on both the proposed dataset and public benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior accuracy, robustness, and consistency compared to existing approaches. Moreover, deployment on embedded platform validates its practical applicability, achieving comparable computational efficiency to PC implementations.
  The source code and dataset are publicly available at https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lG1Upn6yi-N6tYpEHAt6dfR1uhzNtWbT/view

</details>


### [706] [Compact Keyframe-Optimized Multi-Agent Gaussian Splatting SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00804)
*Monica M. Q. Li,Pierre-Yves Lajoie,Jialiang Liu,Giovanni Beltrame*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种改进的多智能体RGB-D高斯泼溅SLAM框架，通过压缩冗余高斯和两种集中式闭环检测模式，在保持地图保真度的同时显著降低通信负载


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体3D建图中，密集表示（特别是高斯泼溅方法生成的地图）在有限带宽下实时交换困难，成为实际部署的瓶颈

Method: 1) 在SLAM系统中加入压缩步骤去除冗余3D高斯而不降低渲染质量；2) 采用无需初始猜测的集中式闭环检测，提供两种模式：纯渲染深度模式（仅需3D高斯）和相机深度模式（包含轻量深度图像以提升配准精度和进一步高斯剪枝）

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上评估，相比最先进方法，两种模式下传输数据减少85-95%，使3D高斯多智能体SLAM更接近实际部署

Conclusion: 该框架通过有效压缩和优化的闭环检测策略，显著降低了多智能体高斯泼溅SLAM的通信需求，为实际场景部署提供了可行方案

Abstract: Efficient multi-agent 3D mapping is essential for robotic teams operating in unknown environments, but dense representations hinder real-time exchange over constrained communication links. In multi-agent Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), systems typically rely on a centralized server to merge and optimize the local maps produced by individual agents. However, sharing these large map representations, particularly those generated by recent methods such as Gaussian Splatting, becomes a bottleneck in real-world scenarios with limited bandwidth. We present an improved multi-agent RGB-D Gaussian Splatting SLAM framework that reduces communication load while preserving map fidelity. First, we incorporate a compaction step into our SLAM system to remove redundant 3D Gaussians, without degrading the rendering quality. Second, our approach performs centralized loop closure computation without initial guess, operating in two modes: a pure rendered-depth mode that requires no data beyond the 3D Gaussians, and a camera-depth mode that includes lightweight depth images for improved registration accuracy and additional Gaussian pruning. Evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets shows up to 85-95\% reduction in transmitted data compared to state-of-the-art approaches in both modes, bringing 3D Gaussian multi-agent SLAM closer to practical deployment in real-world scenarios. Code: https://github.com/lemonci/coko-slam

</details>


### [707] [Bench2Drive-VL: Benchmarks for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01259)
*Xiaosong Jia,Yuqian Shao,Zhenjie Yang,Qifeng Li,Zhiyuan Zhang,Junchi Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Bench2Drive-VL：首个为视觉语言模型在自动驾驶中设计的闭环评估基准，通过DriveCommenter自动生成多样化、行为驱动的问答对，支持VLMs在CARLA仿真环境中的闭环性能评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM4AD基准采用开环评估（静态问答数据集），无法评估模型在累积误差和分布外输入下的性能。自动驾驶需要更可靠的闭环评估方法，但现有VLM4AD缺乏此类评估框架。

Method: 1. DriveCommenter：闭环生成器，自动生成多样化、行为驱动的问答对，覆盖CARLA中所有驾驶情况（包括严重偏离路线和越野等罕见情况）。2. 统一协议和接口：允许现代VLMs直接接入Bench2Drive闭环环境与传统智能体比较。3. 灵活推理与控制框架：支持多格式视觉输入和可配置的基于图的思维链执行。4. 完整开发生态系统。

Result: 构建了全面的VLM4AD闭环评估基准，所有代码和标注数据集均已开源。该基准能够评估VLMs在分布外状态下的性能，包括传统静态数据集无法覆盖的严重驾驶偏差情况。

Conclusion: Bench2Drive-VL填补了VLM4AD领域闭环评估的空白，为视觉语言模型在自动驾驶中的性能评估提供了更可靠、全面的测试框架，支持模型在真实驾驶场景中的累积误差和分布外输入评估。

Abstract: With the rise of vision-language models (VLM), their application for autonomous driving (VLM4AD) has gained significant attention. Meanwhile, in autonomous driving, closed-loop evaluation has become widely recognized as a more reliable validation method than open-loop evaluation, as it can evaluate the performance of the model under cumulative errors and out-of-distribution inputs. However, existing VLM4AD benchmarks evaluate the model`s scene understanding ability under open-loop, i.e., via static question-answer (QA) dataset. This kind of evaluation fails to assess the VLMs performance under out-of-distribution states rarely appeared in the human collected datasets.To this end, we present Bench2Drive-VL, an extension of Bench2Drive that brings closed-loop evaluation to VLM-based driving, which introduces: (1) DriveCommenter, a closed-loop generator that automatically generates diverse, behavior-grounded question-answer pairs for all driving situations in CARLA,including severe off-route and off-road deviations previously unassessable in simulation. (2) A unified protocol and interface that allows modern VLMs to be directly plugged into the Bench2Drive closed-loop environment to compare with traditional agents. (3) A flexible reasoning and control framework, supporting multi-format visual inputs and configurable graph-based chain-of-thought execution. (4) A complete development ecosystem. Together, these components form a comprehensive closed-loop benchmark for VLM4AD. All codes and annotated datasets are open sourced.

</details>


### [708] [A Dual-Action Fabric-Based Soft Robotic Glove for Ergonomic Hand Rehabilitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00768)
*Rui Chen,Firman Isma Serdana,Domenico Chiaradia,Xianlong Mai,Elena Losanno,Gabriele Righi,Claudia De Santis,Federica Serra,Vincent Mendez,Cristian Camardella,Daniele Leonardis,Giulio Del Popolo,Silvestro Micera,Antonio Frisoli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发了一种基于织物的双作用软体机器人手套，具有个性化定制的执行器，支持手指屈伸和拇指外展，通过系统测试验证了其功能有效性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经系统疾病导致的手部功能障碍严重影响日常生活独立性，现有软体机器人手套在定制化、人体工程学适配和屈伸驱动方面存在局限，限制了临床应用

Method: 采用计算机数控热封技术制造对称腔室执行器，设计具有五个独立控制的双作用执行器支持手指屈伸，以及专门的拇指外展执行器；执行器充气时形成凹形外表面以最大化手指接触面积

Result: 执行器产生足够的关节力矩和指尖力用于日常生活任务；完整手套系统能为常见家居物品提供足够抓握力；10名健康受试者测试显示主动辅助显著减少前臂肌肉活动；3名颈脊髓损伤患者初步研究显示手套辅助促进更自然的抓握模式并减少对肌腱固定抓握的依赖，但任务完成时间增加

Conclusion: 这种可定制、符合人体工程学的设计代表了向个性化手部康复和辅助机器人技术迈出的实际一步，尽管当前驱动接口导致任务完成时间增加

Abstract: Hand impairment following neurological disorders substantially limits independence in activities of daily living, motivating the development of effective assistive and rehabilitation strategies. Soft robotic gloves have attracted growing interest in this context, yet persistent challenges in customization, ergonomic fit, and flexion-extension actuation constrain their clinical utility. Here, we present a dual-action fabric-based soft robotic glove incorporating customized actuators aligned with individual finger joints. The glove comprises five independently controlled dual-action actuators supporting finger flexion and extension, together with a dedicated thumb abduction actuator. Leveraging computer numerical control heat sealing technology, we fabricated symmetrical-chamber actuators that adopt a concave outer surface upon inflation, thereby maximizing finger contact area and improving comfort. Systematic characterization confirmed that the actuators generate sufficient joint moment and fingertip force for ADL-relevant tasks, and that the complete glove system produces adequate grasping force for common household objects. A preliminary study with ten healthy subjects demonstrated that active glove assistance significantly reduces forearm muscle activity during object manipulation. A pilot feasibility study with three individuals with cervical spinal cord injury across seven functional tasks indicated that glove assistance promotes more natural grasp patterns and reduces reliance on tenodesis grasp, although at the cost of increased task completion time attributable to the current actuation interface. This customizable, ergonomic design represents a practical step toward personalized hand rehabilitation and assistive robotics.

</details>


### [709] [A wearable haptic device for edge and surface simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00752)
*Rui Chen,Xianlong Mai,Alireza Sanaei,Domenico Chiaradia,Antonio Frisoli,Daniele Leonardis*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种紧凑轻量（24.3克）的指尖触觉设备，通过双电机机制提供可区分的表面和边缘接触反馈，增强VR中的物体操作体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统指尖触觉设备无法渲染某些对沉浸式和精确交互相关的触觉特征（如边缘检测），限制了VR应用中物体操作的逼真度和精确性。

Method: 开发了一种采用新型双电机机制的紧凑轻量指尖触觉设备（24.3克），使用6×6柔性传感器阵列进行压力分布表征，并通过用户研究评估设备性能。

Result: 压力分布表征显示两种刺激模式具有不同的接触模式；初步用户研究（5名参与者）在四种条件（边缘/表面接触×轻/重压力）下达到93%的平均分类准确率，平均响应时间为2.79秒。

Conclusion: 该设备能有效传达边缘和表面触觉线索，有望提高VR环境中物体操作的保真度，为更沉浸的虚拟交互提供技术支持。

Abstract: Object manipulation is fundamental to virtual reality (VR) applications, yet conventional fingertip haptic devices fail to render certain tactile features relevant for immersive and precise interactions, as i.e. detection of edges. This paper presents a compact, lightweight fingertip haptic device (24.3 g) that delivers distinguishable surface and edge contact feedback through a novel dual-motor mechanism. Pressure distribution characterization using a 6 x 6 flexible sensor array demonstrates distinct contact patterns between the two stimulation modes. A preliminary user study with five participants achieved 93% average classification accuracy across four conditions (edge/surface contact with light/heavy pressure), with mean response times of 2.79 seconds. The results indicate that the proposed device can effectively convey edge and surface tactile cues, potentially enhancing object manipulation fidelity in VR environments.

</details>


### [710] [How to Train your Tactile Model: Tactile Perception with Multi-fingered Robot Hands](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00744)
*Christopher J. Ford,Kaichen Shi,Laura Butcher,Nathan F. Lepora,Efi Psomopoulou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TacViT是一种基于视觉Transformer的新型触觉感知模型，旨在解决现有CNN方法在新触觉传感器部署中需要大量传感器特定数据和重新训练的问题，通过全局自注意力机制实现对新传感器的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于CNN的触觉感知方法存在严重局限性：需要大量传感器特定数据集，且每次部署新传感器时都需要重新训练，这主要由于不同传感器在镜头特性、照明条件和传感器磨损方面的差异。这些问题阻碍了触觉传感器在机器人操作中的快速部署和规模化应用。

Method: 提出TacViT模型，基于Vision Transformers架构，利用全局自注意力机制从触觉图像中提取鲁棒特征。该设计使模型能够学习更通用的触觉表示，从而在未见过的传感器数据上实现准确的接触属性推断，减少了对特定传感器数据收集和重新训练的依赖。

Result: 在五指机器人手的传感器上评估TacViT，结果显示其泛化性能优于传统CNN方法。模型能够在先前未见过的传感器数据上准确推断接触属性，显著减少了数据收集和重新训练的需求，加速了新传感器的部署过程。

Conclusion: TacViT通过Vision Transformers的全局自注意力机制实现了触觉感知的泛化能力，解决了CNN方法在新传感器部署中的局限性。该技术使触觉传感更具可扩展性和实用性，有望推动触觉传感在现实世界机器人应用中的广泛采用。

Abstract: Rapid deployment of new tactile sensors is essential for scalable robotic manipulation, especially in multi-fingered hands equipped with vision-based tactile sensors. However, current methods for inferring contact properties rely heavily on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which, while effective on known sensors, require large, sensor-specific datasets. Furthermore, they require retraining for each new sensor due to differences in lens properties, illumination, and sensor wear. Here we introduce TacViT, a novel tactile perception model based on Vision Transformers, designed to generalize on new sensor data. TacViT leverages global self-attention mechanisms to extract robust features from tactile images, enabling accurate contact property inference even on previously unseen sensors. This capability significantly reduces the need for data collection and retraining, accelerating the deployment of new sensors. We evaluate TacViT on sensors for a five-fingered robot hand and demonstrate its superior generalization performance compared to CNNs. Our results highlight TacViTs potential to make tactile sensing more scalable and practical for real-world robotic applications.

</details>


### [711] [SoftHand Model-W: A 3D-Printed, Anthropomorphic, Underactuated Robot Hand with Integrated Wrist and Carpal Tunnel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00738)
*Dhillon B. Merritt,Christopher J. Ford,Haoran Li,Malia Smith,Zhixing Chen,Efi Psomopoulou,Nathan F. Lepora*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SoftHand Model-W：一款3D打印、欠驱动、拟人化机器人手，集成拮抗肌腱机制和2自由度腕部，通过腕部驱动减少手臂补偿运动，提升操作效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发具有腕部驱动的机器人手，减少手臂的补偿和重配置运动，实现更高效、类人的操作能力，特别是在需要手-臂协调的任务中

Method: 基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand设计3D打印的欠驱动拟人化手，集成拮抗肌腱机制和2自由度肌腱驱动腕部（屈伸和桡尺偏），采用腕管式肌腱布线将电机置于前臂，远端惯性小，结构紧凑

Result: 与无腕部驱动相比，添加腕部驱动显著减少了手臂关节行程和配置变化，缩短了任务完成时间（立方体堆叠和圆盘旋转任务），并实现了原本不可能的拾放操作

Conclusion: 近端自由度（腕部）是实现多功能、类人操作的关键，紧凑设计适合研究和辅助应用部署，展示了手-臂协调在真实世界机器人应用中的重要性

Abstract: This paper presents the SoftHand Model-W: a 3D-printed, underactuated, anthropomorphic robot hand based on the Pisa/IIT SoftHand, with an integrated antagonistic tendon mechanism and 2 degree-of-freedom tendon-driven wrist. These four degrees-of-acuation provide active flexion and extension to the five fingers, and active flexion/extension and radial/ulnar deviation of the palm through the wrist, while preserving the synergistic and self-adaptive features of such SoftHands. A carpal tunnel-inspired tendon routing allows remote motor placement in the forearm, reducing distal inertia and maintaining a compact form factor. The SoftHand-W is mounted on a 6-axis robot arm and tested with two reorientation tasks requiring coordination between the hand and arm's pose: cube stacking and in-plane disc rotation. Results comparing task time, arm joint travel, and configuration changes with and without wrist actuation show that adding the wrist reduces compensatory and reconfiguration movements of the arm for a quicker task-completion time. Moreover, the wrist enables pick-and-place operations that would be impossible otherwise. Overall, the SoftHand Model-W demonstrates how proximal degrees of freedom are key to achieving versatile, human-like manipulation in real world robotic applications, with a compact design enabling deployment in research and assistive settings.

</details>


<div id='cs.MS'></div>

# cs.MS [[Back]](#toc)

### [712] [$k$-server-bench: Automating Potential Discovery for the $k$-Server Conjecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07240)
*Kirill Brilliantov,Etienne Bamas,Emmanuel Abbé*

Main category: cs.MS

TL;DR: 提出基于k-server猜想的代码挑战，通过发现满足线性不等式系统的势函数来推动数学发现，作为开放数学问题的自动化探索基准


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为自动化数学发现创建代码基准，基于k-server猜想这一竞争分析中的核心开放问题，旨在开发能够发现满足复杂约束的势函数的智能体

Method: 设计基于k-server猜想的代码挑战任务：发现满足大规模图结构线性不等式系统的势函数；评估过程是可靠但不完备的，违反任何不等式即可反驳候选解，但满足所有不等式不构成证明；在已解决的k=3情况和开放的k=4情况下进行实验

Result: 在k=3情况下，当前智能体方法能够解决非平凡实例；在k=4情况下，能够减少现有势函数的违反数量但未完全解决任务；该任务具有挑战性但可能在当前方法能力范围内

Conclusion: 该任务不仅对k-server社区有实际价值（提供测试新假设的工具），还作为代码发现智能体的有用基准，解决了现有基准的早期饱和和基线方法区分度不足等局限性

Abstract: We introduce a code-based challenge for automated, open-ended mathematical discovery based on the $k$-server conjecture, a central open problem in competitive analysis. The task is to discover a potential function satisfying a large graph-structured system of simple linear inequalities. The resulting evaluation procedure is sound but incomplete: any violated inequality definitively refutes a candidate, whereas satisfying all inequalities does not by itself constitute a proof of the corresponding conjecture's special case. Nevertheless, a candidate that passes all constraints would be strong evidence toward a valid proof and, to the best of our knowledge, no currently known potential achieves this under our formulation in the open $k=4$ circle case. As such, a successful candidate would already be an interesting contribution to the $k$-server conjecture, and could become a substantial theoretical result when paired with a full proof.
  Experiments on the resolved $k=3$ regime show that current agentic methods can solve nontrivial instances, and in the open $k=4$ regime they reduce the number of violations relative to existing potentials without fully resolving the task. Taken together, these results suggest that the task is challenging but plausibly within reach of current methods.
  Beyond its relevance to the $k$-server community, where the developed tooling enables researchers to test new hypotheses and potentially improve on the current record, the task also serves as a useful \emph{benchmark} for developing code-based discovery agents. In particular, our $k=3$ results show that it mitigates important limitations of existing open-ended code-based benchmarks, including early saturation and the weak separation between naive random baselines and more sophisticated methods.

</details>


<div id='cs.LO'></div>

# cs.LO [[Back]](#toc)

### [713] [Formally Guaranteed Control Adaptation for ODD-Resilient Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07414)
*Gricel Vázquez,Calum Imrie,Sepeedeh Shahbeigi,Nawshin Mannan Proma,Tian Gan,Victoria J Hodge,John Molloy,Simos Gerasimou*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应概率系统模型方法，用于处理超出操作设计域的场景，同时提供定量保证，增强自主系统的弹性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保自主系统在超出操作设计域（ODD）情况下的可靠性能是构建弹性自主系统的主要挑战，需要能够处理意外场景并提供保证的方法

Method: 引入自适应概率系统模型方法，动态扩展现有系统情境能力覆盖范围，支持在意外情况下验证和调整系统行为

Result: 初步结果表明，该方法通过自适应调整行为并提供形式化保证，有效提高了系统在未预见ODD外情况下的可靠性

Conclusion: 该方法为解决自主系统在ODD外场景的弹性问题提供了有效途径，能够动态适应意外情况并保持系统可靠性

Abstract: Ensuring reliable performance in situations outside the Operational Design Domain (ODD) remains a primary challenge in devising resilient autonomous systems. We explore this challenge by introducing an approach for adapting probabilistic system models to handle out-of-ODD scenarios while, in parallel, providing quantitative guarantees. Our approach dynamically extends the coverage of existing system situation capabilities, supporting the verification and adaptation of the system's behaviour under unanticipated situations. Preliminary results demonstrate that our approach effectively increases system reliability by adapting its behaviour and providing formal guarantees even under unforeseen out-of-ODD situations.

</details>
